title: Greetings & Introductions
description: Master basic greetings, self-introductions, and polite interactions in daily Chinese life.

dialogueSections.title: New Roommate
dialogueSections.scene: A and B meet in their new dormitory room.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你好！
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo!
lines.english: Hello!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好！我叫李明。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo! wǒ jiào lǐ míng.
lines.english: Hello! My name is Li Ming.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 很高興認識你，李明。
lines.pinyin: hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ, lǐ míng.
lines.english: Very glad to meet you, Li Ming.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也很高興認識你。你是哪裡人？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ. nǐ shì nǎ lǐ rén?
lines.english: I'm also very glad to meet you. Where are you from?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我是北京人。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì běi jīng rén. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I'm from Beijing. How about you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我是上海人。你是學生嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì shàng hǎi rén. nǐ shì xué sheng ma?
lines.english: I'm from Shanghai. Are you a student?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，我是大一的新生。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ shì dà yī de xīn shēng.
lines.english: Yes, I am a first-year freshman.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也是！你學什麼？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì! nǐ xué shén me?
lines.english: Me too! What are you studying?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我學中文。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xué zhōng wén. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I study Chinese. And you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我學英文。這是你的書嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xué yīng wén. zhè shì nǐ de shū ma?
lines.english: I study English. Is this your book?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不，那不是我的書。
lines.pinyin: bù, nà bú shì wǒ de shū.
lines.english: No, that is not my book.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是誰的書？
lines.pinyin: nà shì shéi de shū?
lines.english: Whose book is that?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我不知道。可能是老師的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù zhī dào. kě néng shì lǎo shī de.
lines.english: I don't know. Maybe it's the teacher's.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 老師姓什麼？
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī xìng shén me?
lines.english: What is the teacher's surname?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老師姓王，叫王老師。
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī xìng wáng, jiào wáng lǎo shī.
lines.english: The teacher's surname is Wang, called Teacher Wang.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 王老師人好嗎？
lines.pinyin: wáng lǎo shī rén hǎo ma?
lines.english: Is Teacher Wang a good person?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他人很好，也很漂亮。
lines.pinyin: tā rén hěn hǎo, yě hěn piào liang.
lines.english: He is very good and also very beautiful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太好了。我們去教室吧。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. wǒ men qù jiào shì ba.
lines.english: Great. Let's go to the classroom.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，走吧。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, zǒu ba.
lines.english: Okay, let's go.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Goodbye!

dialogueSections.title: Meeting a Teacher
dialogueSections.scene: A student meets a teacher in the hallway.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老師您好！
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī nín hǎo!
lines.english: Hello, teacher (polite)!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好。請問你貴姓？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo. qǐng wèn nǐ guì xìng?
lines.english: Hello. May I ask what your honorable surname is?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我姓張，叫張小華。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xìng zhāng, jiào zhāng xiǎo huá.
lines.english: My surname is Zhang, called Zhang Xiaohua.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 張同學，你是哪國人？
lines.pinyin: zhāng tóng xué, nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
lines.english: Student Zhang, what country are you from?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我是美國人。我也會說一點中文。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì měi guó rén. wǒ yě huì shuō yì diǎn zhōng wén.
lines.english: I am American. I can also speak a little Chinese.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的中文很好。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de zhōng wén hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Your Chinese is very good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哪裡，哪裡。謝謝老師。
lines.pinyin: nǎ lǐ, nǎ lǐ. xiè xie lǎo shī.
lines.english: Not at all, not at all. Thank you, teacher.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這是什麼？
lines.pinyin: zhè shì shén me?
lines.english: What is this?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這是我家人的照片。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ jiā rén de zhào piàn.
lines.english: This is a photo of my family.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是你爸爸嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà shì nǐ bà ba ma?
lines.english: Is that your father?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的。他也是老師。
lines.pinyin: shì de. tā yě shì lǎo shī.
lines.english: Yes. He is also a teacher.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你媽媽呢？
lines.pinyin: nǐ mā ma ne?
lines.english: What about your mother?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我媽媽是醫生。她現在在美國。
lines.pinyin: wǒ mā ma shì yī shēng. tā xiàn zài zài měi guó.
lines.english: My mother is a doctor. She is in America now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你家有幾個人？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ gè rén?
lines.english: How many people are in your family?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我家有四個人：爸爸、媽媽、妹妹和我。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu sì gè rén: bà ba, mā ma, mèi mei hé wǒ.
lines.english: There are four people in my family: father, mother, younger sister, and me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你妹妹多大了？
lines.pinyin: nǐ mèi mei duō dà le?
lines.english: How old is your younger sister?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 她十五歲，是中學生。
lines.pinyin: tā shí wǔ suì, shì zhōng xué shēng.
lines.english: She is fifteen, a middle school student.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 很好。你今天有課嗎？
lines.pinyin: hěn hǎo. nǐ jīn tiān yǒu kè ma?
lines.english: Very good. Do you have classes today?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有，我等一下有中文課。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ děng yī xià yǒu zhōng wén kè.
lines.english: Yes, I have a Chinese class in a bit.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，再見。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Okay, goodbye.

dialogueSections.title: Introduction at a Party
dialogueSections.scene: Introducing friends at a small social gathering.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大衛，過來一下！
lines.pinyin: dà wèi, guò lái yí xià!
lines.english: David, come here for a second!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 什麼事？
lines.pinyin: shén me shì?
lines.english: What's up?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我給你介紹一個新朋友。
lines.pinyin: wǒ gěi nǐ jiè shào yí gè xīn péng you.
lines.english: Let me introduce a new friend to you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太好了，是誰？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, shì shéi?
lines.english: Great, who is it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這是王小美。小美，這是大衛。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì wáng xiǎo měi. xiǎo měi, zhè shì dà wèi.
lines.english: This is Wang Xiaomei. Xiaomei, this is David.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好，小美。很高興認識你。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, xiǎo měi. hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ.
lines.english: Hello, Xiaomei. Very glad to meet you.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我也很高興認識你，大衛。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ, dà wèi.
lines.english: I'm also very glad to meet you, David.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你是學生的朋友嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ shì xué sheng de péng you ma?
lines.english: Are you a student friend?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 是的，我們在同一個學校。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ men zài tóng yí gè xué xiào.
lines.english: Yes, we are in the same school.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你在這附近住嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zài zhè fù jìn zhù ma?
lines.english: Do you live nearby here?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 不，我住得比較遠。
lines.pinyin: bù, wǒ zhù de bǐ jiào yuǎn.
lines.english: No, I live quite far away.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你喜歡喝咖啡嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xǐ huan hē kā fēi ma?
lines.english: Do you like drinking coffee?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我很喜歡。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ hěn xǐ huan. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like it very much. And you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也喜歡。這家店的咖啡不錯。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xǐ huan. zhè jiā diàn de kā fēi bú cuò.
lines.english: I like it too. The coffee at this shop is not bad.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 對，我也覺得。你最近怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě jué de. nǐ zuì jìn zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Yes, I think so too. How have you been recently?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我很忙，但是很高興。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hěn máng, dàn shì hěn gāo xìng.
lines.english: I'm very busy, but very happy.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 那就好。下次一起喝咖啡。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. xià cì yì qǐ hē kā fēi.
lines.english: That's good. Let's have coffee together next time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題。這是我的電話。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. zhè shì wǒ de diàn huà.
lines.english: No problem. This is my phone number.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 謝謝，我會給你打電話。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, wǒ huì gěi nǐ dǎ diàn huà.
lines.english: Thanks, I will call you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Okay, goodbye!

text.zh: 今天 wǒ rèn shi le yí gè xīn péng you, tā jiào wáng xiǎo měi.
text.pinyin: jīn tiān wǒ rèn shi le yí gè xīn péng you, tā jiào wáng xiǎo měi.
text.english: Today I met a new friend, her name is Wang Xiaomei.

text.zh: 小美是我的同學，她也是學生。
text.pinyin: xiǎo měi shì wǒ de tóng xué, tā yě shì xué sheng.
text.english: Xiaomei is my classmate, she is also a student.

text.zh: 她人很好，很高興能認識她。
text.pinyin: tā rén hěn hǎo, hěn gāo xìng néng rèn shi tā.
text.english: She is a very nice person, and I'm very happy to meet her.

comprehension.question: Who did the author meet today?
comprehension.questionZh: 作者今天認識了誰？

comprehension.question: What is the new friend's name?
comprehension.questionZh: 新朋友叫什麼名字？

comprehension.question: Is the new friend a student?
comprehension.questionZh: 新朋友是學生嗎？

questions.question: What do you say when meeting a teacher for the first time?
How do you ask someone's surname politely?
How do you say 'Nice to meet you'?
If someone says '謝謝', you say...
Which word describes where you study?
How do you ask 'What is this?'

questions.sentencePinyin: hěn gāo xìng ___ nǐ.
nǐ jiào shén me ___?
wǒ shì ___.
tā shì wǒ de ___.
lǎo shī ___ shén me?
wǒ ___ huì shuō zhōng wén.
qǐng wèn nǐ ___ xìng?
nà ___ wǒ de shū.
nǐ shì ___ guó rén?
wǒ men qù ___ ba.

questions.answerPinyin: tā shì wǒ de péng you.
wǒ yě shì měi guó rén.

title: Numbers & Counting
description: Learn to count, use measure words, and handle money in various daily scenarios.

dialogueSections.title: Buying Fruit
dialogueSections.scene: Buying fresh produce at a local market.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老闆，這蘋果怎麼賣？
lines.pinyin: lǎo bǎn, zhè píng guǒ zěn me mài?
lines.english: Boss, how do you sell these apples?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一個三塊錢，四個十塊。
lines.pinyin: yí gè sān kuài qián, sì gè shí kuài.
lines.english: Three dollars for one, ten dollars for four.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我要四個蘋果。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ yào sì gè píng guǒ.
lines.english: Then I want four apples.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還要別的嗎？
lines.pinyin: hái yào bié de ma?
lines.english: Anything else?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 香蕉一斤多少錢？
lines.pinyin: xiāng jiāo yì jīn duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is half a kilo of bananas?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 香蕉五塊錢一斤。
lines.pinyin: xiāng jiāo wǔ kuài qián yì jīn.
lines.english: Bananas are five dollars per jin.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要兩斤香蕉。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào liǎng jīn xiāng jiāo.
lines.english: I want two jin of bananas.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，四個蘋果十塊，兩斤香蕉十塊。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, sì gè píng guǒ shí kuài, liǎng jīn xiāng jiāo shí kuài.
lines.english: Okay, four apples for ten, two jin of bananas for ten.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一共二十塊，對嗎？
lines.pinyin: yí gòng èr shí kuài, duì ma?
lines.english: Altogether twenty dollars, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，一共二十塊錢。
lines.pinyin: duì, yí gòng èr shí kuài qián.
lines.english: Yes, altogether twenty dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 給你五十塊。
lines.pinyin: gěi nǐ wǔ shí kuài.
lines.english: Here is fifty dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 找你三十塊。
lines.pinyin: zhǎo nǐ sān shí kuài.
lines.english: Here is thirty dollars change.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。這水果新鮮嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. zhè shuǐ guǒ xīn xiān ma?
lines.english: Thanks. Is this fruit fresh?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 很新鮮，都是今天早上到的。
lines.pinyin: hěn xīn xiān, dōu shì jīn tiān zǎo shang dào de.
lines.english: Very fresh, it all arrived this morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了。你有幾個孩子？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. nǐ yǒu jǐ gè hái zi?
lines.english: Great. How many children do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我有兩個孩子，一個兒子，一個女兒。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu liǎng gè hái zi, yí gè ér zi, yí gè nǚ ér.
lines.english: I have two children, one son and one daughter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他們多大了？
lines.pinyin: tā men duō dà le?
lines.english: How old are they?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 兒子十歲，女兒六歲。
lines.pinyin: ér zi shí suì, nǚ ér luì suì.
lines.english: My son is ten, my daughter is six.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真好。再見。
lines.pinyin: zhēn hǎo. zài jiàn.
lines.english: That's nice. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 慢走，下次再來！
lines.pinyin: màn zǒu, xià cì zài lái!
lines.english: Take care, come again next time!

dialogueSections.title: At the Convenience Store
dialogueSections.scene: Buying drinks and snacks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你好！我要一瓶水。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo! wǒ yào yì píng shuǐ.
lines.english: Hello! I want a bottle of water.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一瓶水兩塊五毛錢。
lines.pinyin: yì píng shuǐ liǎng kuài wǔ máo qián.
lines.english: A bottle of water is 2.50 dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還要兩杯熱咖啡。
lines.pinyin: hái yào liǎng bēi rè kā fēi.
lines.english: Also two cups of hot coffee.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 咖啡一杯十五塊，兩杯三十塊。
lines.pinyin: kā fēi yì bēi shí wǔ kuài, liǎng bēi sān shí kuài.
lines.english: Coffee is fifteen each, two cups is thirty.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 牛奶多少錢一盒？
lines.pinyin: niú nǎi duō shǎo qián yì hé?
lines.english: How much is a box of milk?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一盒牛奶八塊錢。
lines.pinyin: yì hé niú nǎi bā kuài qián.
lines.english: A box of milk is eight dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要兩盒牛奶。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào liǎng hé niú nǎi.
lines.english: I want two boxes of milk.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 水兩塊五，咖啡三十，牛奶十六。
lines.pinyin: shuǐ liǎng kuài wǔ, kā fēi sān shí, niú nǎi shí liù.
lines.english: Water is 2.5, coffee is 30, milk is 16.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一共多少錢？
lines.pinyin: yí gòng duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is it altogether?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一共四十八塊五毛錢。
lines.pinyin: yí gòng sì shí bā kuài wǔ máo qián.
lines.english: Altogether it's 48.50 dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 給你一百塊。
lines.pinyin: gěi nǐ yì bǎi kuài.
lines.english: Here is one hundred dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 找你五十一塊五毛錢。
lines.pinyin: zhǎo nǐ wǔ shí yī kuài wǔ máo qián.
lines.english: Here is 51.50 change.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 請問這附近有書店嗎？
lines.pinyin: qǐng wèn zhè fù jìn yǒu shū diàn ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, is there a bookstore nearby?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，在前面第三個路口。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, zài qián miàn dì sān gè lù kǒu.
lines.english: Yes, at the third intersection ahead.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 遠嗎？
lines.pinyin: yuǎn ma?
lines.english: Is it far?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不遠，走五分鐘就到了。
lines.pinyin: bù yuǎn, zǒu wǔ fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
lines.english: Not far, a five-minute walk and you'll be there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，謝謝。我想買三本書。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, xiè xie. wǒ xiǎng mǎi sān běn shū.
lines.english: Okay, thanks. I want to buy three books.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那家書店很大，書很多。
lines.pinyin: nà jiā shū diàn hěn dà, shū hěn duō.
lines.english: That bookstore is very big and has many books.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的介紹。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de jiè shào.
lines.english: Thank you for the introduction.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣，慢走。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, màn zǒu.
lines.english: You're welcome, take care.

dialogueSections.title: Ordering Lunch
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues ordering lunch at a small restaurant.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們去吃午飯吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men qù chī wǔ fàn ba.
lines.english: Let's go eat lunch.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，吃什麼？
lines.pinyin: hǎo, chī shén me?
lines.english: Okay, eat what?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想吃牛肉麵。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng chī niú ròu miàn.
lines.english: I want to eat beef noodles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也想吃。這家店很有名。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng chī. zhè jiā diàn hěn yǒu míng.
lines.english: I want to eat it too. This shop is very famous.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 服務員，我們要兩碗牛肉麵。
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, wǒ men yào liǎng wǎn niú ròu miàn.
lines.english: Waiter, we want two bowls of beef noodles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 还要兩盤青菜。
lines.pinyin: hái yào liǎng pán qīng cài.
lines.english: Also two plates of green vegetables.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 牛肉麵一碗多少錢？
lines.pinyin: niú ròu miàn yì wǎn duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is one bowl of beef noodles?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一碗二十五塊。
lines.pinyin: yì wǎn èr shí wǔ kuài.
lines.english: Twenty-five dollars for one bowl.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 青菜一盤十塊。
lines.pinyin: qīng cài yì pán shí kuài.
lines.english: One plate of vegetables is ten dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那兩個人一共多少錢？
lines.pinyin: nà liǎng gè rén yí gòng duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Then how much is it for two people altogether?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 五十加二十，一共七十塊。
lines.pinyin: wǔ shí jiā èr shí, yí gòng qī shí kuài.
lines.english: Fifty plus twenty, altogether seventy dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不算貴。你帶錢了嗎？
lines.pinyin: bú suàn guì. nǐ dài qián le ma?
lines.english: Not too expensive. Did you bring money?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 帶了，我這裡有一百塊。
lines.pinyin: dài le, wǒ zhè lǐ yǒu yì bǎi kuài.
lines.english: Yes, I have one hundred dollars here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那就好。你要喝茶嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. nǐ yào hē chá ma?
lines.english: That's good. Do you want to drink tea?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 茶是免費的嗎？
lines.pinyin: chá shì miǎn fèi de ma?
lines.english: Is tea free?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，這裡的茶是免費的。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhè lǐ de chá shì miǎn fèi de.
lines.english: Yes, the tea here is free.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我喝一杯。現在幾點？
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ hē yì bēi. xiàn zài jǐ diǎn?
lines.english: Then I'll have a cup. What time is it now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 十二點一刻。我們有一小時時間。
lines.pinyin: shí èr diǎn yí kè. wǒ men yǒu yì xiǎo shí shí jiān.
lines.english: 12:15. We have one hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 足夠了。慢慢吃。
lines.pinyin: zú gòu le. màn màn chī.
lines.english: That's enough. Let's eat slowly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，麵來了。開動吧！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, miàn lái le. kāi dòng ba!
lines.english: Okay, the noodles are here. Let's eat!

text.zh: 在中國，我們常用'塊'來數錢。
text.pinyin: zài zhōng guó, wǒ men cháng yòng 'kuài' lái shǔ qián.
text.english: In China, we often use 'kuài' to count money.

text.zh: 數字很重要，因為我們要買東西。
text.pinyin: shù zì hěn zhòng yào, yīn wèi wǒ men yào mǎi dōng xi.
text.english: Numbers are very important because we need to buy things.

text.zh: 如果你有五十塊錢，你可以買很多蘋果。
text.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yǒu wǔ shí kuài qián, nǐ kě yǐ mǎi hěn duō píng guǒ.
text.english: If you have fifty dollars, you can buy many apples.

comprehension.question: What word is often used for money?
comprehension.questionZh: 數錢時常用什麼詞？

comprehension.question: Why are numbers important?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼數字很重要？

comprehension.question: How many apples can you buy with 50 dollars?
comprehension.questionZh: 用五十塊可以買多少蘋果？

What is the informal word for dollar?

If you want 'two cups of tea', you say...

questions.english: How much is a cup of coffee?
We want two bottles of water.
Boss, how do you sell the apples?
Bananas are five dollars per jin.

questions.answerPinyin: yí gòng qī shí kuài qián.

questions.english: I want two bottles of milk.

questions.english: How many books do you have?

questions.answerPinyin: yǒu duō shǎo gè xué sheng?

questions.english: I want to buy a map.

xiè xie, xià cì zài lái!

title: Family Members
description: Learn to talk about your family, describe members, and discuss their occupations and ages.

dialogueSections.title: Family Album
dialogueSections.scene: Looking at old family photos together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這是你全家人的照片嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè shì nǐ quán jiā rén de zhào piàn ma?
lines.english: Is this a photo of your whole family?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，這是我家人的合照。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhè shì wǒ jiā rén de hé zhào.
lines.english: Yes, this is a group photo of my family.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 照片裡的兩個人是誰？
lines.pinyin: zhào piàn lǐ de liǎng gè rén shì shéi?
lines.english: Who are these two people in the photo?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 他們是我爸爸和媽媽。
lines.pinyin: tā men shì wǒ bà ba hé mā ma.
lines.english: They are my father and mother.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你爸爸看起來很帥。
lines.pinyin: nǐ bà ba kàn qǐ lái hěn shuài.
lines.english: Your father looks very handsome.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝，他今年五十五歲了。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, tā jīn nián wǔ shí wǔ suì le.
lines.english: Thanks, he is fifty-five this year.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他是醫生嗎？
lines.pinyin: tā shì yī shēng ma?
lines.english: Is he a doctor?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不，他是個工程師。
lines.pinyin: bù, tā shì gè gōng chéng shī.
lines.english: No, he is an engineer.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你媽媽呢？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ mā ma ne?
lines.english: What about your mother?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我媽媽是老師，她在小學工作。
lines.pinyin: wǒ mā ma shì lǎo shī, tā zài xiǎo xué gōng zuò.
lines.english: My mother is a teacher, she works at a primary school.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這對龍鳳胎是你的弟弟妹妹嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè duì lóng fèng tāi shì nǐ de dì di mèi mei ma?
lines.english: Are these twins your younger brother and sister?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不是，這是我哥哥和姐姐。
lines.pinyin: bú shì, zhè shì wǒ gē ge hé jiě jie.
lines.english: No, these are my older brother and sister.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哇，你有一個哥哥和一個姐姐？
lines.pinyin: wa, nǐ yǒu yí gè gē ge hé yí gè jiě jie?
lines.english: Wow, you have an older brother and an older sister?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，姐姐比我大三歲。
lines.pinyin: duì, jiě jie bǐ wǒ dà sān suì.
lines.english: Yes, my sister is three years older than me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 她真漂亮。她在做什麼工作？
lines.pinyin: tā zhēn piào liang. tā zài zuò shén me gōng zuò?
lines.english: She is really beautiful. What work does she do?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 她是護士，在市醫院工作。
lines.pinyin: tā shì hù shi, zài shì yī yuàn gōng zuò.
lines.english: She is a nurse, works at the city hospital.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你哥哥呢？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ gē ge ne?
lines.english: What about your brother?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 他在讀大學，今年大四。
lines.pinyin: tā zài dú dà xué, jīn nián dà sì.
lines.english: He is in university, a senior this year.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你們家的人都很有成就。
lines.pinyin: nǐ men jiā de rén dōu hěn yǒu chéng jiù.
lines.english: Everyone in your family is very accomplished.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哪裡，謝謝。我們家很熱鬧。
lines.pinyin: nǎ lǐ, xiè xie. wǒ men jiā hěn rè nao.
lines.english: Not at all, thanks. Our home is very lively.

dialogueSections.title: A Big Family Dinner
dialogueSections.scene: Discussing family sizes over dinner.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 小王，你家有幾個人？
lines.pinyin: xiǎo wáng, nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ gè rén?
lines.english: Xiao Wang, how many people are in your family?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我家有五個人。爸爸、媽媽、兩個弟弟和我。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ gè rén. bà ba, mā ma, liǎng gè dì di hé wǒ.
lines.english: There are five people in my family. Father, mother, two younger brothers, and me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你弟弟多大了？
lines.pinyin: nǐ dì di duō dà le?
lines.english: How old are your younger brothers?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大弟弟十二歲，小弟弟才八歲。
lines.pinyin: dà dì di shí èr suì, xiǎo dì di cái bā suì.
lines.english: The older one is twelve, the younger one is only eight.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 八歲很可愛吧？
lines.pinyin: bā suì hěn kě ài ba?
lines.english: Eight years old must be cute?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是很可愛，但是也很愛動。
lines.pinyin: shì hěn kě ài, dàn shì yě hěn ài dòng.
lines.english: Very cute, but also very active.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有照片嗎？我想看看。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu zhào piàn ma? wǒ xiǎng kàn kan.
lines.english: Do you have a photo? I want to see.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，這是我手機裡的照片。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, zhè shì wǒ shǒu jī lǐ de zhào piàn.
lines.english: Yes, here is a photo in my phone.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這個高個子是你大弟弟嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè gè gāo gè zi shì nǐ dà dì di ma?
lines.english: Is this tall guy your older younger brother?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，他比我還高呢。
lines.pinyin: duì, tā bǐ wǒ hái gāo ne.
lines.english: Yes, he is even taller than me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你們長得真像。
lines.pinyin: nǐ men zhǎng de zhēn xiàng.
lines.english: You guys look really alike.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大家都這麼說。你家呢？
lines.pinyin: dà jiā dōu zhè me shuō. nǐ jiā ne?
lines.english: Everyone says so. What about your family?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我家只有三個人。爸爸、媽媽和我。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiā zhǐ yǒu sān gè rén. bà ba, mā ma hé wǒ.
lines.english: My family only has three people. Father, mother, and me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你是獨生子？
lines.pinyin: nǐ shì dú shēng zǐ?
lines.english: Are you an only child?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的。所以我很羨慕你有弟弟。
lines.pinyin: shì de. suǒ yǐ wǒ hěn xiàn mù nǐ yǒu dì di.
lines.english: Yes. So I really envy you having brothers.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有兄弟姐妹也挺累的，常吵架。
lines.pinyin: yǒu xiōng dì jiě mèi yě tǐng lèi de, cháng chǎo jià.
lines.english: Having siblings is also tiring, we often argue.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 但是很熱鬧啊。
lines.pinyin: dàn shì hěn rè nao a.
lines.english: But it's very lively.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那倒是。週末全家會一起去公園。
lines.pinyin: nà dǎo shì. zhōu mò quán jiā huì yì qǐ qù gōng yuán.
lines.english: That's true. On weekends the whole family goes to the park.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真幸福。多吃點青菜。
lines.pinyin: zhēn xìng fú. duō chī diǎn qīng cài.
lines.english: So happy. Eat more vegetables.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，你也多吃點。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, nǐ yě duō chī diǎn.
lines.english: Okay, you eat more too.

dialogueSections.title: Meeting the Parents
dialogueSections.scene: A student visits a friend's house and meets their parents.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 叔叔、阿姨，您好！
lines.pinyin: shū shu, ā yí, nín hǎo!
lines.english: Uncle, Auntie, hello!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好，快請進。你叫什麼名字？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, kuài qǐng jìn. nǐ jiào shén me míng zi?
lines.english: Hello, please come in. What is your name?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我叫大衛，我是小明的大學同學。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiào dà wèi, wǒ shì xiǎo míng de dà xué tóng xué.
lines.english: My name is David, I am Xiaoming's college classmate.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 大衛，歡迎你來我們家玩。
lines.pinyin: dà wèi, huān yíng nǐ lái wǒ men jiā wán.
lines.english: David, welcome to our house.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝阿姨。這是給您的小禮物。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie ā yí. zhè shì gěi nín de xiǎo lǐ wù.
lines.english: Thank you, Auntie. This is a small gift for you.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 太客氣了。聽說你家在美國？
lines.pinyin: tài kè qi le. tīng shuō nǐ jiā zài měi guó?
lines.english: You're too polite. I heard your family is in America?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，我爸爸媽媽都在紐約。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ bà ba mā ma dōu zài niǔ yuē.
lines.english: Yes, my father and mother are both in New York.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 他們在那裡做什麼工作？
lines.pinyin: tā men zài nà lǐ zuò shén me gōng zuò?
lines.english: What work do they do there?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我爸爸是律師，我媽媽是圖書館員。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bà ba shì lǜ shī, wǒ mǎ ma shì tú shū guǎn yuán.
lines.english: My father is a lawyer, my mother is a librarian.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 律師的工作一定很忙吧？
lines.pinyin: lǜ shī de gōng zuò yí dìng hěn máng ba?
lines.english: A lawyer's job must be very busy?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，他經常要加班。
lines.pinyin: shì de, tā jīng cháng yào jiā bān.
lines.english: Yes, he often has to work overtime.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你還有兄弟姐妹嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hái yǒu xiōng dì jiě mèi ma?
lines.english: Do you have any siblings?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我有一個妹妹，她現在在讀高中。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu yí gè mèi mei, tā xiàn zài zài dú gāo zhōng.
lines.english: I have a younger sister, she is in high school now.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 小明說你中文說得很好。
lines.pinyin: xiǎo míng shuō nǐ zhōng wén shuō de hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Xiaoming said you speak Chinese very well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哪裡，我還在學習，說得不太好。
lines.pinyin: nǎ lǐ, wǒ hái zài xué xí, shuō de bú tài hǎo.
lines.english: Not at all, I'm still learning and don't speak very well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 已經很不錯了。坐下來喝杯茶吧。
lines.pinyin: yǐ jīng hěn bú cuò le. zuò xià lái hē bēi chá ba.
lines.english: It's already quite good. Sit down and have a cup of tea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝叔叔。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie shū shu.
lines.english: Thank you, Uncle.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 晚上一就在我們家吃飯吧。
lines.pinyin: wǎn shang jiù zài wǒ men jiā chī fàn ba.
lines.english: Eat dinner at our house tonight.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，太謝謝您了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, tài xiè xie nín le.
lines.english: Okay, thank you so much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣，大家都是朋友。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, dà jiā dōu shì péng you.
lines.english: You're welcome, everyone is friends.

text.zh: 我家有四個人：爸爸、媽媽、妹妹和我。
text.pinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu sì gè rén: bà ba, mā ma, mèi mei hé wǒ.
text.english: There are four people in my family: father, mother, younger sister, and me.

text.zh: 爸爸是工程師，媽媽是老師。
text.pinyin: bà ba shì gōng chéng shī, mā ma shì lǎo shī.
text.english: Father is an engineer, and mother is a teacher.

text.zh: 我們全家人都住在一起，生活很快樂。
text.pinyin: wǒ men quán jiā rén dōu zhù zài yì qǐ, shēng huó hěn kuài lè.
text.english: Our whole family lives together, and life is very happy.

comprehension.question: How many people are in the family?
comprehension.questionZh: 家裡有幾個人？

comprehension.question: What is the father's job?
comprehension.questionZh: 爸爸的工作是什麼？

comprehension.question: How is their family life?
comprehension.questionZh: 他們的生活怎麼樣？

questions.sentencePinyin: zhè shì wǒ ___ de zhào piàn.
tā shì shéi? tā shì wǒ ___.
jiě jie hěn ___.
bà ba de gōng zuò shì ___.
nǐ yǒu jǐ gè ___?
dì di jīn nián jǐ ___?
wǒ gē ge hěn ___.
mā ma xiàn zài hěn ___.
quán jiā ___ zhù zài yì qǐ.
nǐ mèi mei duō ___ le?

questions.english: What work does your father do?
My younger sister is ten years old this year.
This is not a photo of the whole family.

questions.answerPinyin: nǐ jiě jie duō dà le?

questions.english: There are five people in my family.
questions.answerPinyin: wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ gè rén.
wǒ mā ma shì lǎo shī.
wǒ men dōu zhù zài yì qǐ.

questions.english: This is a photo of my family.
questions.answerPinyin: zhè shì wǒ jiā rén de zhào piàn.

title: Food & Eating Out
description: Discover Chinese cuisine, learn to order food like a local, and handle restaurant interactions with ease.

dialogueSections.title: Arriving at the Restaurant
dialogueSections.scene: A group entering a popular local eatery.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 歡迎光臨！請問幾位？
lines.pinyin: huān yíng guāng lín! qǐng wèn jǐ wèi?
lines.english: Welcome! How many people?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們有三個人。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yǒu sān gè rén.
lines.english: We have three people.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，請跟我來。這邊請。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng gēn wǒ lái. zhè biān qǐng.
lines.english: Okay, please follow me. This way please.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝。這裡的人真多。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. zhè lǐ de rén zhēn duō.
lines.english: Thanks. There are so many people here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，這家店的菜很有名。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhè jiā diàn de cài hěn yǒu míng.
lines.english: Yes, this shop's dishes are very famous.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 請問有菜單嗎？
lines.pinyin: qǐng wèn yǒu cài dān ma?
lines.english: Is there a menu?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有，這是菜單。請看。
lines.pinyin: 有，zhè shì cài dān. qǐng kàn.
lines.english: Yes, here is the menu. Please look.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你們這裡什麼最好吃？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men zhè lǐ shén me zuì hǎo chī?
lines.english: What is the most delicious thing here?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們的牛肉麵和餃子都不錯。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men de niú ròu miàn hé jiǎo zi dōu bú cuò.
lines.english: Our beef noodles and dumplings are both not bad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我要一份餃子。你們呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào yí fèn jiǎo zi. nǐ men ne?
lines.english: I want a portion of dumplings. How about you guys?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我要一碗牛肉麵。要辣的嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào yì wǎn niú ròu miàn. yào là de ma?
lines.english: I want a bowl of beef noodles. Is it spicy?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 可以做不辣的，也可以做辣的。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ zuò bù là de, yě kě yǐ zuò là de.
lines.english: We can make it non-spicy, or spicy.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 那我要一點點辣。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ yào yì diǎn diǎn là.
lines.english: Then I want a little bit of spice.

lines.speaker: D
lines.zh: 我不太餓，我點一份蔬菜。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bú tài è, wǒ diǎn yí fèn shū cài.
lines.english: I'm not too hungry, I'll order a portion of vegetables.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的。要喝什麼飲料嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. yào hē shén me yǐn liào ma?
lines.english: Okay. Do you want any drinks?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 給我們一壺熱茶。
lines.pinyin: gěi wǒ men yì hú rè chá.
lines.english: Give us a pot of hot tea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題，請稍等。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, qǐng shāo děng.
lines.english: No problem, please wait a moment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這裡的環境很舒服。
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ de huán jìng hěn shū fu.
lines.english: The environment here is very comfortable.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 對啊，服務員也很客氣。
lines.pinyin: duì a, fú wù yuán yě hěn kè qi.
lines.english: Yeah, the waiter is also very polite.

lines.speaker: D
lines.zh: 快看，菜來了！
lines.pinyin: kuài kàn, cài lái le!
lines.english: Quick, look, the food is coming!

dialogueSections.title: During the Meal
dialogueSections.scene: Enjoying the food and requesting items.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這餃子真好吃！
lines.pinyin: zhè jiǎo zi zhēn hǎo chī!
lines.english: These dumplings are really delicious!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我的牛肉麵也很香。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de niú ròu miàn yě hěn xiāng.
lines.english: My beef noodles are also very fragrant.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 這盤青菜很新鮮。
lines.pinyin: zhè pán qīng cài hěn xīn xiān.
lines.english: This plate of vegetables is very fresh.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 服務員，請問有筷子嗎？
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, qǐng wèn yǒu kuài zi ma?
lines.english: Waiter, are there chopsticks?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 有的，就在桌子上面。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, jiù zài zhuō zi shàng miàn.
lines.english: Yes, right on the table.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 喔，我看見了。謝謝。
lines.pinyin: ō, wǒ kàn jiàn le. xiè xie.
lines.english: Oh, I see them. Thanks.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 可以再給我們一個碗嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ zài gěi wǒ men yí gè wǎn ma?
lines.english: Can you give us another bowl?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 沒問題，馬上來。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, mǎ shàng lái.
lines.english: No problem, coming right up.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這茶真好喝，很解膩。
lines.pinyin: zhè chá zhēn hǎo hē, hěn jiě nì.
lines.english: This tea is really good, it cuts the greasiness.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你要喝水嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yào hē shuǐ ma?
lines.english: Do you want to drink water?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 不用了，我有茶。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng le, wǒ yǒu chá.
lines.english: No need, I have tea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 小明，你吃飽了嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiǎo míng, nǐ chī bǎo le ma?
lines.english: Xiaoming, are you full?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我吃飽了，很飽。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chī bǎo le, hěn bǎo.
lines.english: I'm full, very full.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我也是，這份量真大。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì, zhè fèn liàng zhēn dà.
lines.english: Me too, the portion size is really large.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你們想吃甜點嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men xiǎng chī tián diǎn ma?
lines.english: Do you guys want dessert?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不了，我太餓了，現在太飽了。
lines.pinyin: bù le, wǒ tài è le, xiàn zài tài bǎo le.
lines.english: No, I was too hungry, now I'm too full.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我們買單吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men mǎi dān ba.
lines.english: Let's pay the bill.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 服務員，買單！
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, mǎi dān!
lines.english: Waiter, check please!

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 一共是一百五十塊錢。
lines.pinyin: yí gòng shì yì bǎi wǔ shí kuài qián.
lines.english: Altogether it's one hundred and fifty dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝，給你錢。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, gěi nǐ qián.
lines.english: Thanks, here is the money.

dialogueSections.title: At the Cafe
dialogueSections.scene: Ordering drinks and chatting at a modern cafe.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這家咖啡店很漂亮。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiā kā fēi diàn hěn piào liang.
lines.english: This cafe is very beautiful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你想喝什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xiǎng hē shén me?
lines.english: What do you want to drink?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要一杯冰咖啡。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào yì bēi bīng kā fēi. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I want an iced coffee. How about you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我渴了，我要一瓶礦泉水。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kě le, wǒ yào yì píng kuàng quán shuǐ.
lines.english: I'm thirsty, I want a bottle of mineral water.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還要別的嗎？這裡的蛋糕不錯。
lines.pinyin: hái yào bié de ma? zhè lǐ de dàn gāo bú cuò.
lines.english: Anything else? The cake here is not bad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我不喜歡吃甜的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù xǐ huān chī tián de.
lines.english: I don't like eating sweet things.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那好吧。服務員！
lines.pinyin: nà hǎo ba. fú wù yuán!
lines.english: Okay then. Waiter!

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 您好，請問要點什麼？
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, qǐng wèn yào diǎn shén me?
lines.english: Hello, what would you like to order?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一杯冰咖啡，一瓶水。
lines.pinyin: yì bēi bīng kā fēi, yì píng shuǐ.
lines.english: An iced coffee and a bottle of water.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 好的。一共三十五塊。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. yí gòng sān shí wǔ kuài.
lines.english: Okay. Altogether thirty-five dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我來付錢吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ lái fù qián ba.
lines.english: Let me pay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不用，不用，下次你請我。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng, bú yòng, xià cì nǐ qǐng wǒ.
lines.english: No need, no need, you treat me next time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那謝謝你。我們坐窗邊吧。
lines.pinyin: nà xiè xie nǐ. wǒ men zuò chuāng biān ba.
lines.english: Then thank you. Let's sit by the window.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好啊，那裡的風景不錯。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, nà lǐ de fēng jǐng bú cuò.
lines.english: Sure, the view there is not bad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你最近在忙什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì jìn zài máng shén me?
lines.english: What have you been busy with lately?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我在學習中文，準備考試。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zài xué xí zhōng wén, zhǔn bèi kǎo shì.
lines.english: I'm studying Chinese and preparing for an exam.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 難嗎？
lines.pinyin: nán ma?
lines.english: Is it hard?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有點難，但是很有趣。
lines.pinyin: yǒu diǎn nán, dàn shì hěn yǒu qù.
lines.english: A bit hard, but very interesting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！有問題可以問我。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! yǒu wèn tí kě yǐ wèn wǒ.
lines.english: Keep it up! If you have questions you can ask me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的幫助。咖啡來了。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de bāng zhù. kā fēi lái le.
lines.english: Thanks for your help. The coffee is here.

text.zh: 中國人很喜歡大家一起吃飯。
text.pinyin: zhōng guó rén hěn xǐ huān dà jiā yì qǐ chī fàn.
text.english: Chinese people like eating together very much.

text.zh: 桌子通常是圓的，代表團圓。
text.pinyin: zhuō zi tōng cháng shì yuán de, dài biǎo tuán yuán.
text.english: The table is usually round, representing reunion.

text.zh: 在餐廳吃飯時，大家會一邊聊天一邊點很多菜。
text.pinyin: zài cān tīng chī fàn shí, dà jiā huì yì biān liáo tiān yì biān diǎn hěn duō cài.
text.english: When eating at a restaurant, everyone chats while ordering many dishes.

comprehension.question: What kind of table is usually used?
comprehension.questionZh: 通常使用什麼樣的桌子？

comprehension.question: What does a round table represent?
comprehension.questionZh: 圓桌代表什麼？

comprehension.question: What do people do while eating at a restaurant?
comprehension.questionZh: 在餐廳吃飯時，人們會做什麼？

questions.question: Who serves you in a restaurant?
What do you look at to choose food?
What do you say to call the waiter for the check?
How do you ask 'How many people?'
How do you say 'to order food'?

questions.sentencePinyin: zhè wǎn niú ròu miàn hěn ___.
fú wù yuán, wǒ yào ___.
wǒ diǎn yí fèn ___.
nǐ ___ le ma? wǒ men qù chī fàn ba.
zhè bēi kā fēi hěn ___.
qǐng gěi wǒ yì bǎ ___.
wǒ bù xǐ huān chī ___ de.
zhè hú ___ shì miǎn fèi de.
wǒ men yǒu ___ gè rén.
qǐng kàn ___.

questions.english: I want a bowl of noodles.
Do you want to drink tea?
I don't like eating spicy food.
This shop's coffee is very good.
I want a cup of coffee.
questions.answerPinyin: wǒ yào yì bēi kā fēi.
chá shì miǎn fèi de ma?
yí gòng yì bǎi wǔ shí kuài qián.

title: Shopping for Clothes
description: Learn to describe clothing, talk about colors and sizes, and master the art of bargaining in Chinese shops.

dialogueSections.title: Choosing a Shirt
dialogueSections.scene: A customer looking for a new shirt at a department store.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你好，我想買一件襯衫。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn chèn shān.
lines.english: Hello, I want to buy a shirt.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，您喜歡什麼顏色的？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, nín xǐ huan shén me yán sè de?
lines.english: Okay, what color do you like?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡藍色的。你有藍色的嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan lán sè de. nǐ yǒu lán sè de ma?
lines.english: I like blue. Do you have blue ones?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有的，請看這一件。您覺得怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, qǐng kàn zhè yí jiàn. nín jué de zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Yes, please look at this one. What do you think?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這件很漂亮。有我的號碼嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn hěn piào liang. yǒu wǒ de hào mǎ ma?
lines.english: This one is very beautiful. Do you have my size?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 您穿多大的？
lines.pinyin: nín chuān duō dà de?
lines.english: What size do you wear?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我穿中號的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chuān zhōng hào de.
lines.english: I wear a medium.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，我去幫您拿中號的。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ qù bāng nín ná zhōng hào de.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go get a medium for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。我可以試穿一下嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ kě yǐ shì chuān yí xià ma?
lines.english: Thanks. Can I try it on?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 當然可以，試衣間在那邊。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ, shì yī jiān zài nà biān.
lines.english: Of course, the fitting room is over there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這件衣服很合適，我很喜歡。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn yī fu hěn hé shì, wǒ hěn xǐ huan.
lines.english: This clothing fits well, I like it very much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這件衣服現在打折，很便宜。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn yī fu xiàn zài dǎ zhé, hěn pián yi.
lines.english: This clothing is on discount now, it's very cheap.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 多少錢一件？
lines.pinyin: duō shǎo qián yí jiàn?
lines.english: How much is one?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 打完折是一百二十塊。
lines.pinyin: dǎ wán zhé shì yì bǎi èr shí kuài.
lines.english: After the discount, it's 120 dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不貴。我要了。
lines.pinyin: bú guì. wǒ yào le.
lines.english: Not expensive. I'll take it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還要看看褲子嗎？
lines.pinyin: hái yào kàn kan kù zi ma?
lines.english: Do you want to see pants too?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不用了，今天只買襯衫。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng le, jīn tiān zhǐ mǎi chèn shān.
lines.english: No need, just buying a shirt today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，請跟我來付錢。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng gēn wǒ lái fù qián.
lines.english: Okay, please follow me to pay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 給你錢，謝謝。
lines.pinyin: gěi nǐ qián, xiè xie.
lines.english: Here is the money, thanks.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝，慢走！
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, màn zǒu!
lines.english: Thank you, take care!

dialogueSections.title: Bargaining at the Market
dialogueSections.scene: Negotiating prices at an outdoor clothing stall.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老闆，這條裙子多少錢？
lines.pinyin: lǎo bǎn, zhè tiáo qún zi duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Boss, how much is this skirt?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這條裙子兩百塊。
lines.pinyin: zhè tiáo qún zi liǎng bǎi kuài.
lines.english: This skirt is 200 dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太貴了！可以便宜一點嗎？
lines.pinyin: tài guì le! kě yǐ pián yi yì diǎn ma?
lines.english: Too expensive! Can you make it a bit cheaper?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這可是名牌，質量很好。
lines.pinyin: zhè kě shì míng pái, zhì liàng hěn hǎo.
lines.english: This is a brand name, the quality is very good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一百五十塊行嗎？
lines.pinyin: yì bǎi wǔ shí kuài xíng ma?
lines.english: Is 150 dollars okay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不行，一百五十太少了，我賠錢。
lines.pinyin: bù xíng, yì bǎi wǔ shí tài shǎo le, wǒ péi qián.
lines.english: No, 150 is too little, I'd lose money.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那一百八十塊，這是我最高的價格。
lines.pinyin: nà yì bǎi bā shí kuài, zhè shì wǒ zuì gāo de jià gé.
lines.english: Then 180 dollars, that's my highest price.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好吧，好吧，一百八十賣給你了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, hǎo ba, yì bǎi bā shí mài gěi nǐ le.
lines.english: Okay, okay, I'll sell it to you for 180.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。我還要這雙黑色的鞋子。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ hái yào zhè shuāng hēi sè de xié zi.
lines.english: Thanks. I also want this pair of black shoes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這雙鞋子一百塊。
lines.pinyin: zhè shuāng xié zi yì bǎi kuài.
lines.english: This pair of shoes is 100 dollars.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 兩件一起買，再便宜一點？
lines.pinyin: liǎng jiàn yì qǐ mǎi, zài pián yi yì diǎn?
lines.english: Buy two together, even cheaper?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一共兩百六十塊，不能再便宜了。
lines.pinyin: yí gòng liǎng bǎi liù shí kuài, bù néng zài pián yi le.
lines.english: Altogether 260 dollars, cannot be cheaper.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，兩百六十塊。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, liǎng bǎi liù shí kuài.
lines.english: Okay, 260 dollars.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 您眼光真好，這兩件都很適合您。
lines.pinyin: nín yǎn guāng zhēn hǎo, zhè liǎng jiàn dōu hěn shì hé nín.
lines.english: You have good taste, these two items really suit you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也這麼覺得。有袋子嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhè me jué de. yǒu dài zi ma?
lines.english: I think so too. Is there a bag?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，給你裝好了。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, gěi nǐ zhuāng hǎo le.
lines.english: Yes, I've packed them for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝，祝你生意興隆。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zhù nǐ shēng yì xīng lóng.
lines.english: Thanks, wish you a prosperous business.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝，歡迎下次再來。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, huān yíng xià cì zài lái.
lines.english: Thanks, welcome to come back again.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Goodbye!

dialogueSections.title: Winter Wear
dialogueSections.scene: Buying warm clothes for the cold season.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 天氣冷了，我需要買件大衣。
lines.pinyin: tiān qì lěng le, wǒ xū yào mǎi jiàn dà yī.
lines.english: The weather is cold, I need to buy a coat.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你看這件白色的怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn zhè jiàn bái sè de zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How about this white one?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 白色很容易髒，我想買黑色的。
lines.pinyin: bái sè hěn róng yì zāng, wǒ xiǎng mǎi hēi sè de.
lines.english: White gets dirty easily, I want to buy black.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 黑色也很大方。這邊有幾件黑色的。
lines.pinyin: hēi sè yě hěn dà fāng. zhè biān yǒu jǐ jiàn hēi sè de.
lines.english: Black is also very elegant. Here are a few black ones.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這件黑色的長大衣真酷。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn hēi sè de cháng dà yī zhēn kù.
lines.english: This long black coat is really cool.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你試穿一下看看。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shì chuān yí xià kàn kàn.
lines.english: Try it on and see.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這件是大號的，對我來說有點大。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì dà hào de, duì wǒ lái shuō yǒu diǎn dà.
lines.english: This one is large, it's a bit big for me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 服務員，請問有這件的中號嗎？
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, qǐng wèn yǒu zhè jiàn de zhōng hào ma?
lines.english: Waiter, is there a medium for this one?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 我查一下。有的，請稍等。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chá yí xià. yǒu de, qǐng shāo děng.
lines.english: I'll check. Yes, please wait a moment.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這件中號的很合適。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn zhōng hào de hěn hé shì.
lines.english: This medium one fits well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 穿起來很暖和吧？
lines.pinyin: chuān qǐ lái hěn nuǎn huo ba?
lines.english: It must be very warm to wear?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，很舒服。還要買幾雙襪子。
lines.pinyin: shì de, hěn shū fu. hái yào mǎi jǐ shuāng wà zi.
lines.english: Yes, very comfortable. Also need to buy a few pairs of socks.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那邊有厚襪子，冬天穿很好。
lines.pinyin: nà biān yǒu hòu wà zi, dōng tiān chuān hěn hǎo.
lines.english: There are thick socks over there, good for winter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要買三雙紅色的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào mǎi sān shuāng hóng sè de.
lines.english: I want to buy three red pairs.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 為什麼買紅色的？
lines.pinyin: wèi shén me mǎi hóng sè de?
lines.english: Why buy red ones?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 因為快要過年了，紅色喜慶。
lines.pinyin: yīn wèi kuài yào guò nián le, hóng sè xǐ qìng.
lines.english: Because Chinese New Year is coming, red is festive.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有道理。我們去付錢吧。
lines.pinyin: yǒu dào lǐ. wǒ men qù fù qián ba.
lines.english: That makes sense. Let's go pay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大衣五百塊，襪子三十塊。
lines.pinyin: dà yī wǔ bǎi kuài, wà zi sān shí kuài.
lines.english: The coat is 500, the socks are 30.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一共五百三十塊。刷卡還是付現金？
lines.pinyin: yí gòng wǔ bǎi sān shí kuài. shuā kǎ hái shì fù xiàn jīn?
lines.english: Altogether 530. Card or cash?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我刷卡，謝謝。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shuā kǎ, xiè xie.
lines.english: I'll pay by card, thanks.

text.zh: 買衣服時，我們要看顏色和號碼。
text.pinyin: mǎi yī fu shí, wǒ men yào kàn yán sè hé hào mǎ.
text.english: When buying clothes, we need to look at colors and sizes.

text.zh: 有的人喜歡紅色，有的人喜歡黑色。
text.pinyin: yǒu de rén xǐ huan hóng sè, yǒu de rén xǐ huan hēi sè.
text.english: Some people like red, some people like black.

text.zh: 試穿衣服很重要，因為合適最重要。
text.pinyin: shì chuān yī fu hěn zhòng yào, yīn wèi hé shì zuì zhòng yào.
text.english: Trying on clothes is very important because fitting well is the most important.

comprehension.question: What do we need to look at when buying clothes?
comprehension.questionZh: 買衣服時要看什麼？

comprehension.question: What colors are mentioned?
comprehension.questionZh: 提到了哪些顏色？

comprehension.question: Why is trying on clothes important?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼試穿很重要？

questions.question: How do you say 'to try on'?
If something is 10 dollars instead of 100, it is...

questions.sentencePinyin: zhè jiàn chèn shān tài ___ le.
wǒ kě yǐ ___ yí xià ma?
zhè tiáo qún zi hěn ___.
nín chuān duō ___ de?
zhè jiàn yī fu ___ zhé ma?
wǒ yào yí jiàn ___ de.
zhè shuāng xié zi hěn ___.
wǒ xiǎng mǎi ___ chèn shān.
nà tiáo kù zi hěn ___.
nǐ yǒu ___ de ma?

questions.english: I think the size fits well.
The blue skirt is very beautiful.
Boss, can it be a bit cheaper?
This shirt is on discount now.
I want this pair of black shoes.
Two hundred dollars is really too expensive.
Excuse me, can I pay by card?
I want to buy a blue shirt.
questions.answer: 我想買一件藍色的襯衫。
questions.answerPinyin: wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn lán sè de chèn shān.

questions.english: How much is this pair of shoes?
questions.answerPinyin: zhè shuāng xié zi duō shǎo qián?

questions.english: Can you give me a discount?

questions.answerPinyin: shì yī jiān zài nǎ lǐ?
nǐ yǒu hēi sè de ma?

questions.answer: 太貴了，一百五十塊行嗎？
questions.answerPinyin: tài guì le, yì bǎi wǔ shí kuài xíng ma?

title: Directions & Locations
description: Learn how to ask for and give directions.

dialogueSections.title: Finding the Subway
dialogueSections.scene: A tourist asks a local for directions to the nearest subway station.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不好意思，請問地鐵站在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn dì tiě zhàn zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Excuse me, where is the subway station?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好！地鐵站離這裡不遠。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo! dì tiě zhàn lí zhè lǐ bù yuǎn.
lines.english: Hello! The subway station is not far from here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 要怎麼走？
lines.pinyin: yào zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: How do I get there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你先一直走，走到路口就轉右邊。
lines.pinyin: nǐ xiān yī zhí zǒu, zǒu dào lù kǒu jiù zhuǎn yòu biān.
lines.english: First go straight, then turn right at the intersection.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 轉右邊以後怎麼走？
lines.pinyin: zhuǎn yòu biān yǐ hòu zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: After turning right, how do I continue?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再走三分鐘，你會看到一個銀行。
lines.pinyin: zài zǒu sān fēn zhōng, nǐ huì kàn dào yī gè yín háng.
lines.english: Walk another 3 minutes, you'll see a bank.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 銀行在左邊還是右邊？
lines.pinyin: yín háng zài zuǒ biān hái shì yòu biān?
lines.english: Is the bank on the left or the right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在你的左邊。地鐵站就在銀行對面。
lines.pinyin: zài nǐ de zuǒ biān. dì tiě zhàn jiù zài yín háng duì miàn.
lines.english: On your left. The subway station is right across from the bank.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 啊！我看到了，那個銀行很大。
lines.pinyin: ā! wǒ kàn dào le, nà gè yín háng hěn dà.
lines.english: Ah! I see it, that bank is very big.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的！地鐵站的入口在紅綠燈旁邊。
lines.pinyin: shì de! dì tiě zhàn de rù kǒu zài hóng lǜ dēng páng biān.
lines.english: Yes! The subway entrance is next to the traffic light.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 步行要幾分鐘？
lines.pinyin: bù xíng yào jǐ fēn zhōng?
lines.english: How many minutes on foot?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大概走五分鐘就到了。
lines.pinyin: dà gài zǒu wǔ fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
lines.english: It's about a 5-minute walk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 可以坐公車去嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ zuò gōng chē qù ma?
lines.english: Can I take a bus there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 可以，但是走路更快！
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, dàn shì zǒu lù gèng kuài!
lines.english: Yes, but walking is faster!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝你。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie nǐ.
lines.english: Okay, thank you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣。你是第一次來這裡嗎？
lines.pinyin: bù kè qì. nǐ shì dì yī cì lái zhè lǐ ma?
lines.english: You're welcome. Is this your first time here?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，我是外國人，剛來台灣。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ shì wài guó rén, gāng lái táiwān.
lines.english: Yes, I'm a foreigner, just arrived in Taiwan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 歡迎你！如果有問題，隨時可以問。
lines.pinyin: huān yíng nǐ! rú guǒ yǒu wèn tí, suí shí kě yǐ wèn.
lines.english: Welcome! If you have questions, feel free to ask anytime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太感謝了！你真好。
lines.pinyin: tài gǎn xiè le! nǐ zhēn hǎo.
lines.english: Thank you so much! You're so kind.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒有！祝你旅途愉快！
lines.pinyin: méi yǒu! zhù nǐ lǚ tú yú kuài!
lines.english: Not at all! Wish you a pleasant journey!

dialogueSections.title: Getting to the Supermarket
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends try to find the supermarket together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們要去超市，但是我不知道在哪裡。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yào qù chāo shì, dàn shì wǒ bù zhī dào zài nǎ lǐ.
lines.english: We need to go to the supermarket, but I don't know where it is.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我有地圖，我們來看一下。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu dì tú, wǒ men lái kàn yī xià.
lines.english: I have a map, let's take a look.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 地圖上有超市嗎？
lines.pinyin: dì tú shàng yǒu chāo shì ma?
lines.english: Is the supermarket on the map?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，就在公園附近。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, jiù zài gōng yuán fù jìn.
lines.english: Yes, it's near the park.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 公園在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: gōng yuán zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Where is the park?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 公園在我們前面，走路大概十分鐘。
lines.pinyin: gōng yuán zài wǒ men qián miàn, zǒu lù dà gài shí fēn zhōng.
lines.english: The park is ahead of us, about a 10-minute walk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那超市在公園的左邊還是右邊？
lines.pinyin: nà chāo shì zài gōng yuán de zuǒ biān hái shì yòu biān?
lines.english: Is the supermarket to the left or right of the park?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在公園的右邊，就在那棟大樓的一樓。
lines.pinyin: zài gōng yuán de yòu biān, jiù zài nà dòng dà lóu de yī lóu.
lines.english: To the right of the park, on the first floor of that building.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，我們走吧。要過馬路嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ men zǒu ba. yào guò mǎ lù ma?
lines.english: Okay, let's go. Do we need to cross the street?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 要，在紅綠燈的地方過馬路。
lines.pinyin: yào, zài hóng lǜ dēng de dì fāng guò mǎ lù.
lines.english: Yes, cross at the traffic light.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 然後呢？過了馬路以後怎麼走？
lines.pinyin: rán hòu ne? guò le mǎ lù yǐ hòu zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: Then what? How do we go after crossing the street?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 過了馬路就一直走，不用轉彎。
lines.pinyin: guò le mǎ lù jiù yī zhí zǒu, bù yòng zhuǎn wān.
lines.english: After crossing, just go straight, no need to turn.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 超市的出口在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: chāo shì de chū kǒu zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Where is the exit of the supermarket?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 出口和入口是同一個地方。
lines.pinyin: chū kǒu hé rù kǒu shì tóng yī gè dì fāng.
lines.english: The exit and entrance are the same place.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 超市旁邊有書店嗎？
lines.pinyin: chāo shì páng biān yǒu shū diàn ma?
lines.english: Is there a bookstore next to the supermarket?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，書店就在超市的後面。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, shū diàn jiù zài chāo shì de hòu miàn.
lines.english: Yes, the bookstore is right behind the supermarket.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了！我也想去書店看看。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! wǒ yě xiǎng qù shū diàn kàn kàn.
lines.english: Great! I also want to check out the bookstore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，買完東西我們一起去。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, mǎi wán dōng xī wǒ men yì qǐ qù.
lines.english: Okay, let's go together after shopping.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我看到超市了，入口在左邊！
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn dào chāo shì le, rù kǒu zài zuǒ biān!
lines.english: I can see the supermarket, the entrance is on the left!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對！我們進去吧。
lines.pinyin: duì! wǒ men jìn qù ba.
lines.english: Right! Let's go in.

dialogueSections.title: Asking Directions to the Hospital
dialogueSections.scene: A person urgently needs to find the hospital.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不好意思，我需要去醫院，請問醫院在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, wǒ xū yào qù yī yuàn, qǐng wèn yī yuàn zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Excuse me, I need to go to the hospital. Where is it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 醫院？你還好嗎？
lines.pinyin: yī yuàn? nǐ hái hǎo ma?
lines.english: The hospital? Are you okay?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我朋友有點不舒服，我陪他去看醫生。
lines.pinyin: wǒ péng you yǒu diǎn bù shū fu, wǒ péi tā qù kàn yī shēng.
lines.english: My friend is a bit unwell, I'm accompanying them to see the doctor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我知道，醫院不遠，在計程車站的對面。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào, yī yuàn bù yuǎn, zài jì chéng chē zhàn de duì miàn.
lines.english: I know, the hospital is not far, it's across from the taxi stand.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 計程車站在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: jì chéng chē zhàn zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Where is the taxi stand?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你從這裡往前走，到了路口往左轉。
lines.pinyin: nǐ cóng zhè lǐ wǎng qián zǒu, dào le lù kǒu wǎng zuǒ zhuǎn.
lines.english: From here, walk forward, turn left at the intersection.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，往前走到路口然後左轉。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǎng qián zǒu dào lù kǒu rán hòu zuǒ zhuǎn.
lines.english: Okay, walk forward to the intersection then turn left.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 轉彎以後再走兩分鐘，你就會看到醫院了。
lines.pinyin: zhuǎn wān yǐ hòu zài zǒu liǎng fēn zhōng, nǐ jiù huì kàn dào yī yuàn le.
lines.english: After turning, walk another two minutes and you'll see the hospital.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 醫院是很大的建築嗎？
lines.pinyin: yī yuàn shì hěn dà de jiàn zhù ma?
lines.english: Is the hospital a large building?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，很大，是白色的大樓，上面有紅十字。
lines.pinyin: shì de, hěn dà, shì bái sè de dà lóu, shàng miàn yǒu hóng shí zì.
lines.english: Yes, it's large, a white building with a red cross on top.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我可以坐公車去嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ zuò gōng chē qù ma?
lines.english: Can I take a bus there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 可以，但是走路比較快，只要五分鐘。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, dàn shì zǒu lù bǐ jiào kuài, zhǐ yào wǔ fēn zhōng.
lines.english: Yes, but walking is faster, only five minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，我走路去。附近有藥局嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ zǒu lù qù. fù jìn yǒu yào jú ma?
lines.english: Okay, I'll walk. Is there a pharmacy nearby?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，藥局就在醫院的一樓。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, yào jú jiù zài yī yuàn de yī lóu.
lines.english: Yes, the pharmacy is on the first floor of the hospital.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你告訴我這麼多。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ gào sù wǒ zhè me duō.
lines.english: Thank you for telling me so much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣！你朋友的情況嚴重嗎？
lines.pinyin: bù kè qì! nǐ péng you de qíng kuàng yán zhòng ma?
lines.english: You're welcome! Is your friend's condition serious?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不太嚴重，可能是感冒。
lines.pinyin: bù tài yán zhòng, kě néng shì gǎn mào.
lines.english: Not too serious, probably a cold.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那就好。快點去吧，你朋友等你。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. kuài diǎn qù ba, nǐ péng you děng nǐ.
lines.english: That's good. Go quickly, your friend is waiting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，再見！非常感謝！
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zài jiàn! fēi cháng gǎn xiè!
lines.english: Okay, goodbye! Many thanks!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再見，保重！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn, bǎo zhòng!
lines.english: Goodbye, take care!

text.zh: 在陌生的城市，我們常需要問路。
text.pinyin: zài mò shēng de chéng shì, wǒ men cháng xū yào wèn lù.
text.english: In an unfamiliar city, we often need to ask for directions.

text.zh: 知道左右和前後的方向很有用。
text.pinyin: zhī dào zuǒ yòu hé qián hòu de fāng xiàng hěn yǒu yòng.
text.english: Knowing left, right, front, and back directions is very useful.

text.zh: 現在很多人用手機地圖，但問人也很快。
text.pinyin: xiàn zài hěn duō rén yòng shǒu jī dì tú, dàn wèn rén yě hěn kuài.
text.english: Many people use mobile maps now, but asking people is also very fast.

comprehension.question: What do we need to do in an unfamiliar city?
comprehension.questionZh: 在陌生的城市我們需要做什麼？

comprehension.question: What directions are useful to know?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼方向很有用？
options: 左右前後 Left, right, front, back

comprehension.question: Is asking people fast?
comprehension.questionZh: 問人快嗎？

title: Time & Schedule
description: Learn how to tell time and talk about your daily routine.

dialogueSections.title: Morning Routine
dialogueSections.scene: Two roommates discuss their morning schedules.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 早安！你今天幾點起床的？
lines.pinyin: zǎo ān! nǐ jīn tiān jǐ diǎn qǐ chuáng de?
lines.english: Good morning! What time did you get up today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我早上六點半起床。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ zǎo shang liù diǎn bàn qǐ chuáng. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I got up at 6:30 AM. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我每天七點起床。
lines.pinyin: wǒ měi tiān qī diǎn qǐ chuáng.
lines.english: I get up at seven every day.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你幾點吃早飯？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jǐ diǎn chī zǎo fàn?
lines.english: What time do you eat breakfast?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 七點一刻吃早飯，然後七點半出門。
lines.pinyin: qī diǎn yī kè chī zǎo fàn, rán hòu qī diǎn bàn chū mén.
lines.english: I eat breakfast at 7:15, then leave at 7:30.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那麼早！你幾點開始上班？
lines.pinyin: nà me zǎo! nǐ jǐ diǎn kāi shǐ shàng bān?
lines.english: That early! What time do you start work?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我八點上班，所以我要準時出門。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bā diǎn shàng bān, suǒ yǐ wǒ yào zhǔn shí chū mén.
lines.english: I start work at eight, so I have to leave on time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你下班以後通常做什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xià bān yǐ hòu tōng cháng zuò shén me?
lines.english: What do you usually do after work?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我下午五點下班，然後回家休息。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xià wǔ wǔ diǎn xià bān, rán hòu huí jiā xiū xi.
lines.english: I get off work at 5 PM, then come home to rest.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 晚上幾點睡覺？
lines.pinyin: wǎn shang jǐ diǎn shuì jiào?
lines.english: What time do you sleep at night?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 晚上十一點睡覺。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǎn shang shí yī diǎn shuì jiào. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I sleep at eleven. And you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我比較晚睡，通常十二點才睡。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bǐ jiào wǎn shuì, tōng cháng shí èr diǎn cái shuì.
lines.english: I sleep later, usually not until midnight.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這樣你不累嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè yàng nǐ bù lèi ma?
lines.english: Aren't you tired like that?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有時候很累，但是我晚上空閒比較多。
lines.pinyin: yǒu shí hòu hěn lèi, dàn shì wǒ wǎn shang kōng xián bǐ jiào duō.
lines.english: Sometimes very tired, but I have more free time in the evenings.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你明天有什麼計劃？
lines.pinyin: nǐ míng tiān yǒu shén me jì huà?
lines.english: What plans do you have tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 明天我要去跑步，然後吃早午餐。
lines.pinyin: míng tiān wǒ yào qù pǎo bù, rán hòu chī zǎo wǔ cān.
lines.english: Tomorrow I'm going running, then having brunch.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 幾點去跑步？
lines.pinyin: jǐ diǎn qù pǎo bù?
lines.english: What time are you going running?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上八點開始跑步。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang bā diǎn kāi shǐ pǎo bù.
lines.english: Starting at 8 AM.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也可以一起去嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě kě yǐ yì qǐ qù ma?
lines.english: Can I go together with you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 當然可以！那我們明天見。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ! nà wǒ men míng tiān jiàn.
lines.english: Of course! See you tomorrow then.

dialogueSections.title: Making an Appointment
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues arrange a meeting time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你好，我想和你約個時間開會。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng hé nǐ yuē gè shí jiān kāi huì.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to arrange a meeting time with you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，你什麼時候有空閒？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, nǐ shén me shí hòu yǒu kōng xián?
lines.english: Okay, when do you have free time?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我今天下午兩點到四點有空。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jīn tiān xià wǔ liǎng diǎn dào sì diǎn yǒu kōng.
lines.english: I'm free this afternoon from 2 to 4.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不好意思，我今天下午很忙。
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, wǒ jīn tiān xià wǔ hěn máng.
lines.english: Sorry, I'm very busy this afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那明天上午呢？
lines.pinyin: nà míng tiān shàng wǔ ne?
lines.english: What about tomorrow morning?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 明天上午我有個會議，大概十點結束。
lines.pinyin: míng tiān shàng wǔ wǒ yǒu gè huì yì, dà gài shí diǎn jié shù.
lines.english: I have a meeting tomorrow morning, it ends at about 10.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那十點半可以嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà shí diǎn bàn kě yǐ ma?
lines.english: How about 10:30?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 十點半可以，但是你要準時。
lines.pinyin: shí diǎn bàn kě yǐ, dàn shì nǐ yào zhǔn shí.
lines.english: 10:30 is fine, but you need to be on time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我一定準時，我不會遲到的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yī dìng zhǔn shí, wǒ bù huì chí dào de.
lines.english: I will definitely be on time, I won't be late.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，那我們明天上午十點半見。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, nà wǒ men míng tiān shàng wǔ shí diǎn bàn jiàn.
lines.english: Good, so we'll meet tomorrow morning at 10:30.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 在哪個辦公室開會？
lines.pinyin: zài nǎ gè bàn gōng shì kāi huì?
lines.english: Which office are we meeting in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在我的辦公室，三樓三零一室。
lines.pinyin: zài wǒ de bàn gōng shì, sān lóu sān líng yī shì.
lines.english: In my office, Room 301 on the third floor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，我記下來了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ jì xià lái le.
lines.english: Okay, I've noted it down.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 會議大概要多長時間？
lines.pinyin: huì yì dà gài yào duō cháng shí jiān?
lines.english: How long will the meeting take approximately?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大概一個小時，十一點半結束。
lines.pinyin: dà gài yī gè xiǎo shí, shí yī diǎn bàn jié shù.
lines.english: About one hour, ending at 11:30.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，那中午我們可以一起去吃午餐。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, nà zhōng wǔ wǒ men kě yǐ yì qǐ qù chī wǔ cān.
lines.english: Okay, then at noon we can go have lunch together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了！我很期待明天的會議。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! wǒ hěn qī dài míng tiān de huì yì.
lines.english: Great! I'm really looking forward to tomorrow's meeting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也是。那我先把日程表更新一下。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì. nà wǒ xiān bǎ rì chéng biǎo gēng xīn yī xià.
lines.english: Me too. Let me update the schedule first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，明天見！
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, míng tiān jiàn!
lines.english: Okay, see you tomorrow!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 明天見，不要遲到！
lines.pinyin: míng tiān jiàn, bù yào chí dào!
lines.english: See you tomorrow, don't be late!

dialogueSections.title: A Busy Week
dialogueSections.scene: Friends talk about their weekly schedules.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你這個星期很忙嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zhè gè xīng qī hěn máng ma?
lines.english: Are you very busy this week?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 非常忙！每天都有很多事情要做。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng máng! měi tiān dōu yǒu hěn duō shì qíng yào zuò.
lines.english: Very busy! Every day there are many things to do.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你每天幾點上班？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi tiān jǐ diǎn shàng bān?
lines.english: What time do you go to work every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我週一到週五都是早上九點上班。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhōu yī dào zhōu wǔ dōu shì zǎo shang jiǔ diǎn shàng bān.
lines.english: Monday to Friday I start work at 9 AM.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你通常幾點下班？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ tōng cháng jǐ diǎn xià bān?
lines.english: When do you usually get off work?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 通常下午六點，但是這週可能要加班到八點。
lines.pinyin: tōng cháng xià wǔ liù diǎn, dàn shì zhè zhōu kě néng yào jiā bān dào bā diǎn.
lines.english: Usually at 6 PM, but this week I might have to work overtime until 8.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你晚上幾點吃飯？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ wǎn shang jǐ diǎn chī fàn?
lines.english: What time do you eat dinner?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 今天估計晚上九點才能吃飯。
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān gū jì wǎn shang jiǔ diǎn cái néng chī fàn.
lines.english: Today I estimate I won't be able to eat until nine at night.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你幾點睡覺？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ jǐ diǎn shuì jiào?
lines.english: What time do you go to sleep?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 可能凌晨一點。這週真的很累。
lines.pinyin: kě néng líng chén yī diǎn. zhè zhōu zhēn de hěn lèi.
lines.english: Maybe 1 AM. This week is really tiring.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有時間休息嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu shí jiān xiū xi ma?
lines.english: Do you have time to rest?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 中午休息一個小時，其他時間都在工作。
lines.pinyin: zhōng wǔ xiū xi yī gè xiǎo shí, qí tā shí jiān dōu zài gōng zuò.
lines.english: One hour of rest at noon, all other time is working.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 週末你做什麼？
lines.pinyin: zhōu mò nǐ zuò shén me?
lines.english: What do you do on weekends?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週末我要補眠，一直睡到中午。
lines.pinyin: zhōu mò wǒ yào bǔ mián, yī zhí shuì dào zhōng wǔ.
lines.english: On weekends I catch up on sleep, sleeping until noon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哈哈！那你下週的日程表怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: hā hā! nà nǐ xià zhōu de rì chéng biǎo zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Haha! What's your schedule like next week?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 下週好一點，時間比較多。
lines.pinyin: xià zhōu hǎo yī diǎn, shí jiān bǐ jiào duō.
lines.english: Next week is better, there's more time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我們約個時間吃飯吧！
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men yuē gè shí jiān chī fàn ba!
lines.english: Then let's schedule time to eat together!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊！下週三下午你有空閒嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo a! xià zhōu sān xià wǔ nǐ yǒu kōng xián ma?
lines.english: Sure! Do you have free time Wednesday afternoon next week?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 下週三下午我有空，幾點？
lines.pinyin: xià zhōu sān xià wǔ wǒ yǒu kōng, jǐ diǎn?
lines.english: I'm free Wednesday afternoon, what time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 下午五點半，在學校附近的餐廳。
lines.pinyin: xià wǔ wǔ diǎn bàn, zài xué xiào fù jìn de cān tīng.
lines.english: 5:30 PM, at the restaurant near school.

text.zh: 每個人都有自己的生活節奏。
text.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu yǒu zì jǐ de shēng huó jié zòu.
text.english: Everyone has their own pace of life.

text.zh: 有的人喜歡早起，有的人喜歡晚睡。
text.pinyin: yǒu de rén xǐ huān zǎo qǐ, yǒu de rén xǐ huān wǎn shuì.
text.english: Some people like to get up early, others like to stay up late.

text.zh: 安排好時間，生活會更有效率。
text.pinyin: ān pái hǎo shí jiān, shēng huó huì gèng yǒu xiào lǜ.
text.english: Arranging time well makes life more efficient.

comprehension.question: What does everyone have?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個人都有什麼？
options: 很多錢 A lot of money
自己的生活節奏 Own pace of life

comprehension.question: Who likes to get up early?
comprehension.questionZh: 誰喜歡早起？

comprehension.question: What can make life more efficient?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以讓生活更有效率？
options: 安排好時間 Arrange time well
