title: Weather & Seasons
description: Learn how to describe the weather and the four seasons.

dialogueSections.title: Today's Weather
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends discuss today's weather before going out.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 今天天氣怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān tiān qì zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How is the weather today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上是晴天，但是現在開始陰天了。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang shì qíng tiān, dàn shì xiàn zài kāi shǐ yīn tiān le.
lines.english: It was sunny this morning, but now it's getting cloudy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 天氣預報說今天會下雨嗎？
lines.pinyin: tiān qì yù bào shuō jīn tiān huì xià yǔ ma?
lines.english: Does the weather forecast say it will rain today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 說下午可能會下雨，你帶傘了嗎？
lines.pinyin: shuō xià wǔ kě néng huì xià yǔ, nǐ dài sǎn le ma?
lines.english: It says it might rain in the afternoon, did you bring an umbrella?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我沒有帶傘。現在溫度幾度？
lines.pinyin: wǒ méi yǒu dài sǎn. xiàn zài wēn dù jǐ dù?
lines.english: I didn't bring an umbrella. What's the temperature now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 現在大概二十五度，還算涼快。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài dà gài èr shí wǔ dù, hái suàn liáng kuai.
lines.english: About 25 degrees now, still quite cool.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 台灣的夏天很熱吧？
lines.pinyin: táiwān de xià tiān hěn rè ba?
lines.english: Taiwan's summer is very hot, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 非常熱！有時候超過三十五度。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng rè! yǒu shí hòu chāo guò sān shí wǔ dù.
lines.english: Very hot! Sometimes it exceeds 35 degrees.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 而且台灣的夏天很潮濕。
lines.pinyin: ér qiě táiwān de xià tiān hěn cháo shī.
lines.english: And Taiwan's summer is very humid.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，又熱又潮濕，很不舒適。
lines.pinyin: duì, yòu rè yòu cháo shī, hěn bù shū shì.
lines.english: Right, both hot and humid, very uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那哪個季節最舒適？
lines.pinyin: nà nǎ gè jì jié zuì shū shì?
lines.english: Which season is the most comfortable?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我覺得秋天最舒適，涼快又乾燥。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de qiū tiān zuì shū shì, liáng kuai yòu gān zào.
lines.english: I think autumn is the most comfortable, cool and dry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡春天，天氣溫暖，花很漂亮。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan chūn tiān, tiān qì wēn nuǎn, huā hěn piào liang.
lines.english: I like spring, the weather is warm and flowers are beautiful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 春天也不錯，但是有時候會下雨。
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān yě bú cuò, dàn shì yǒu shí hòu huì xià yǔ.
lines.english: Spring is also nice, but sometimes it rains.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 冬天你們這裡會下雪嗎？
lines.pinyin: dōng tiān nǐ men zhè lǐ huì xià xuě ma?
lines.english: Does it snow here in winter?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 台北很少下雪，但是山上會下雪。
lines.pinyin: táiběi hěn shǎo xià xuě, dàn shì shān shàng huì xià xuě.
lines.english: It rarely snows in Taipei, but it snows on the mountains.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了！我很想看雪。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! wǒ hěn xiǎng kàn xuě.
lines.english: That's great! I really want to see snow.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們可以去陽明山，那裡有時候會下雪。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ qù yáng míng shān, nà lǐ yǒu shí hòu huì xià xuě.
lines.english: We can go to Yangmingshan, it sometimes snows there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好！我們今天先去，但是要帶傘。
lines.pinyin: hǎo! wǒ men jīn tiān xiān qù, dàn shì yào dài sǎn.
lines.english: Okay! Let's go today, but we need to bring umbrellas.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，我有兩把傘，給你一把。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ yǒu liǎng bǎ sǎn, gěi nǐ yī bǎ.
lines.english: No problem, I have two umbrellas, I'll give you one.

dialogueSections.title: Favorite Season
dialogueSections.scene: Students discuss their favorite seasons and why.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你最喜歡哪個季節？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì xǐ huan nǎ gè jì jié?
lines.english: What is your favorite season?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我最喜歡冬天，你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuì xǐ huan dōng tiān, nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like winter the most, how about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 為什麼喜歡冬天？冬天很冷啊！
lines.pinyin: wèi shén me xǐ huan dōng tiān? dōng tiān hěn lěng a!
lines.english: Why do you like winter? Winter is very cold!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 因為冬天可以喝熱飲，也可以看雪。
lines.pinyin: yīn wèi dōng tiān kě yǐ hē rè yǐn, yě kě yǐ kàn xuě.
lines.english: Because in winter you can drink hot drinks and also see snow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我比較喜歡夏天，可以去游泳。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan xià tiān, kě yǐ qù yóu yǒng.
lines.english: I prefer summer, I can go swimming.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 夏天不是很熱嗎？太陽很大。
lines.pinyin: xià tiān bù shì hěn rè ma? tài yáng hěn dà.
lines.english: Isn't it very hot in summer? The sun is very strong.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡熱的天氣，不怕熱。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan rè de tiān qì, bù pà rè.
lines.english: I like hot weather, I'm not afraid of heat.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 台灣夏天的氣候很特別，又熱又潮濕。
lines.pinyin: táiwān xià tiān de qì hòu hěn tè bié, yòu rè yòu cháo shī.
lines.english: Taiwan's summer climate is special, both hot and humid.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，而且雨季在夏天，常常下雨。
lines.pinyin: shì a, ér qiě yǔ jì zài xià tiān, cháng cháng xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, and the rainy season is in summer, it often rains.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我最怕颱風，台灣夏天常有颱風。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuì pà tái fēng, táiwān xià tiān cháng yǒu tái fēng.
lines.english: I'm most afraid of typhoons, Taiwan often has typhoons in summer.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 颱風來的時候很危險，刮大風下大雨。
lines.pinyin: tái fēng lái de shí hòu hěn wēi xiǎn, guā dà fēng xià dà yǔ.
lines.english: It's very dangerous when typhoons come, with strong winds and heavy rain.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 所以我覺得秋天更好，天晴又涼快。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ wǒ jué de qiū tiān gèng hǎo, tiān qíng yòu liáng kuai.
lines.english: So I think autumn is better, clear skies and cool.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 秋天的溫度最舒適，大概二十度。
lines.pinyin: qiū tiān de wēn dù zuì shū shì, dà gài èr shí dù.
lines.english: Autumn's temperature is the most comfortable, about 20 degrees.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，不冷不熱，很完美。
lines.pinyin: duì, bù lěng bù rè, hěn wán měi.
lines.english: Right, neither cold nor hot, very perfect.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 春天的天氣怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān de tiān qì zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How is the weather in spring?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 春天溫暖，但是有時候會下雨和刮風。
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān wēn nuǎn, dàn shì yǒu shí hòu huì xià yǔ hé guā fēng.
lines.english: Spring is warm, but sometimes it rains and gets windy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不管哪個季節，台灣的天氣都很特別。
lines.pinyin: bù guǎn nǎ gè jì jié, táiwān de tiān qì dōu hěn tè bié.
lines.english: Regardless of the season, Taiwan's weather is always special.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，這也是台灣很有趣的地方。
lines.pinyin: shì a, zhè yě shì táiwān hěn yǒu qù de dì fāng.
lines.english: Yes, that's also what makes Taiwan interesting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你在家鄉的氣候跟台灣一樣嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zài jiā xiāng de qì hòu gēn táiwān yī yàng ma?
lines.english: Is the climate in your hometown like Taiwan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不一樣，我的家鄉冬天下很多雪。
lines.pinyin: bù yī yàng, wǒ de jiā xiāng dōng tiān xià hěn duō xuě.
lines.english: No, my hometown has lots of snow in winter.

dialogueSections.title: Weather Forecast Discussion
dialogueSections.scene: Two people discuss the weather forecast for the weekend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看了週末的天氣預報嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn le zhōu mò de tiān qì yù bào ma?
lines.english: Did you check the weekend weather forecast?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 看了，週六晴天，週日可能下雨。
lines.pinyin: kàn le, zhōu liù qíng tiān, zhōu rì kě néng xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, Saturday is sunny, Sunday it might rain.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 溫度大概幾度？
lines.pinyin: wēn dù dà gài jǐ dù?
lines.english: What's the approximate temperature?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週六白天大概二十八度，晚上涼一點。
lines.pinyin: zhōu liù bái tiān dà gài èr shí bā dù, wǎn shang liáng yī diǎn.
lines.english: Saturday daytime about 28 degrees, cooler in the evening.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 二十八度感覺有點熱。
lines.pinyin: èr shí bā dù gǎn jué yǒu diǎn rè.
lines.english: 28 degrees feels a bit hot.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 但是會有風，感覺會涼快一些。
lines.pinyin: dàn shì huì yǒu fēng, gǎn jué huì liáng kuai yī xiē.
lines.english: But there will be wind, so it'll feel a bit cooler.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那週日的天氣呢？
lines.pinyin: nà zhōu rì de tiān qì ne?
lines.english: What about Sunday's weather?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週日陰天，下午有雨，溫度比較低，只有二十三度。
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì yīn tiān, xià wǔ yǒu yǔ, wēn dù bǐ jiào dī, zhǐ yǒu èr shí sān dù.
lines.english: Sunday is cloudy, rain in the afternoon, lower temperature, only 23 degrees.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我週六想去爬山，天晴應該不錯。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhōu liù xiǎng qù pá shān, tiān qíng yīng gāi bú cuò.
lines.english: I want to go hiking Saturday, clear sky should be nice.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是個好主意！要帶夠水，因為天氣熱。
lines.pinyin: shì gè hǎo zhǔ yì! yào dài gòu shuǐ, yīn wèi tiān qì rè.
lines.english: That's a good idea! Bring enough water because of the hot weather.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我也要穿涼一點的衣服。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě yào chuān liáng yī diǎn de yī fu.
lines.english: Right, I should also wear cooler clothes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週日你做什麼？要帶傘嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì nǐ zuò shén me? yào dài sǎn ma?
lines.english: What are you doing Sunday? Do I need to bring an umbrella?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 週日在家休息，反正要下雨。
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì zài jiā xiū xi, fǎn zhèng yào xià yǔ.
lines.english: Staying home to rest Sunday, since it's going to rain.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我週日有個約會，希望雨不要太大。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhōu rì yǒu gè yuē huì, xī wàng yǔ bù yào tài dà.
lines.english: I have a date Sunday, hope the rain won't be too heavy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你一定要帶傘，還有穿溫暖一點。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yī dìng yào dài sǎn, hái yǒu chuān wēn nuǎn yī diǎn.
lines.english: You must bring an umbrella, and dress a bit warmer.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝你提醒我。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie nǐ tí xǐng wǒ.
lines.english: Okay, thanks for reminding me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 台灣的天氣有時候很難預測。
lines.pinyin: táiwān de tiān qì yǒu shí hòu hěn nán yù cè.
lines.english: Taiwan's weather is sometimes hard to predict.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，早上晴天，下午可能突然下雨。
lines.pinyin: shì a, zǎo shang qíng tiān, xià wǔ kě néng tū rán xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, sunny in the morning, then sudden rain in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 所以最好每天都帶傘出門。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ zuì hǎo měi tiān dōu dài sǎn chū mén.
lines.english: So it's best to bring an umbrella every day you go out.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你說得對！傘是台灣人的必備物品。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shuō de duì! sǎn shì táiwān rén de bì bèi wù pǐn.
lines.english: You're right! An umbrella is a must-have for people in Taiwan.

text.zh: 一年有四個季節：春夏秋冬。
text.pinyin: yì nián yǒu sì gè jì jié: chūn xià qiū dōng.
text.english: A year has four seasons: spring, summer, autumn, and winter.

text.zh: 每個季節的天氣都不一樣。
text.pinyin: měi gè jì jié de tiān qì dōu bù yī yàng.
text.english: The weather in each season is different.

text.zh: 你可以在不同的季節做不同的活動。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zài bù tóng de jì jié zuò bù tóng de huó dòng.
text.english: You can do different activities in different seasons.

comprehension.question: How many seasons are in a year?
comprehension.questionZh: 一年有幾個季節？

comprehension.question: Is the weather the same in every season?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個季節的天氣都一樣嗎？
options: 只有夏天一樣 Only summer is same

comprehension.question: What can you do in different seasons?
comprehension.questionZh: 在不同季節可以做什麼？
options: 什麼都不能做 Can't do anything

questions.question: What do you do if it's going to rain?

title: Hobbies & Interests
description: Learn how to talk about what you like to do in your free time.

dialogueSections.title: Weekend Hobbies
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends share what they like to do on weekends.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你週末通常做什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zhōu mò tōng cháng zuò shén me?
lines.english: What do you usually do on weekends?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我喜歡在家看書或是聽音樂。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan zài jiā kàn shū huò shì tīng yīn yuè. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like to read books or listen to music at home. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡運動，週末去跑步或游泳。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan yùn dòng, zhōu mò qù pǎo bù huò yóu yǒng.
lines.english: I like sports, on weekends I go running or swimming.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你每週都去游泳嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi zhōu dōu qù yóu yǒng ma?
lines.english: Do you go swimming every week?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 差不多，游泳是我最喜歡的運動。
lines.pinyin: chà bù duō, yóu yǒng shì wǒ zuì xǐ huan de yùn dòng.
lines.english: More or less, swimming is my favorite sport.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我不太會游泳，我比較喜歡打球。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù tài huì yóu yǒng, wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan dǎ qiú.
lines.english: I'm not very good at swimming, I prefer playing ball sports.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你打什麼球？
lines.pinyin: nǐ dǎ shén me qiú?
lines.english: What ball sports do you play?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我打籃球，也喜歡打羽毛球。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ lán qiú, yě xǐ huan dǎ yǔ máo qiú.
lines.english: I play basketball, and I also like badminton.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了運動，你還有什麼愛好？
lines.pinyin: chú le yùn dòng, nǐ hái yǒu shén me ài hào?
lines.english: Besides sports, what other hobbies do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我很喜歡攝影，每次旅遊都帶相機。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hěn xǐ huan shè yǐng, měi cì lǚ yóu dōu dài xiàng jī.
lines.english: I really like photography, I always bring a camera when traveling.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你一定拍了很多漂亮的照片！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yī dìng pāi le hěn duō piào liang de zhào piàn!
lines.english: You must have taken many beautiful photos!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的！旅遊是我最大的興趣。你呢？
lines.pinyin: shì de! lǚ yóu shì wǒ zuì dà de xìng qù. nǐ ne?
lines.english: Yes! Travel is my greatest interest. What about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我除了游泳，還喜歡烹飪。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chú le yóu yǒng, hái xǐ huan pēng rèn.
lines.english: Besides swimming, I also like cooking.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇！你會做什麼菜？
lines.pinyin: wā! nǐ huì zuò shén me cài?
lines.english: Wow! What dishes can you make?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會做中式和日式料理，也喜歡烤蛋糕。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì zuò zhōng shì hé rì shì liào lǐ, yě xǐ huan kǎo dàn gāo.
lines.english: I can make Chinese and Japanese cuisine, and I also like baking cakes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 真厲害！你有沒有其他才藝？
lines.pinyin: zhēn lì hài! nǐ yǒu méi yǒu qí tā cái yì?
lines.english: Impressive! Do you have any other talents?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會彈鋼琴，從小就學了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì tán gāng qín, cóng xiǎo jiù xué le.
lines.english: I can play piano, I've been learning since I was young.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你的興趣真的很多！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ de xìng qù zhēn de hěn duō!
lines.english: You really have many interests!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我覺得有興趣愛好，生活更豐富。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ jué de yǒu xìng qù ài hào, shēng huó gèng fēng fù.
lines.english: Right, I think having hobbies makes life more enriching.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我同意！下週我們一起去爬山怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóng yì! xià zhōu wǒ men yì qǐ qù pá shān zěn me yàng?
lines.english: I agree! How about we go hiking together next week?

dialogueSections.title: Joining a Club
dialogueSections.scene: A student considers joining a school club.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你在學校有參加什麼社團嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zài xué xiào yǒu cān jiā shén me shè tuán ma?
lines.english: Have you joined any clubs at school?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我參加了攝影社和籃球社。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ cān jiā le shè yǐng shè hé lán qiú shè.
lines.english: Yes, I joined the photography club and basketball club.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽起來很有趣！你喜歡哪一個？
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn yǒu qù! nǐ xǐ huan nǎ yī gè?
lines.english: That sounds fun! Which one do you like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 兩個都喜歡！攝影社讓我學到很多技術。
lines.pinyin: liǎng gè dōu xǐ huan! shè yǐng shè ràng wǒ xué dào hěn duō jì shù.
lines.english: I like both! The photography club taught me many techniques.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也想加入一個社團，你有推薦嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng jiā rù yī gè shè tuán, nǐ yǒu tuī jiàn ma?
lines.english: I also want to join a club, do you have any recommendations?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你喜歡什麼？音樂、運動還是藝術？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xǐ huan shén me? yīn yuè, yùn dòng hái shì yì shù?
lines.english: What do you like? Music, sports, or art?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡音樂，特別是唱歌。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan yīn yuè, tè bié shì chàng gē.
lines.english: I like music, especially singing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你可以加入合唱團！他們週三練習。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ kě yǐ jiā rù hé chàng tuán! tā men zhōu sān liàn xí.
lines.english: Then you can join the choir! They practice on Wednesdays.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 合唱團！我一直想學，但是不知道自己唱得好不好。
lines.pinyin: hé chàng tuán! wǒ yī zhí xiǎng xué, dàn shì bù zhī dào zì jǐ chàng de hǎo bù hǎo.
lines.english: The choir! I've always wanted to learn, but don't know if I sing well enough.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你可以先去聽聽看，不需要立刻決定加入。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ xiān qù tīng tīng kàn, bù xū yào lì kè jué dìng jiā rù.
lines.english: You can go listen first, no need to decide immediately.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意！那你有沒有舞蹈社？
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì! nà nǐ yǒu méi yǒu wǔ dǎo shè?
lines.english: Good idea! Is there a dance club?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，舞蹈社很受歡迎，很多同學想加入。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǔ dǎo shè hěn shòu huān yíng, hěn duō tóng xué xiǎng jiā rù.
lines.english: Yes, the dance club is very popular, many students want to join.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也很喜歡跳舞，尤其是現代舞。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě hěn xǐ huan tiào wǔ, yóu qí shì xiàn dài wǔ.
lines.english: I also really like dancing, especially modern dance.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你可以同時加入合唱團和舞蹈社！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ kě yǐ tóng shí jiā rù hé chàng tuán hé wǔ dǎo shè!
lines.english: Then you can join both the choir and dance club at the same time!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 兩個都加入，時間夠嗎？
lines.pinyin: liǎng gè dōu jiā rù, shí jiān gòu ma?
lines.english: Joining both, will there be enough time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要安排好時間，應該沒問題。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào ān pái hǎo shí jiān, yīng gāi méi wèn tí.
lines.english: As long as you manage your time well, it should be fine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 社團活動對學生有很多好處，對嗎？
lines.pinyin: shè tuán huó dòng duì xué shēng yǒu hěn duō hǎo chù, duì ma?
lines.english: Club activities have many benefits for students, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對！可以結交朋友，也可以發展才藝。
lines.pinyin: duì! kě yǐ jié jiāo péng you, yě kě yǐ fā zhǎn cái yì.
lines.english: Right! You can make friends and also develop your talents.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還有放鬆心情，不讓學習太緊張。
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu fàng sōng xīn qíng, bù ràng xué xí tài jǐn zhāng.
lines.english: Also to relax, so studying isn't too stressful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 說得對！我明天帶你去看社團介紹。
lines.pinyin: shuō de duì! wǒ míng tiān dài nǐ qù kàn shè tuán jiè shào.
lines.english: Well said! I'll take you to see the club introductions tomorrow.

dialogueSections.title: Comparing Hobbies
dialogueSections.scene: Two people discuss and compare their different hobbies and interests.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對什麼有興趣？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì shén me yǒu xìng qù?
lines.english: What are you interested in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我對藝術很有興趣，特別是畫畫。
lines.pinyin: wǒ duì yì shù hěn yǒu xìng qù, tè bié shì huà huà.
lines.english: I'm very interested in art, especially drawing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你畫什麼？風景還是人物？
lines.pinyin: nǐ huà shén me? fēng jǐng hái shì rén wù?
lines.english: What do you draw? Landscapes or people?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 兩種都畫，不過我比較喜歡畫風景。
lines.pinyin: liǎng zhǒng dōu huà, bù guò wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan huà fēng jǐng.
lines.english: Both, but I prefer drawing landscapes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你平時有去上繪畫課嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ píng shí yǒu qù shàng huì huà kè ma?
lines.english: Do you take drawing classes?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我每週六去上興趣班。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ měi zhōu liù qù shàng xìng qù bān.
lines.english: Yes, I go to an interest class every Saturday.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了畫畫，你還有什麼休閒活動？
lines.pinyin: chú le huà huà, nǐ hái yǒu shén me xiū xián huó dòng?
lines.english: Besides drawing, what other leisure activities do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我喜歡看電影，也喜歡玩遊戲. 你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan kàn diàn yǐng, yě xǐ huan wán yóu xì. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like watching movies, and I also like playing games. What about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的興趣是學語言，現在在學日文。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de xìng qù shì xué yǔ yán, xiàn zài zài xué rì wén.
lines.english: My interest is learning languages, I'm currently learning Japanese.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，學語言需要很多耐心。
lines.pinyin: wā, xué yǔ yán xū yào hěn duō nài xīn.
lines.english: Wow, learning languages requires a lot of patience.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，但是很有成就感！
lines.pinyin: shì de, dàn shì hěn yǒu chéng jiù gǎn!
lines.english: Yes, but it's very satisfying!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你還學什麼語言？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hái xué shén me yǔ yán?
lines.english: What other languages do you learn?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我在學中文和日文，以後想學韓文。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zài xué zhōng wén hé rì wén, yǐ hòu xiǎng xué hán wén.
lines.english: I'm learning Chinese and Japanese, and want to learn Korean in the future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的學習能力很強！你有參加比賽嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de xué xí néng lì hěn qiáng! nǐ yǒu cān jiā bǐ sài ma?
lines.english: You have a strong learning ability! Have you participated in any competitions?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有，上個月參加了語言比賽，獲得第三名。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, shàng gè yuè cān jiā le yǔ yán bǐ sài, huò dé dì sān míng.
lines.english: Yes, last month I participated in a language competition and got third place.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 恭喜你！那你的興趣幫助了你的學習。
lines.pinyin: gōng xǐ nǐ! nà nǐ de xìng qù bāng zhù le nǐ de xué xí.
lines.english: Congratulations! Your interests helped with your studies.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，有興趣就有動力學習。
lines.pinyin: duì, yǒu xìng qù jiù yǒu dòng lì xué xí.
lines.english: Right, having interest gives you the motivation to learn.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也想找到一個讓我有動力的興趣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng zhǎo dào yī gè ràng wǒ yǒu dòng lì de xìng qù.
lines.english: I also want to find an interest that motivates me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 多嘗試，你一定可以找到！
lines.pinyin: duō cháng shì, nǐ yī dìng kě yǐ zhǎo dào!
lines.english: Try more things, you'll definitely find it!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的鼓勵！那我先去試試書法班。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de gǔ lì! nà wǒ xiān qù shì shì shū fǎ bān.
lines.english: Thank you for the encouragement! Then I'll try a calligraphy class first.

text.zh: 有愛好的人生活會更精彩。
text.pinyin: yǒu ài hào de rén shēng huó huì gèng jīng cǎi.
text.english: People with hobbies have more wonderful lives.

text.zh: 無論是運動還是藝術，都能讓人快樂。
text.pinyin: wú lùn shì yùn dòng hái shì yì shù, dōu néng ràng rén kuài lè.
text.english: Whether it's sports or art, it can make people happy.

text.zh: 你可以在週末和朋友一起分享你的興趣。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zài zhōu mò hé péng you yì qǐ fēn xiǎng nǐ de xìng qù.
text.english: You can share your interests with friends on weekends.

comprehension.question: Why is having a hobby good?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼有愛好很好？
options: 可以賺錢 Can make money
生活會更精彩 Life will be more wonderful
不用上學 No need for school

comprehension.question: What can make people happy?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以讓人快樂？
options: 運動與藝術 Sports and art

comprehension.question: When can you share interests with friends?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼時候可以跟朋友分享興趣？

questions.question: If someone 學語言, they are...

title: Health & Body
description: Learn basic body parts and how to talk about health.

dialogueSections.title: Not Feeling Well
dialogueSections.scene: A student tells their teacher they are sick.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老師，我今天不太舒服。
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī, wǒ jīn tiān bù tài shū fu.
lines.english: Teacher, I'm not feeling well today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你怎麼了？哪裡不舒服？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zěn me le? nǎ lǐ bù shū fu?
lines.english: What's wrong? Where do you feel unwell?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我頭很疼，喉嚨也不舒服。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóu hěn téng, hóu lóng yě bù shū fu.
lines.english: My head hurts a lot and my throat is also uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有發燒？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu fā shāo?
lines.english: Do you have a fever?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不知道，我沒有量體溫。
lines.pinyin: bù zhī dào, wǒ méi yǒu liáng tǐ wēn.
lines.english: I don't know, I haven't taken my temperature.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的臉色不好，看起來像感冒了。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de liǎn sè bù hǎo, kàn qǐ lái xiàng gǎn mào le.
lines.english: Your complexion doesn't look good, it looks like you have a cold.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，昨天晚上我就開始覺得不舒服。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zuó tiān wǎn shang wǒ jiù kāi shǐ jué de bù shū fu.
lines.english: Yes, last night I started feeling unwell.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有吃藥？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu chī yào?
lines.english: Did you take any medicine?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒有，我家裡沒有感冒藥。
lines.pinyin: méi yǒu, wǒ jiā lǐ méi yǒu gǎn mào yào.
lines.english: No, I don't have cold medicine at home.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你應該去看醫生，去掛號就診。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yīng gāi qù kàn yī shēng, qù guà hào jiù zhěn.
lines.english: Then you should go see a doctor, go register and get treated.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，醫院的門診幾點開始？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, yī yuàn de mén zhěn jǐ diǎn kāi shǐ?
lines.english: Okay, what time does the hospital's outpatient clinic open?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上八點開始，下午一點半也有。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang bā diǎn kāi shǐ, xià wǔ yī diǎn bàn yě yǒu.
lines.english: It opens at 8 AM, there's also afternoon at 1:30.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我先回去休息，下午去看病。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ xiān huí qù xiū xi, xià wǔ qù kàn bìng.
lines.english: Then I'll go home to rest first, then see the doctor in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，多喝水，好好休息。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, duō hē shuǐ, hǎo hǎo xiū xi.
lines.english: Okay, drink more water, get good rest.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝老師。我明天如果恢復了就來上課。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo shī. wǒ míng tiān rú guǒ huī fù le jiù lái shàng kè.
lines.english: Thank you teacher. If I recover tomorrow I'll come to class.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不用急，健康最重要。
lines.pinyin: bù yòng jí, jiàn kāng zuì zhòng yào.
lines.english: Don't rush, health is the most important thing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我明白了。我肚子也有一點不舒服。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ míng bái le. wǒ dù zi yě yǒu yī diǎn bù shū fu.
lines.english: Right, I understand. My stomach is also a bit uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那更要快點去看醫生，不要拖。
lines.pinyin: nà gèng yào kuài diǎn qù kàn yī shēng, bù yào tuō.
lines.english: Then you need to go see the doctor even sooner, don't delay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，我馬上去。謝謝老師關心。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ mǎ shàng qù. xiè xie lǎo shī guān xīn.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go right away. Thank you for caring, teacher.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 保重，希望你快點好起來！
lines.pinyin: bǎo zhòng, xī wàng nǐ kuài diǎn hǎo qǐ lái!
lines.english: Take care, I hope you recover quickly!

dialogueSections.title: At the Doctor's Office
dialogueSections.scene: A patient talks to a doctor at the clinic.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 醫生，您好。我最近身體不太好。
lines.pinyin: yī shēng, nín hǎo. wǒ zuì jìn shēn tǐ bù tài hǎo.
lines.english: Doctor, hello. I haven't been feeling well recently.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好，請坐。你有什麼症狀？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐng zuò. nǐ yǒu shén me zhèng zhuàng?
lines.english: Hello, please sit. What symptoms do you have?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我頭疼、發燒，喉嚨也很疼。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóu téng, fā shāo, hóu lóng yě hěn téng.
lines.english: I have a headache, fever, and my throat is very sore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 從什麼時候開始的？
lines.pinyin: cóng shén me shí hòu kāi shǐ de?
lines.english: When did it start?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大概三天前開始，越來越嚴重。
lines.pinyin: dà gài sān tiān qián kāi shǐ, yuè lái yuè yán zhòng.
lines.english: It started about three days ago and is getting worse.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我先量一下你的體溫。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiān liáng yī xià nǐ de tǐ wēn.
lines.english: Let me take your temperature first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的。我有過敏，對花粉過敏。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ yǒu guò mǐn, duì huā fěn guò mǐn.
lines.english: Okay. I have an allergy, I'm allergic to pollen.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 知道了。你的體溫是三十八度五，有發燒。
lines.pinyin: zhī dào le. nǐ de tǐ wēn shì sān shí bā dù wǔ, yǒu fā shāo.
lines.english: I see. Your temperature is 38.5°C, you have a fever.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的肩膀和脖子也很疼。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de jiān bǎng hé bó zi yě hěn téng.
lines.english: My shoulders and neck also hurt.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我看一下你的喉嚨。張開嘴巴說「啊」。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn yī xià nǐ de hóu lóng. zhāng kāi zuǐ ba shuō 'ā'.
lines.english: Let me look at your throat. Open your mouth and say 'ah'.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Ahhh...

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 喉嚨有發炎，你應該是感冒了。
lines.pinyin: hóu lóng yǒu fā yán, nǐ yīng gāi shì gǎn mào le.
lines.english: Your throat is inflamed, you likely have a cold.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 需要打針嗎？
lines.pinyin: xū yào dǎ zhēn ma?
lines.english: Do I need an injection?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不需要，我給你開藥就好了。
lines.pinyin: bù xū yào, wǒ gěi nǐ kāi yào jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: No need, I'll just prescribe medicine for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 要吃幾天的藥？
lines.pinyin: yào chī jǐ tiān de yào?
lines.english: How many days of medicine do I need?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 吃三天，每天三次，飯後服用。
lines.pinyin: chī sān tiān, měi tiān sān cì, fàn hòu fú yòng.
lines.english: Take it for three days, three times a day, after meals.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，需要再來複診嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xū yào zài lái fù zhěn ma?
lines.english: Okay, do I need to come back for a follow-up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果三天後還沒好，再來看我。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ sān tiān hòu hái méi hǎo, zài lái kàn wǒ.
lines.english: If you haven't recovered after three days, come see me again.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要多休息嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào duō xiū xi ma?
lines.english: Should I rest more?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，多休息、多喝水、不要吹冷氣。
lines.pinyin: shì de, duō xiū xi, duō hē shuǐ, bù yào chuī lěng qì.
lines.english: Yes, rest more, drink more water, and avoid air conditioning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝醫生，我希望快點恢復健康。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie yī shēng, wǒ xī wàng kuài diǎn huī fù jiàn kāng.
lines.english: Thank you doctor, I hope to recover my health quickly.

dialogueSections.title: Staying Healthy
dialogueSections.scene: Friends discuss how to stay healthy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看起來氣色很好，你怎麼保持健康？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn qǐ lái qì sè hěn hǎo, nǐ zěn me bǎo chí jiàn kāng?
lines.english: You look very healthy, how do you stay healthy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我每天運動、早睡早起，飲食也很均衡。
lines.pinyin: wǒ měi tiān yùn dòng, zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ, yǐn shí yě hěn jūn héng.
lines.english: I exercise every day, sleep and wake up early, and my diet is balanced.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你每天做什麼運動？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi tiān zuò shén me yùn dòng?
lines.english: What exercise do you do every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上跑步三十分鐘，晚上做瑜珈。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang pǎo bù sān shí fēn zhōng, wǎn shang zuò yú jiā.
lines.english: Morning run for 30 minutes, evening yoga.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的身體最近不太好，常常感冒。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de shēn tǐ zuì jìn bù tài hǎo, cháng cháng gǎn mào.
lines.english: My health hasn't been good recently, I often get colds.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你一定要多注意身體，多休息。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yī dìng yào duō zhù yì shēn tǐ, duō xiū xi.
lines.english: Then you definitely need to take better care of yourself and rest more.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我眼睛也常常疼，因為用電腦太多。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǎn jīng yě cháng cháng téng, yīn wèi yòng diàn nǎo tài duō.
lines.english: My eyes often hurt too, because I use the computer too much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你要讓眼睛休息，每隔一小時看遠一點。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yào ràng yǎn jīng xiū xi, měi gé yī xiǎo shí kàn yuǎn yī diǎn.
lines.english: Then you need to let your eyes rest, look into the distance every hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我的肩膀和背也常常疼。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ de jiān bǎng hé bèi yě cháng cháng téng.
lines.english: Right, my shoulders and back often hurt too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你需要做一些伸展運動，放鬆肌肉。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ xū yào zuò yī xiē shēn zhǎn yùn dòng, fàng sōng jī ròu.
lines.english: Then you need to do some stretching exercises to relax your muscles.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有沒有去看過醫生？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu qù kàn guò yī shēng?
lines.english: Have you ever gone to see a doctor?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我一年去一次，做健康檢查。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yī nián qù yī cì, zuò jiàn kāng jiǎn chá.
lines.english: I go once a year for a health checkup.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 健康檢查很重要，你都檢查哪些？
lines.pinyin: jiàn kāng jiǎn chá hěn zhòng yào, nǐ dōu jiǎn chá nǎ xiē?
lines.english: Health checkups are important, what do you check?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 血壓、血糖、視力還有一般的身體检查。
lines.pinyin: xuè yā, xuè táng, shì lì hái yǒu yī bān de shēn tǐ jiǎn chá.
lines.english: Blood pressure, blood sugar, vision, and general physical examination.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也應該去做一次，我很久沒檢查了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě yīng gāi qù zuò yī cì, wǒ hěn jiǔ méi jiǎn chá le.
lines.english: I should also go for one, I haven't had a checkup for a long time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 健康是最重要的財富！
lines.pinyin: jiàn kāng shì zuì zhòng yào de cái fù!
lines.english: Health is the most important wealth!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 說得對！我決定從今天開始運動。
lines.pinyin: shuō de duì! wǒ jué dìng cóng jīn tiān kāi shǐ yùn dòng.
lines.english: Well said! I've decided to start exercising from today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太棒了！你可以先從走路開始。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le! nǐ kě yǐ xiān cóng zǒu lù kāi shǐ.
lines.english: Excellent! You can start with walking first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，每天走三十分鐘。謝謝你的建議！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, měi tiān zǒu sān shí fēn zhōng. xiè xie nǐ de jiàn yì!
lines.english: Okay, walk for 30 minutes every day. Thank you for your advice!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！希望你的身體越來越好。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! xī wàng nǐ de shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.
lines.english: Keep it up! I hope your health gets better and better.

text.zh: 健康是最好的財富。
text.pinyin: jiàn kāng shì zuì hǎo de cái fù.
text.english: Health is the best wealth.

text.zh: 我們要多運動，也要吃健康的食物。
text.pinyin: wǒ men yào duō yùn dòng, yě yào chī jiàn kāng de shí wu.
text.english: We should exercise more and also eat healthy food.

text.zh: 生病時要聽醫生的話，好好休息。
text.pinyin: shēng bìng shí yào tīng yī shēng de huà, hǎo hǎo xiū xi.
text.english: When sick, listen to the doctor and rest well.

comprehension.question: What is the best wealth?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼是最好的財富？

comprehension.question: What should we do to be healthy?
comprehension.questionZh: 為了健康我們應該做什麼？
options: 多運動與吃健康食物 Exercise more and eat healthy

comprehension.question: What should you do when sick?
comprehension.questionZh: 生病時該怎麼辦？
options: 聽醫生的話並休息 Listen to doctor and rest

questions.question: How do you say 'I have a headache'?
If 體溫是三十九度, you...
The doctor says 多休息多喝水. What should you do?
options: Rest more and drink more water
questions.answer: Rest more and drink more water

questions.question: How do you say 'I need to see a doctor'?
If you have 過敏, you have...
Doctor says 飯後服用. When do you take the medicine?
Which body part is 肩膀?
How do you ask a doctor what's wrong?
If you 住院, you are...
How do you say 'health is most important'?

yī shēng gěi wǒ ___ le yī xiē yào.

yī shēng shuō yào dǎ ___, wǒ hěn pà.

The doctor prescribed medicine for me.

questions.question: Which body part is 耳朵?
If you 量體溫, you are...

yī shēng shuō chī sān ___ de yào.

yī shēng bāng wǒ ___ le yī xià hóu lóng.

title: Meeting Friends
description: Learn how to make plans and catch up with friends.

dialogue.title: Making Weekend Plans
dialogue.scene: Li Hua calls Zhang Wei to plan a weekend gathering.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 喂，張偉嗎？我是李華。
lines.pinyin: wéi, zhāng wěi ma? wǒ shì lǐ huá.
lines.english: Hello, is this Zhang Wei? This is Li Hua.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 嘿，李華！好久不見，最近怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: hēi, lǐ huá! hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn, zuì jìn zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Hey, Li Hua! Long time no see, how have you been lately?

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 不錯。這週末你有空嗎？我想找大家聚聚。
lines.pinyin: bú cuò. zhè zhōu mò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? wǒ xiǎng zhǎo dà jiā jù jù.
lines.english: Not bad. Are you free this weekend? I want to get everyone together.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 週六下午我有事，但週日整天都沒事。
lines.pinyin: zhōu liù xià wǔ wǒ yǒu shì, dàn zhōu rì zhěng tiān dōu méi shì.
lines.english: I'm busy Saturday afternoon, but I'm free all day Sunday.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 那正好，王明也說週日有空。
lines.pinyin: nà zhèng hǎo, wáng míng yě shuō zhōu rì yǒu kòng.
lines.english: That's perfect, Wang Ming also said he's free on Sunday.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 太好了！你有什麼好的建議嗎？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! nǐ yǒu shén me hǎo de jiàn yì ma?
lines.english: Great! Do you have any good suggestions?

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 我想去市中心新開的那家咖啡廳坐坐。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù shì zhōng xīn xīn kāi de nà jiā kā fēi tīng zuò zuò.
lines.english: I want to go sit at that new cafe that just opened in the city center.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 聽說那裡的蛋糕很好吃，我也想去。
lines.pinyin: tīng shuō nà lǐ de dàn gāo hěn hǎo chī, wǒ yě xiǎng qù.
lines.english: I heard the cakes there are delicious, I want to go too.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 那我們約下午兩點在那裡見面，好嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men yuē xià wǔ liǎng diǎn zài nà lǐ jiàn miàn, hǎo ma?
lines.english: Then shall we meet there at 2:00 PM?

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 兩點沒問題。要不要也叫上小林？
lines.pinyin: liǎng diǎn méi wèn tí. yào bú yào yě jiào shàng xiǎo lín?
lines.english: 2:00 is no problem. Should we also invite Xiao Lin?

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 好啊，我剛才給他傳訊息了，他還沒回。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ gāng cái gěi tā chuán xùn xí le, tā hái méi huí.
lines.english: Sure, I just sent him a message, he hasn't replied yet.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 他可能在忙，晚一點應該會回你。
lines.pinyin: tā kě néng zài máng, wǎn yì diǎn yīng gāi huì huí nǐ.
lines.english: He might be busy, he should get back to you later.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 那家咖啡廳在捷運站出口附近，很方便。
lines.pinyin: nà jiā kā fēi tīng zài jié yùn zhàn chū kǒu fù jìn, hěn fāng biàn.
lines.english: That cafe is near the MRT station exit, it's very convenient.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 我知道那個地方，離我家也不遠。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào nà gè dì fang, lí wǒ jiā yě bù yuǎn.
lines.english: I know that place, it's not far from my house either.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 那我們就這麼定了。週日下午兩點見。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men jiù zhè me dìng le. zhōu rì xià wǔ liǎng diǎn jiàn.
lines.english: Then it's settled. See you Sunday at 2:00 PM.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 沒問題，我一定準時到，不會遲到的。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ yí dìng zhǔn shí dào, bú huì chí dào de.
lines.english: No problem, I'll definitely be on time, I won't be late.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 哈哈，上次你可是遲到了半小時呢。
lines.pinyin: hā hā, shàng cì nǐ kě shì chí dào le bàn xiǎo shí ne.
lines.english: Haha, last time you were late for half an hour.

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 那是意外，這次絕對不會！
lines.pinyin: nà shì yì wài, zhè cì jué duì bú huì!
lines.english: That was an accident, definitely not this time!

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.zh: 好，我相信你。拜拜！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ xiāng xìn nǐ. bái bái!
lines.english: Okay, I believe you. Bye!

lines.speaker: Zhang Wei
lines.zh: 再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Goodbye!

text.zh: 好朋友需要經常聯繫。我們可以打電話或是傳訊息分享生活。
text.pinyin: hǎo péng you xū yào jīng cháng lián xì. wǒ men kě yǐ dǎ diàn huà huò shì chuán xùn xí fēn xiǎng shēng huó.
text.english: Good friends need to stay in touch often. We can call or message to share our lives.

text.zh: 放假的時候一起出去聚會，能讓感情更好。
text.pinyin: fàng jià de shí hou yì qǐ chū qù jù huì, néng ràng gǎn qíng gèng hǎo.
text.english: Going out for a gathering during holidays can strengthen the relationship.

text.zh: 準時參加約會是對朋友的基本尊重。
text.pinyin: zhǔn shí cān jiā yuē huì shì duì péng you de jī běn zūn zhòng.
text.english: Being on time for a date is a basic sign of respect for friends.

comprehension.question: What is a way to stay in touch with friends?
comprehension.questionZh: 聯繫朋友的一種方式是什麼？
options: 打電話或傳訊息 Call or message

comprehension.question: What can make friendships better?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以讓友情更好？

comprehension.question: What does being on time show?
comprehension.questionZh: 準時代表什麼？

exercises.sentencePinyin: zhè zhōu mò nǐ yǒu ___ ma?
wǒ men yuē zài kā fēi tīng ___.

exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ yí dìng zhǔn shí dào.
nǐ yǒu shén me jiàn yì ma?

exercises.english: I want to find everyone for a gathering.

title: Ordering at a Restaurant
description: Learn advanced ordering skills, including dietary preferences and complaints.

dialogue.title: Dinner with Specific Needs
dialogue.scene: A group of colleagues are having dinner, one has an allergy and another is vegetarian.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 您好，這是菜單，準備好可以隨時點餐。
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, zhè shì cài dān, zhǔn bèi hǎo kě yǐ suí shí diǎn cān.
lines.english: Hello, here is the menu, you can order anytime you're ready.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 請問你們有什麼推薦的招牌菜嗎？
lines.pinyin: qǐng wèn nǐ men yǒu shén me tuī jiàn de zhāo pái cài ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, do you have any recommended signature dishes?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 我們的糖醋排骨和宮保雞丁都很受歡迎。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men de táng cù pái gǔ hé gōng bǎo jī dīng dōu hěn shòu huān yíng.
lines.english: Our sweet and sour pork ribs and Kung Pao chicken are very popular.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 糟糕，我對花生過敏，宮保雞丁可以不放花生嗎？
lines.pinyin: zāo gāo, wǒ duì huā shēng guò mǐn, gōng bǎo jī dīng kě yǐ bù fàng huā shēng ma?
lines.english: Oh no, I'm allergic to peanuts. Can you make the Kung Pao chicken without peanuts?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 沒問題，我會特別告知廚房。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ huì tè bié gào zhī chú fáng.
lines.english: No problem, I will specifically inform the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Colleague C
lines.zh: 我是吃素的，請問有素食專區嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì chī sù de, qǐng wèn yǒu sù shí zhuān qū ma?
lines.english: I'm a vegetarian. Is there a vegetarian section?

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 有的，菜單最後一頁都是素食。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, cài dān zuì hòu yí yè dōu shì sù shí.
lines.english: Yes, the last page of the menu is all vegetarian.

lines.speaker: Colleague C
lines.zh: 那我要一份清炒時蔬和麻婆豆腐，豆腐不要肉末。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ yào yí fèn qīng chǎo shí shū hé má pó dòu fu, dòu fu bú yào ròu mò.
lines.english: Then I want a portion of stir-fried seasonal vegetables and Mapo Tofu, without minced meat in the tofu.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 好的，記下了。請問口味上有什麼要求嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, jì xià le. qǐng wèn kǒu wèi shàng yǒu shén me yāo qiú ma?
lines.english: Okay, noted. Any specific requirements for the flavor?

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 我們都不太能吃辣，菜請做微辣就好。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men dōu bú tài néng chī là, cài qǐng zuò wēi là jiù hǎo.
lines.english: None of us can eat very spicy food, please make the dishes mild spicy.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 好的，微辣。還需要主食嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wēi là. hái xū yào zhǔ shí ma?
lines.english: Okay, mild spicy. Do you need any staple foods?

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 先來三碗白飯。對了，上菜能快一點嗎？我們趕時間。
lines.pinyin: xiān lái sān wǎn bái fàn. duì le, shàng cài néng kuài yì diǎn ma? wǒ men gǎn shí jiān.
lines.english: Three bowls of white rice first. By the way, can you serve the dishes faster? We're in a hurry.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 我會儘快幫您催一下廚房。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì jǐn kuài bāng nín cuī yí xià chú fáng.
lines.english: I will urge the kitchen for you as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Colleague A (later)
lines.zh: 服務員，這道菜好像有點太鹹了。
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, zhè dào cài hǎo xiàng yǒu diǎn tài xián le.
lines.english: Waiter, this dish seems a bit too salty.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 真抱歉，我馬上請廚房重新做一份。
lines.pinyin: zhēn bào qiàn, wǒ mǎ shàng qǐng chú fáng chóng xīn zuò yí fèn.
lines.english: So sorry, I'll have the kitchen remake one right away.

lines.speaker: Colleague C
lines.zh: 不用了，給我們一碗熱水沖一下就好。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng le, gěi wǒ men yì wǎn rè shuǐ chōng yí xià jiù hǎo.
lines.english: No need, just give us a bowl of hot water to rinse it with.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 好的，真的非常抱歉。這道菜我們不收費。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhēn de fēi cháng bào qiàn. zhè dào cài wǒ men bù shōu fèi.
lines.english: Okay, truly very sorry. We won't charge for this dish.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 沒關係。最後我們想要打包這份剩菜。
lines.pinyin: méi guān xi. zuì hòu wǒ men xiǎng yào dǎ bāo zhè fèn shèng cài.
lines.english: It's fine. Finally, we'd like to pack up these leftovers.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.zh: 沒問題，請問需要發票嗎？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, qǐng wèn xū yào fā piào ma?
lines.english: No problem, do you need an invoice?

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 需要的，謝謝。一共多少錢？
lines.pinyin: xū yào de, xiè xie. yí gòng duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Yes, please, thanks. How much is it in total?

text.zh: 在台灣餐廳吃飯，有時候會收一成的服務費。
text.pinyin: zài tái wān cān tīng chī fàn, yǒu shí hou huì shōu yì chéng de fú wù fèi.
text.english: When eating at restaurants in Taiwan, sometimes a 10% service charge is collected.

text.zh: 如果你有過敏或忌口，點餐時一定要清楚告訴服務員。
text.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yǒu guò mǐn huò jì kǒu, diǎn cān shí yí dìng yào qīng chǔ gào sù fú wù yuán.
text.english: If you have allergies or dietary restrictions, you must tell the waiter clearly when ordering.

text.zh: 現在很多餐廳也提供外帶和打包服務，減少浪費。
text.pinyin: xiàn zài hěn duō cān tīng yě tí gōng wài dài hé dǎ bāo fú wù, jiǎn shǎo làng fèi.
text.english: Many restaurants now also provide takeout and leftover packing services to reduce waste.

comprehension.question: What is the common service charge in Taiwan?
comprehension.questionZh: 台灣餐廳通常收多少服務費？

comprehension.question: What should you do if you have an allergy?
comprehension.questionZh: 如果你過敏該怎麼辦？
options: 清楚告訴服務員 Tell waiter clearly

comprehension.question: Why is packing leftovers good?
comprehension.questionZh: 打包剩菜有什麼好處？
options: 可以多付錢 Can pay more
讓廚師高興 Make chef happy

exercises.sentence: 我對花生___，不能吃這道菜。
exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ duì huā shēng ___ , bù néng chī zhè dào cài.
fú wù yuán, qǐng bāng wǒ ___.

exercises.answerPinyin: nǐ men yǒu shén me zhāo pái cài?

title: Work & Career
description: Learn how to talk about your job, duties, and workplace interactions.

dialogue.title: A Day at the Office
dialogue.scene: Two colleagues are discussing their workload and an upcoming project.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 早安！你今天的會議準備好了嗎？
lines.pinyin: zǎo ān! nǐ jīn tiān de huì yì zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Good morning! Are you ready for today's meeting?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還沒呢，我還在寫下午要交的報告。
lines.pinyin: hái méi ne, wǒ hái zài xiě xià wǔ yào jiāo de bào gào.
lines.english: Not yet, I'm still writing the report that needs to be handed in this afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那個新專案是由你負責的嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà gè xīn zhuān àn shì yóu nǐ fù zé de ma?
lines.english: Are you in charge of that new project?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，壓力很大。老闆對這個專案非常重視。
lines.pinyin: duì, yā lì hěn dà. lǎo bǎn duì zhè gè zhuān àn fēi cháng zhòng shì.
lines.english: Yes, the pressure is high. The boss attaches great importance to this project.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我聽說下週你還要出差去上海？
lines.pinyin: wǒ tīng shuō xià zhōu nǐ hái yào chū chāi qù shàng hǎi?
lines.english: I heard you're also going on a business trip to Shanghai next week?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，要去那邊的分公司開會三天。
lines.pinyin: shì de, yào qù nà biān de fēn gōng sī kāi huì sān tiān.
lines.english: Yes, I have to go to the branch office there for meetings for three days.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那真的很辛苦。你最近常加班吧？
lines.pinyin: nà zhēn de hěn xīn kǔ. nǐ zuì jìn cháng jiā bān ba?
lines.english: That's really hard work. You've been working overtime a lot lately, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 為了趕進度，沒辦法。我也希望能早點休息。
lines.pinyin: wèi le gǎn jìn dù, méi bàn fǎ. wǒ yě xī wàng néng zǎo diǎn xiū xi.
lines.english: In order to catch up with the schedule, I have no choice. I also hope to rest earlier.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 等這個專案結束，你應該可以休假了。
lines.pinyin: děng zhè gè zhuān àn jié shù, nǐ yīng gāi kě yǐ xiū jià le.
lines.english: When this project is finished, you should be able to take a vacation.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 希望如此。對了，我們公司最近在招新人嗎？
lines.pinyin: xī wàng rú cǐ. duì le, wǒ men gōng sī zuì jìn zài zhāo xīn rén ma?
lines.english: I hope so. By the way, is our company hiring new people lately?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好像是，人事部昨天在面試幾個工程師。
lines.pinyin: hǎo xiàng shì, rén shì bù zuó tiān zài miàn shì jǐ gè gōng chéng shī.
lines.english: It seems so, the HR department was interviewing a few engineers yesterday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我正好有個朋友在找工作，他的專業很合適。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhèng hǎo yǒu gè péng you zài zhǎo gōng zuò, tā de zhuān yè hěn hé shì.
lines.english: I happen to have a friend looking for a job, his major is very suitable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你可以叫他把履歷寄過來試試看。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ kě yǐ jiào tā bǎ lǚ lì jì guò lái shì shì kàn.
lines.english: Then you can tell him to send his resume over and give it a try.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，這是一個很好的發展機會。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhè shì yí gè hěn hǎo de fā zhǎn jī huì.
lines.english: Okay, this is a very good development opportunity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們老闆雖然嚴格，但是薪水給得不錯。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men lǎo bǎn suī rán yán gé, dàn shì xīn shuǐ gěi de bú cuò.
lines.english: Although our boss is strict, the salary is quite good.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，而且這裡的同事都很專業，能學到很多東西。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, ér qiě zhè lǐ de tóng shì dōu hěn zhuān yè, néng xué dào hěn duō dōng xi.
lines.english: True, and the colleagues here are very professional, you can learn a lot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 加油！開會的時間快到了。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! kāi huì de shí jiān kuài dào le.
lines.english: Keep it up! The meeting time is almost here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，我準備一下就過去。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ zhǔn bèi yí xià jiù guò qù.
lines.english: Okay, I'll head over after preparing a bit.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 下午一起去喝杯咖啡放鬆一下吧。
lines.pinyin: xià wǔ yì qǐ qù hē bēi kā fēi fàng sōng yí xià ba.
lines.english: Let's go have a cup of coffee and relax together this afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，下午見。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, xià wǔ jiàn.
lines.english: No problem, see you this afternoon.

text.zh: 在忙碌的工作中，保持工作與生活的平衡非常重要。
text.pinyin: zài máng lù de gōng zuò zhōng, bǎo chí gōng zuò yǔ shēng huó de píng héng fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: In busy work, maintaining a balance between work and life is very important.

text.zh: 適當的休息能提高工作效率，也能讓身體更健康。
text.pinyin: shì dàng de xiū xi néng tí gāo gōng zuò xiào lǜ, yě néng ràng shēn tǐ gèng jiàn kāng.
text.english: Proper rest can improve work efficiency and make the body healthier.

text.zh: 找一個自己感興趣的職業，工作起來會更有動力。
text.pinyin: zhǎo yí gè zì jǐ gǎn xìng qù de zhí yè, gōng zuò qǐ lái huì gèng yǒu dòng lì.
text.english: Finding a profession that interests you will give you more motivation at work.

comprehension.question: What is important to maintain?
comprehension.questionZh: 保持什麼很重要？
options: 工作與生活平衡 Work-life balance
只玩遊戲 Just play games

comprehension.question: What can proper rest improve?
comprehension.questionZh: 適當的休息可以提高什麼？

comprehension.question: What makes you more motivated at work?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼能讓工作更有動力？
options: 感興趣的職業 Interesting profession
每天加班 Overtime every day

exercises.sentencePinyin: tā zuì jìn měi tiān dōu ___ dào hěn wǎn.
wǒ shì zhè jiā gōng sī de ___.

exercises.english: Are you ready for the meeting?
exercises.answerPinyin: huì yì zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma?

exercises.english: He is in charge of this project.
exercises.answerPinyin: tā fù zé zhè gè zhuān àn.

exercises.english: He is going to Shanghai on a business trip.

title: At the Bank
description: Learn how to open an account, exchange currency, and handle banking transactions.

dialogue.title: Opening a New Account
dialogue.scene: An expat goes to a local bank to open a savings account and exchange some currency.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 午安，請問有什麼我可以幫您的嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǔ ān, qǐng wèn yǒu shén me wǒ kě yǐ bāng nín de ma?
lines.english: Good afternoon, is there anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你好，我想開一個新的銀行帳戶。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kāi yí gè xīn de yín háng zhàng hù.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to open a new bank account.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，請問您帶了身分證件和護照嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng wèn nín dài le shēn fèn zhèng jiàn hé hù zhào ma?
lines.english: Okay, did you bring your ID and passport?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 帶了，這是在台證和護照。
lines.pinyin: dài le, zhè shì zài tái zhèng hé hù zhào.
lines.english: Yes, here is my ARC and passport.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝。請先填一下這張申請表。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. qǐng xiān tián yí xià zhè zhāng shēn qǐng biǎo.
lines.english: Thank you. Please fill out this application form first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的。這裡需要簽名嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. zhè lǐ xū yào qiān míng ma?
lines.english: Okay. Do I need to sign here?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 對，請在右下方簽名。您也需要設定一個六位數的密碼。
lines.pinyin: duì, qǐng zài yòu xià fāng qiān míng. nín yě xū yào shè dìng yí gè liù wèi shù de mì mǎ.
lines.english: Yes, please sign at the bottom right. You also need to set a six-digit password.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 明白了。開戶需要存多少錢進去？
lines.pinyin: míng bai le. kāi hù xū yào cún duō shǎo qián jìn qù?
lines.english: Understood. How much money do I need to deposit to open the account?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 至少需要存一千塊台幣。
lines.pinyin: zhì shǎo xū yào cún yì qiān kuài tái bì.
lines.english: At least one thousand TWD.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 沒問題。另外，我想把一些美金換成台幣。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. lì wài, wǒ xiǎng bǎ yì xiē měi jīn huàn chéng tái bì.
lines.english: No problem. Also, I'd like to exchange some USD for TWD.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 今天的匯率是三十點五。請問您要換多少？
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān de huì lǜ shì sān shí diǎn wǔ. qǐng wèn nín yào huàn duō shǎo?
lines.english: Today's exchange rate is 30.5. How much would you like to exchange?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我想換五百美金。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng huàn wǔ bǎi měi jīn.
lines.english: I want to exchange 500 USD.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 換五百美金需要收一百塊的手續費，可以嗎？
lines.pinyin: huàn wǔ bǎi měi jīn xū yào shōu yì bǎi kuài de shǒu xù fèi, kě yǐ ma?
lines.english: Exchanging 500 USD requires a 100 dollar service fee, is that okay?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 可以。大概要等多久？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ. dà gài yào děng duō jiǔ?
lines.english: Yes. About how long do I have to wait?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 大約十五分鐘。您可以先去那邊坐一下。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē shí wǔ fēn zhōng. nín kě yǐ xiān qù nà biān zuò yí xià.
lines.english: About 15 minutes. You can go sit over there for a while.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。我什麼時候可以拿到提款卡？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ shén me shí hou kě yǐ ná dào tí kuǎn kǎ?
lines.english: Thank you. When can I get the ATM card?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 提款卡現在就可以給您。請再跟我確認一下您的地址。
lines.pinyin: tí kuǎn kǎ xiàn zài jiù kě yǐ gěi nín. qǐng zài gēn wǒ què rèn yí xià nín de dì zhǐ.
lines.english: The ATM card can be given to you right now. Please confirm your address with me again.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 地址是中山路一百號三樓。
lines.pinyin: dì zhǐ shì zhōng shān lù yì bǎi hào sān lóu.
lines.english: The address is 3F, No. 100 Zhongshan Road.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題。這是您的存摺、提款卡和換好的台幣。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. zhè shì nín de cún zhé, tí kuǎn kǎ hé huàn hǎo de tái bì.
lines.english: No problem. Here is your passbook, ATM card, and the exchanged TWD.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 非常感謝，辛苦了。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng gǎn xiè, xīn kǔ le.
lines.english: Thank you very much, sorry for the trouble.

text.zh: 在國外生活，開一個當地的銀行帳戶很有用。
text.pinyin: zài guó wài shēng huó, kāi yí gè dāng dì de yín háng zhàng hù hěn yǒu yòng.
text.english: When living abroad, opening a local bank account is very useful.

text.zh: 你可以用提款卡在ATM領錢，也可以用手機銀行轉帳。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ yòng tí kuǎn kǎ zài ATM lǐng qián, yě kě yǐ yòng shǒu jī yín háng zhuǎn zhàng.
text.english: You can use an ATM card to withdraw money at an ATM, or use mobile banking to transfer money.

text.zh: 注意匯率的變化，可以幫你省下一些換錢的費用。
text.pinyin: zhù yì huì lǜ de biàn huà, kě yǐ bāng nǐ shěng xià yì xiē huàn qián de fèi yòng.
text.english: Paying attention to exchange rate changes can help you save some money exchange costs.

comprehension.question: What is useful when living abroad?
comprehension.questionZh: 在國外生活什麼很有用？
options: 買很多衣服 Buy many clothes
開當地銀行帳戶 Open local bank account

comprehension.question: Where can you withdraw money with an ATM card?
comprehension.questionZh: 提款卡可以在哪裡領錢？

comprehension.question: What can help save money on currency exchange?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以幫你省下換錢的費用？
options: 注意匯率變化 Watch exchange rate

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ xiǎng ___ yí gè yín háng zhàng hù.
jīn tiān de ___ shì duō shǎo?

exercises.answerPinyin: qǐng shū rù nín de mì mǎ.

exercises.english: I want to exchange some money.

title: Travel & Booking
description: Learn how to book a hotel, buy tickets, and plan a trip.

dialogue.title: Checking into a Hotel
dialogue.scene: A traveler arrives at a hotel in Tainan and confirms their reservation.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 您好，歡迎來到台南！請問有預訂嗎？
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, huān yíng lái dào tái nán! qǐng wèn yǒu yù dìng ma?
lines.english: Hello, welcome to Tainan! Do you have a reservation?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 有的，我姓陳，預訂了一間雙人房。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, wǒ xìng chén, yù dìng le yì jiān shuāng rén fáng.
lines.english: Yes, my surname is Chen, I booked a double room.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 好的，陳先生。請出示您的證件。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, chén xiān sheng. qǐng chū shì nín de zhèng jiàn.
lines.english: Okay, Mr. Chen. Please show your ID.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好的，這是我的身分證。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhè shì wǒ de shēn fèn zhèng.
lines.english: Okay, here is my ID card.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 謝謝。您預訂的是兩晚，包含早餐，對嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. nín yù dìng de shì liǎng wǎn, bāo hán zǎo cān, duì ma?
lines.english: Thank you. You booked for two nights, breakfast included, right?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 是的。請問早餐是幾點到幾點？
lines.pinyin: shì de. qǐng wèn zǎo cān shì jǐ diǎn dào jǐ diǎn?
lines.english: Yes. What time is breakfast served?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 早上七點到十點，在一樓餐廳。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang qī diǎn dào shí diǎn, zài yì lóu cān tīng.
lines.english: From 7:00 to 10:00 AM in the first-floor restaurant.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 這附近有什麼有名的景點嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè fù jìn yǒu shén me yǒu míng de jǐng diǎn ma?
lines.english: Are there any famous attractions nearby?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 赤崁樓和孔廟都很近，走十分鐘就到了。
lines.pinyin: chì kàn lóu hé kǒng miào dōu hěn jìn, zǒu shí fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
lines.english: Chihkan Tower and the Confucius Temple are very close, just a ten-minute walk.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 太好了。還有，我需要一張台南市區的地圖。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. hái yǒu, wǒ xū yào yì zhāng tái nán shì qū de dì tú.
lines.english: Great. Also, I need a map of Tainan city.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 沒問題，這份地圖送給您，上面標註了熱門小吃。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zhè fèn dì tú sòng gěi nín, shàng miàn biāo zhù le rè mén xiǎo chī.
lines.english: No problem, this map is for you, it marks popular local snacks.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 太棒了，台南的小吃很有名。這附近有租車的地方嗎？
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le, tái nán de xiǎo chī hěn yǒu míng. zhè fù jìn yǒu zū chē de dì fang ma?
lines.english: Wonderful, Tainan's snacks are very famous. Is there a place to rent a car nearby?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 捷運站旁邊就有租機車和腳踏車的店。
lines.pinyin: jié yùn zhàn páng biān jiù yǒu zū jī chē hé jiǎo tà chē de diàn.
lines.english: There are motorcycle and bicycle rental shops right next to the MRT station.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝您的資訊。我的房間在哪一樓？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie nín de zī xùn. wǒ de fáng jiān zài nǎ yì lóu?
lines.english: Okay, thank you for the information. Which floor is my room on?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 在五樓，五零三號房。這是您的房卡。
lines.pinyin: zài wǔ lóu, wǔ líng sān hào fáng. zhè shì nín de fáng kǎ.
lines.english: It's on the 5th floor, Room 503. Here is your room card.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 有行李生可以幫我拿行李嗎？
lines.pinyin: yǒu xíng li shēng kě yǐ bāng wǒ ná xíng li ma?
lines.english: Is there a bellhop who can help me with my luggage?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 有的，他馬上會幫您把行李送到房間。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, tā mǎ shàng huì bāng nín bǎ xíng li sòng dào fáng jiān.
lines.english: Yes, he will deliver your luggage to your room shortly.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 非常感謝。對了，退房時間是幾點？
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng gǎn xiè. duì le, tuì fáng shí jiān shì jǐ diǎn?
lines.english: Thank you very much. By the way, what time is check-out?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.zh: 中午十二點以前。祝您在台南玩得開心！
lines.pinyin: zhōng wǔ shí èr diǎn yǐ qián. zhù nín zài tái nán wán de kāi xīn!
lines.english: Before 12:00 PM. Have a great time in Tainan!

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 謝謝，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you, goodbye.

text.zh: 台灣有很多美麗的風景和好吃的食物。
text.pinyin: tái wān yǒu hěn duō měi lì de fēng jǐng hé hǎo chī de shí wu.
text.english: Taiwan has many beautiful sceneries and delicious food.

text.zh: 你可以坐高鐵快速去不同的城市，也可以租車自助旅行。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zuò gāo tiě kuài sù qù bù tóng de chéng shì, yě kě yǐ zū chē zì zhù lǚ xíng.
text.english: You can take the High Speed Rail to go to different cities quickly, or rent a car for a self-guided trip.

text.zh: 提前在網路上預訂酒店，通常可以得到比較好的價格。
text.pinyin: tí qián zài wǎng lù shàng yù dìng jiǔ diàn, tōng cháng kě yǐ dé dào bǐ jiào hǎo de jià gé.
text.english: Booking hotels online in advance usually gets you better prices.

comprehension.question: What does Taiwan have many of?
comprehension.questionZh: 台灣有很多什麼？
options: 美麗風景和美食 Beautiful scenery and food

comprehension.question: How can you travel quickly between cities?
comprehension.questionZh: 怎麼快速去不同的城市？
options: 騎腳踏車 Ride a bike

comprehension.question: What is the benefit of booking hotels online in advance?
comprehension.questionZh: 提前網路訂房有什麼好處？
options: 比較好的價格 Better prices

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ xiǎng ___ yì jiān shuāng rén fáng.
qǐng wèn jǐ diǎn kě yǐ ___ ?

exercises.english: I want to buy two tickets.
exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ yào mǎi liǎng zhāng piào.

title: School Life
description: Learn about school subjects, exams, and student activities.

dialogue.title: Preparing for Exams
dialogue.scene: Two students are at the library discussing their subjects and upcoming exams.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這學期的課你覺得怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: zhè xué qī de kè nǐ jué de zěn me yàng?
lines.english: What do you think of the classes this semester?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我覺得歷史很有趣，但是數學太難了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de lì shǐ hěn yǒu qù, dàn shì shù xué tài nán le.
lines.english: I think history is interesting, but math is too hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也是。下週就要期中考試了，你準備好了嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì. xià zhōu jiù yào qī zhōng kǎo shì le, nǐ zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Me too. Midterms are next week, are you ready?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還沒，所以我今天才來圖書館唸書。
lines.pinyin: hái méi, suǒ yǐ wǒ jīn tiān cái lái tú shū guǎn niàn shū.
lines.english: Not yet, that's why I came to the library to study today.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你要不要跟我一起複習科學？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yào bú yào gēn wǒ yì qǐ fù xí kē xué?
lines.english: Do you want to review science with me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，科學我也有些地方不太懂。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, kē xué wǒ yě yǒu xiē dì fang bú tài dǒng.
lines.english: Sure, there are some parts of science I don't quite understand either.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這次考試佔總成績的百分之三十，很重要。
lines.pinyin: zhè cì kǎo shì zhàn zǒng chéng jī de bǎi fēn zhī sān shí, hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: This exam accounts for 30% of the total grade, it's very important.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對啊，如果不及格就麻煩了。
lines.pinyin: duì a, rú guǒ bù jí gé jiù má fan le.
lines.english: Yeah, it'll be trouble if I don't pass.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對了，你參加了什麼社團嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì le, nǐ cān jiā le shén me shè tuán ma?
lines.english: By the way, have you joined any clubs?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我參加了籃球社。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ cān jiā le lán qiú shè. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I joined the basketball club. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我參加了吉他社，每週二下午都要練習。
lines.pinyin: wǒ cān jiā le jí tā shè, měi zhōu èr xià wǔ dōu yào liàn xí.
lines.english: I joined the guitar club, we practice every Tuesday afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 彈吉他很帥耶！下次彈給我聽。
lines.pinyin: tán jí tā hěn shuài ye! xià cì tán gěi wǒ tīng.
lines.english: Playing guitar is so cool! Play it for me next time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題。考試結束後，你有什麼計畫？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. kǎo shì jié shù hòu, nǐ yǒu shén me jì huà?
lines.english: No problem. What plans do you have after exams are over?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我想去墾丁旅遊，那邊的海很美。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù kěn dīng lǚ yóu, nà biān de hǎi hěn měi.
lines.english: I want to travel to Kenting, the sea there is beautiful.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真好。這學期過完，我們就要畢業了。
lines.pinyin: zhēn hǎo. zhè xué qī guò wán, wǒ men jiù yào bì yè le.
lines.english: That's nice. After this semester, we'll be graduating.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，時間過得真快。你畢業後打算做什麼？
lines.pinyin: shì a, shí jiān guò de zhēn kuài. nǐ bì yè hòu dǎ suàn zuò shén me?
lines.english: Yeah, time flies. What do you plan to do after graduation?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想先找工作，積累一些經驗。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xiān zhǎo gōng zuò, jī lěi yì xiē jīng yàn.
lines.english: I want to find a job first and gain some experience.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也在考慮要不要繼續讀書。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zài kǎo lǜ yào bú yào jì xù dú shū.
lines.english: I'm also considering whether to continue studying.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 無論如何，我們先把這次考試考好。加油！
lines.pinyin: wú lùn rú hé, wǒ men xiān bǎ zhè cì kǎo shì kǎo hǎo. jiā yóu!
lines.english: Anyway, let's do well on this exam first. Good luck!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！我們開始複習吧。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! wǒ men kāi shí fù xí ba.
lines.english: Good luck! Let's start reviewing.

text.zh: 學校不僅是學習知識的地方，也是認識朋友的地方。
text.pinyin: xué xiào bù jǐn shì xué xí zhī shi de dì fang, yě shì rèn shi péng you de dì fang.
text.english: School is not only a place to learn knowledge, but also a place to meet friends.

text.zh: 參加社團活動可以培養不同的興趣和能力。
text.pinyin: cān jiā shè tuán huó dòng kě yǐ péi yǎng bù tóng de xìng qù hé néng lì.
text.english: Participating in club activities can cultivate different interests and abilities.

text.zh: 面對考試，努力準備是成功的關鍵。
text.pinyin: miàn duì kǎo shì, nǔ lì zhǔn bèi shì chéng gōng de guān jiàn.
text.english: When facing exams, diligent preparation is the key to success.

comprehension.question: What can you do at school besides learning?
comprehension.questionZh: 在學校除了學習還可以做什麼？

comprehension.question: What is the benefit of club activities?
comprehension.questionZh: 社團活動有什麼好處？
options: 培養興趣和能力 Cultivate interests and abilities

comprehension.question: What is the key to success in exams?
comprehension.questionZh: 考試成功的關鍵是什麼？

exercises.sentencePinyin: xià zhōu jiù yào ___ le, wǒ hěn jǐn zhāng.
tā zài tú shū guǎn ___.

exercises.answerPinyin: nǐ zuì xǐ huān shén me kē mù?

title: Bargaining & Markets
description: Learn how to negotiate prices and shop at traditional markets.

dialogue.title: Bargaining at the Night Market
dialogue.scene: A tourist tries to get a better price for a souvenir at a busy night market stall.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 老闆，請問這個手工皮包多少錢？
lines.pinyin: lǎo bǎn, qǐng wèn zhè gè shǒu gōng pí bāo duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Boss, how much is this handmade leather bag?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 這個是真皮的，品質很好，賣你八百塊。
lines.pinyin: zhè gè shì zhēn pí de, pǐn zhì hěn hǎo, mài nǐ bā bǎi kuài.
lines.english: This is genuine leather, very good quality, I'll sell it to you for 800.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 八百塊有點貴耶，能不能便宜一點？
lines.pinyin: bā bǎi kuài yǒu diǎn guì ye, néng bù néng pián yi yì diǎn?
lines.english: 800 is a bit expensive, can you make it a bit cheaper?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 這是特價了，我們手工做的很費時間。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì tè jià le, wǒ men shǒu gōng zuò de hěn fèi shí jiān.
lines.english: This is already a special price, our handmade work takes a lot of time.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 我是學生，沒那麼多錢。五百塊可以嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì xué sheng, méi nà me duō qián. wǔ bǎi kuài kě yǐ ma?
lines.english: I'm a student, I don't have that much money. Is 500 okay?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 五百太低了啦！我連成本都不夠。最少七百。
lines.pinyin: wǔ bǎi tài dī le la! wǒ lián chéng běn dōu bú gòu. zuì shǎo qī bǎi.
lines.english: 500 is too low! I wouldn't even cover my costs. At least 700.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 那六百塊呢？如果六百我就買兩個。
lines.pinyin: nà liù bǎi kuài ne? rú guǒ liù bǎi wǒ jiù mǎi liǎng gè.
lines.english: How about 600? If it's 600, I'll buy two.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 買兩個啊... 那六百五十塊，不能再低了。
lines.pinyin: mǎi liǎng gè a... nà liù bǎi wǔ shí kuài, bù néng zài dī le.
lines.english: Buying two... okay, 650 then, can't go any lower.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 六百塊嘛，老闆您人這麼好，幫幫忙啦。
lines.pinyin: liù bǎi kuài ma, lǎo bǎn nín rén zhè me hǎo, bāng bāng máng la.
lines.english: Come on, 600, you're such a nice boss, help me out here.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 哎呀，你真會說話。好吧，六百成交！
lines.pinyin: āi yā, nǐ zhēn huì shuō huà. hǎo ba, liù bǎi chéng jiāo!
lines.english: Oh man, you're a smooth talker. Okay, 600, it's a deal!

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 太好了！謝謝老闆。那這個小錢包呢？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! xiè xie lǎo bǎn. nà zhè gè xiǎo qián bāo ne?
lines.english: Great! Thanks, boss. What about this small coin purse?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 那個原價一百五，既然你買了兩個大包，這個算你一百。
lines.pinyin: nà gè yuán jià yì bǎi wǔ, jì rán nǐ mǎi le liǎng gè dà bāo, zhè gè suàn nǐ yì bǎi.
lines.english: That one is originally 150, but since you bought two big bags, I'll give it to you for 100.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 能不能送給我當贈品？
lines.pinyin: néng bù néng sòng gěi wǒ dāng zèng pǐn?
lines.english: Can you give it to me as a free gift?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 不行不行，再送我就要虧本了。
lines.pinyin: bù xíng bù xíng, zài sòng wǒ jiù yào kuī běn le.
lines.english: No way, if I give more away, I'll be losing money.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 好吧，那這三個一共一千三百塊。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, nà zhè sān gè yí gòng yì qiān sān bǎi kuài.
lines.english: Alright, so 1300 for these three.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 沒錯。要幫你包起來嗎？
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. yào bāng nǐ bāo qǐ lái ma?
lines.english: Correct. Do you want me to wrap them up?

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝。您這裡可以刷卡嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie. nín zhè lǐ kě yǐ shuā kǎ ma?
lines.english: Yes, please, thanks. Do you take credit cards here?

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 我們這地攤只收現金喔。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men zhè dì tān zhǐ shōu xiàn jīn ō.
lines.english: We only take cash at this street stall.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 沒問題，給你一千五百塊。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, gěi nǐ yì qiān wǔ bǎi kuài.
lines.english: No problem, here is 1500.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.zh: 找你兩百。下次帶朋友一起來喔！
lines.pinyin: zhǎo nǐ liǎng bǎi. xià cì dài péng you yì qǐ lái ō!
lines.english: Here's 200 change. Bring your friends next time!

text.zh: 在傳統市場或夜市，討價還價是一種樂趣。
text.pinyin: zài chuán tǒng shì chǎng huò yè shì, tǎo jià huán jià shì yì zhǒng lè qù.
text.english: In traditional markets or night markets, bargaining is a kind of fun.

text.zh: 你可以試著提出比較低的價格，但也要尊重老闆。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ shì zhe tí chū bǐ jiào dī de jià gé, dàn yě yào zūn zhòng lǎo bǎn.
text.english: You can try to suggest a lower price, but you should also respect the shopkeeper.

text.zh: 買多一點通常比較容易得到折扣。
text.pinyin: mǎi duō yì diǎn tōng cháng bǐ jiào róng yì dé dào zhé kòu.
text.english: Buying a bit more usually makes it easier to get a discount.

comprehension.question: Where is bargaining common?
comprehension.questionZh: 在哪裡討價還價很常見？
options: 傳統市場或夜市 Traditional market or night market

comprehension.question: What should you do while bargaining?
comprehension.questionZh: 討價還價時應該做什麼？
options: 大聲吵架 Shout and fight
尊重老闆 Respect the boss
直接拿走 Just take it

comprehension.question: How can you get a discount more easily?
comprehension.questionZh: 怎麼做比較容易得到折扣？
options: 不買東西 Don't buy anything

exercises.sentencePinyin: lǎo bǎn, zhè jiàn yī fu kě yǐ ___ ma?
mǎi èr sòng yī hěn ___.

exercises.answerPinyin: zuì dī jià shì duō shǎo?

exercises.english: Can you give a little discount?

title: Emergency & Help
description: Learn how to ask for help and describe emergencies.

dialogue.title: Reporting a Stolen Wallet
dialogue.scene: A person goes to the police station after their wallet was stolen on a bus.

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 警察先生，不好意思，我的錢包被偷了。
lines.pinyin: jǐng chá xiān sheng, bù hǎo yì si, wǒ de qián bāo bèi tōu le.
lines.english: Officer, excuse me, my wallet has been stolen.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 請別緊張。請問發生在什麼時候？在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: qǐng bié jǐn zhāng. qǐng wèn fā shēng zài shén me shí hou? zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Please don't be nervous. When and where did it happen?

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 大約半小時前，在兩百零五路公車上。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē bàn xiǎo shí qián, zài liǎng bǎi líng wǔ lù gōng chē shàng.
lines.english: About half an hour ago, on the number 205 bus.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 錢包裡面有什麼東西？
lines.pinyin: qián bāo lǐ miàn yǒu shén me dōng xi?
lines.english: What was inside the wallet?

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 有我的身分證、兩張信用卡，還有大約三千塊現金。
lines.pinyin: yǒu wǒ de shēn fèn zhèng, liǎng zhāng xìn yòng kǎ, hái yǒu dà yuē sān qiān kuài xiàn jīn.
lines.english: My ID card, two credit cards, and about 3000 dollars in cash.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 你有看到可疑的人嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu kàn dào kě yí de rén ma?
lines.english: Did you see anyone suspicious?

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 當時車上人很多，我沒注意到誰偷的。
lines.pinyin: dāng shí chē shàng rén hěn duō, wǒ méi zhù yì dào shéi tōu de.
lines.english: The bus was very crowded at the time, I didn't notice who stole it.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 好，請先填一下這份報案紀錄。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, qǐng xiān tián yí xià zhè fèn bào àn jì lù.
lines.english: Okay, please fill out this police report first.

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 好的。我現在該怎麼辦？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ xiàn zài gāi zěn me bàn?
lines.english: Okay. What should I do now?

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 你應該先打電話給銀行，把信用卡停掉。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yīng gāi xiān dǎ diàn huà gěi yín háng, bǎ xìn yòng kǎ tíng diào.
lines.english: You should call your bank first to cancel your credit cards.

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 對，我差點忘了。可以借用一下電話嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ chà diǎn wàng le. kě yǐ jiè yòng yí xià diàn huà ma?
lines.english: Right, I almost forgot. May I borrow your phone?

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 沒問題，桌上那台可以用。還要聯絡家人嗎？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zhuō shàng nà tái kě yǐ yòng. hái yào lián luò jiā rén ma?
lines.english: No problem, you can use the one on the table. Do you need to contact your family too?

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 不用了，謝謝。我真的很擔心證件丟了。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng le, xiè xie. wǒ zhēn de hěn dān xīn zhèng jiàn diū le.
lines.english: No need, thanks. I'm really worried about losing my ID.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 別擔心，我們會調閱公車上的監視器。
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, wǒ men huì diào yuè gōng chē shàng de jiān shì qì.
lines.english: Don't worry, we will check the surveillance cameras on the bus.

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 希望可以找回來。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng kě yǐ zhǎo huí lái.
lines.english: I hope I can get it back.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 有消息我們會立刻通知你。這是報案證明。
lines.pinyin: yǒu xiāo xi wǒ men huì lì kè tōng zhī nǐ. zhè shì bào àn zhèng míng.
lines.english: If there's news, we'll notify you immediately. This is the report certificate.

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 謝謝警察先生。對了，這附近有地鐵站嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie jǐng chá xiān sheng. duì le, zhè fù jìn yǒu dì tiě zhàn ma?
lines.english: Thank you, officer. By the way, is there a subway station nearby?

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 出門往左走兩百米就到了。你身上還有錢坐車嗎？
lines.pinyin: chū mén wǎng zuǒ zǒu liǎng bǎi mǐ jiù dào le. nǐ shēn shàng hái yǒu qián zuò chē ma?
lines.english: Turn left outside and walk 200 meters. Do you have any money left to take the bus/train?

lines.speaker: Victim
lines.zh: 我有悠遊卡在口袋裡，還可以用。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu yōu yóu kǎ zài kǒu dài lǐ, hái kě yǐ yòng.
lines.english: I have my EasyCard in my pocket, it still works.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 那就好，路上小心。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo, lù shàng xiǎo xīn.
lines.english: That's good, stay safe on the road.

text.zh: 在台灣，遇到緊急情況時，打110可以叫警察。
text.pinyin: zài tái wān, yù dào jǐn jí qíng kuàng shí, dǎ yì yì líng kě yǐ jiào jǐng chá.
text.english: In Taiwan, when encountering an emergency, dial 110 to call the police.

text.zh: 如果你需要救護車或遇到火災，請撥打119。
text.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ xū yào jiù hù chē huò yù dào huǒ zāi, qǐng bō dǎ yì yì jiǔ.
text.english: If you need an ambulance or encounter a fire, please dial 119.

text.zh: 保持冷靜並清楚說明你的位置，是求助的最重要步驟。
text.pinyin: bǎo chí lěng jìng bìng qīng chǔ shuō míng nǐ de wèi zhì, shì qiú zhù de zuì zhòng yào bù zhòu.
text.english: Staying calm and clearly stating your location is the most important step in seeking help.

comprehension.question: What number should you dial for the police?
comprehension.questionZh: 警察的緊急電話是多少？

comprehension.question: What number should you dial for an ambulance?
comprehension.questionZh: 救護車的緊急電話是多少？

comprehension.question: What is the most important step in seeking help?
comprehension.questionZh: 求助時最重要的一步是什麼？
options: 保持冷靜並說明位置 Stay calm and state location

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ de qián bāo bèi ___ le.
qǐng bāng wǒ jiào ___.

title: Social Media & Tech
description: Learn how to talk about apps, internet usage, and social networking.

dialogue.title: Sharing Photos Online
dialogue.scene: Two friends are talking about an app they use to share travel photos.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看，我把昨天去旅行的照片上傳到Instagram了。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn, wǒ bǎ zuó tiān qù lǚ xíng de zhào piàn shàng chuán dào Instagram le.
lines.english: Look, I uploaded the photos from yesterday's trip to Instagram.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，這些照片拍得好漂亮！我馬上幫你按讚。
lines.pinyin: wa, zhè xiē zhào piàn pāi de hǎo piào liang! wǒ mǎ shàng bāng nǐ àn zàn.
lines.english: Wow, these photos were taken so beautifully! I'll like them right away.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝！你也有這款應用程式嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! nǐ yě yǒu zhè kuǎn yìng yòng chéng shì ma?
lines.english: Thanks! Do you also have this app?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有啊，我天天都在用。我也在照片下面留言了。
lines.pinyin: yǒu a, wǒ tiān tiān dōu zài yòng. wǒ yě zài zhào piàn xià miàn liú yán le.
lines.english: Yes, I use it every day. I also left a comment under the photo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我看到了，你問我那是在哪裡拍的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn dào le, nǐ wèn wǒ nà shì zài nǎ lǐ pāi de.
lines.english: I saw it, you asked me where that was taken.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對啊，風景真的很棒，我也想去。
lines.pinyin: duì a, fēng jǐng zhēn de hěn bàng, wǒ yě xiǎng qù.
lines.english: Yeah, the scenery is really great, I want to go too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我把那個景點的網址傳私訊給你。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ bǎ nà gè jǐng diǎn de wǎng zhǐ chuán sī xùn gěi nǐ.
lines.english: Then I'll DM you the URL for that attraction.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝。這附近有免費的無線網路嗎？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, xiè xie. zhè fù jìn yǒu miǎn fèi de wú xiàn wǎng lù ma?
lines.english: Great, thanks. Is there free Wi-Fi nearby?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這家咖啡廳有，密碼在桌子上面。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiā kā fēi tīng yǒu, mì mǎ zài zhuō zi shàng miàn.
lines.english: This cafe has it, the password is on the table.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，我連上了。我把你的照片分享到我的動態了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ lián shàng le. wǒ bǎ nǐ de zhào piàn fēn xiǎng dào wǒ de dòng tài le.
lines.english: Okay, I'm connected. I shared your photo to my story.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題。對了，你有在追蹤那個很有名的美食博主嗎？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. duì le, nǐ yǒu zài zhuī zōng nà gè hěn yǒu míng de měi shí bó zhǔ ma?
lines.english: No problem. By the way, are you following that famous food blogger?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你說的是「美食王」嗎？我有追蹤他。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shuō de shì 「 měi shí wáng 」 ma? wǒ yǒu zhuī zōng tā.
lines.english: Do you mean 'Food King'? I follow him.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他推薦的那家火鍋店看起來很好吃。
