lines.pinyin: tā tuī jiàn de nà jiā huǒ guō diàn kàn qǐ lái hěn hǎo chī.
lines.english: The hot pot restaurant he recommended looks delicious.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那我們下次一起去吃，再拍美照分享。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men xià cì yì qǐ qù chī, zài pāi měi zhào fēn xiǎng.
lines.english: Then let's go together next time, and take more beautiful photos to share.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意。不過我手機快沒電了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì. bù guò wǒ shǒu jī kuài méi diàn le.
lines.english: Good idea. But my phone is almost out of battery.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我有行動電源，你要借用嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu xíng dòng diàn yuán, nǐ yào jiè yòng ma?
lines.english: I have a power bank, do you want to borrow it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太謝謝你了，你真是我的救星。
lines.pinyin: tài xiè xie nǐ le, nǐ zhēn shì wǒ de jiù xīng.
lines.english: Thank you so much, you're really my lifesaver.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 別客氣。現在的人真的不能沒有網路和手機啊。
lines.pinyin: bié kè qi. xiàn zài de rén zhēn de bù néng méi yǒu wǎng lù hé shǒu jī a.
lines.english: Don't mention it. People nowadays really can't live without internet and cell phones.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，感覺跟世界斷了聯繫。
lines.pinyin: shì a, gǎn jué gēn shì jiè duàn le lián xì.
lines.english: Yeah, it feels like being cut off from the world.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哈哈，我們還是多面對面聊天吧。
lines.pinyin: hā hā, wǒ men hái shì duō miàn duì miàn liáo tiān ba.
lines.english: Haha, we should still chat face-to-face more.

text.zh: 現在的人每天花很多時間在社群媒體上。
text.pinyin: xiàn zài de rén měi tiān huā hěn duō shí jiān zài shè qún méi tǐ shàng.
text.english: People nowadays spend a lot of time on social media every day.

text.zh: 我們可以透過網路快速得到各種資訊。
text.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ tòu guò wǎng lù kuài sù dé dào gè zhǒng zī xùn.
text.english: We can get all kinds of information quickly through the internet.

text.zh: 雖然科技很方便，但也別忘了和身邊的人多多交流。
text.pinyin: suī rán kē jì hěn fāng biàn, dàn yě bié wàng le hé shēn biān de rén duō duō jiāo liú.
text.english: Although technology is convenient, don't forget to communicate more with the people around you.

comprehension.question: Where do people spend a lot of time every day?
comprehension.questionZh: 人們每天在哪裡花很多時間？

comprehension.question: How can we get information quickly?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們怎麼快速得到資訊？
options: 透過網路 Through the internet

comprehension.question: What should we not forget?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們不應該忘記什麼？
options: 和身邊的人交流 Communicate with people around us

exercises.sentencePinyin: qǐng bāng wǒ de zhào piàn ___ .
zhè jiā kā fēi tīng yǒu ___ ma?

exercises.english: I want to download an app.
exercises.answer: 我想下載一個應用程式。
exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ xiǎng xià zài yí gè yìng yòng chéng shì.

exercises.english: I'll send you a private message.
exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ huì chuán sī xùn gěi nǐ.

title: At Home
description: Learn vocabulary for home objects, housework, and daily home life.

dialogue.title: A New Apartment
dialogue.scene: A friend visits another friend's new apartment and talks about home life.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 哇，你的新家好漂亮啊！環境也很安靜。
lines.pinyin: wa, nǐ de xīn jiā hǎo piào liang a! huán jìng yě hěn ān jìng.
lines.english: Wow, your new home is so beautiful! The surroundings are also very quiet.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 謝謝！我上個月剛搬家，還在整理中。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! wǒ shàng gè yuè gāng bān jiā, hái zài zhěng lǐ zhōng.
lines.english: Thanks! I just moved last month, I'm still organizing.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 客廳的沙發坐起來真舒服。電視也很大的感覺。
lines.pinyin: kè tīng de shā fā zuò qǐ lái zhēn shū fu. diàn shì yě hěn dà de gǎn jué.
lines.english: The sofa in the living room is really comfortable. The TV feels very big too.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 對，我花了很多時間挑選家具。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ huā le hěn duō shí jiān tiāo xuǎn jiā jù.
lines.english: Yes, I spent a lot of time choosing the furniture.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 廚房看起來也很乾淨，你常自己煮飯嗎？
lines.pinyin: chú fáng kàn qǐ lái yě hěn gān jìng, nǐ cháng zì jǐ zhǔ fàn ma?
lines.english: The kitchen looks very clean too, do you often cook yourself?

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 偶爾會煮。不過我最討厭洗碗了。
lines.pinyin: ǒu ěr huì zhǔ. bù guò wǒ zuì tǎo yàn xǐ wǎn le.
lines.english: Occasionally. But I hate washing dishes the most.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 哈哈，我也是。有洗碗機就方便多了。
lines.pinyin: hā hā, wǒ yě shì. yǒu xǐ wǎn jī jiù fāng biàn duō le.
lines.english: Haha, me too. It would be much more convenient to have a dishwasher.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 我想以後買一台。你要去參觀一下臥室嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yǐ hòu mǎi yì tāi. nǐ yào qù cān guān yí xià wò shì ma?
lines.english: I want to buy one later. Do you want to take a look at the bedroom?

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 好啊。你的臥室採光真好，窗戶很大。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a. nǐ de wò shì cǎi guāng zhēn hǎo, chuāng hu hěn dà.
lines.english: Sure. Your bedroom has great natural light, the window is very big.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 是啊，我最喜歡在那裡看書。
lines.pinyin: shì a, wǒ zuì xǐ huan zài nà lǐ kàn shū.
lines.english: Yeah, I like reading books there the most.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 你的鄰居怎麼樣？好相處嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de lín jū zěn me yàng? hǎo xiāng chǔ ma?
lines.english: How are your neighbors? Are they easy to get along with?

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 隔壁的鄰居人很好，還送過我水果。
lines.pinyin: gé bì de lín jū rén hěn hǎo, hái sòng guò wǒ shuǐ guǒ.
lines.english: The neighbor next door is very nice, they even gave me some fruit.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 那真不錯。我家的鄰居有點吵。
lines.pinyin: nà zhēn bú cuò. wǒ jiā de lín jū yǒu diǎn chǎo.
lines.english: That's great. My neighbors are a bit noisy.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 住在安靜的地方真的很重要，睡眠品質會變好。
lines.pinyin: zhù zài ān jìng de dì fang zhēn de hěn zhòng yào, shuì mián pǐn zhì huì biàn hǎo.
lines.english: Living in a quiet place is really important, sleep quality will improve.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 對了，你這週末要打掃家裡嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì le, nǐ zhè zhōu mò yào dǎ sǎo jiā lǐ ma?
lines.english: By the way, are you going to clean the house this weekend?

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 對，我要把浴室好好刷洗一下。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yào bǎ yù shì hǎo hǎo shuā xǐ yí xià.
lines.english: Yes, I need to give the bathroom a good scrub.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 需要幫忙嗎？我可以幫你整理書架。
lines.pinyin: xū yào bāng máng ma? wǒ kě yǐ bāng nǐ zhěng lǐ shū jià.
lines.english: Need help? I can help you organize the bookshelf.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 不用啦，你來當客人就好。晚上我們一起叫外送吧。
lines.pinyin: bú yòng la, nǐ lái dāng kè rén jiù hǎo. wǎn shang wǒ men yì qǐ jiào wài sòng ba.
lines.english: No need, you just be a guest. Let's order takeout together tonight.

lines.speaker: Visitor
lines.zh: 好啊，那我就不客氣了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, nà wǒ jiù bú kè qi le.
lines.english: Sure, I won't be formal then.

lines.speaker: Host
lines.zh: 隨便坐，當成自己家一樣。
lines.pinyin: suí biàn zuò, dāng chéng zì jǐ jiā yí yàng.
lines.english: Sit anywhere, make yourself at home.

text.zh: 家是我們放鬆心情的最佳場所。
text.pinyin: jiā shì wǒ men fàng sōng xīn qíng de zuì jiā chǎng suǒ.
text.english: Home is the best place for us to relax.

text.zh: 保持家裡的整潔和乾淨，能讓心情更愉快。
text.pinyin: bǎo chí jiā lǐ de zhěng jié hé gān jìng, néng ràng xīn qíng gèng yú kuài.
text.english: Keeping the house tidy and clean can make the mood more pleasant.

text.zh: 和家人或是好鄰居保持良好的關係，生活會更幸福。
text.pinyin: hé jiā rén huò shì hǎo lín jū bǎo chí liáng hǎo de guān xì, shēng huó huì gèng xìng fú.
text.english: Maintaining good relationships with family or good neighbors makes life happier.

comprehension.question: What is the best place to relax?
comprehension.questionZh: 放鬆心情的最佳場所是什麼？

comprehension.question: What can make the mood more pleasant?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼能讓心情更愉快？
options: 把家裡弄髒 Get the house dirty
保持整潔和乾淨 Stay tidy and clean

comprehension.question: Who should you maintain a good relationship with?
comprehension.questionZh: 你應該和誰保持良好關係？
options: 家人和鄰居 Family and neighbors

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ men jiā yǒu sān gè ___ .
qǐng bāng wǒ ___ chú fáng.

title: Watching the News
description: Learn to understand news reports and discuss current events.

dialogue.title: Discussing Current Events
dialogue.scene: Two colleagues are discussing the morning news during their break.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看今天的早報了嗎？那則關於經濟改革的新聞很有趣。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn jīn tiān de zǎo bào le ma? nà zé guān yú jīng jì gǎi gé de xīn wén hěn yǒu qù.
lines.english: Did you see this morning's paper? That news about the economic reform is very interesting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還沒，我只看了天氣預報和體育版。發生了什麼事？
lines.pinyin: hái méi, wǒ zhǐ kàn le tiān qì yù bào hé tǐ yù bǎn. fā shēng le shén me shì?
lines.english: Not yet, I only saw the weather forecast and the sports section. What happened?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 政府宣布要推行新的稅務改革，希望能降低失業率。
lines.pinyin: zhèng fǔ xuān bù yào tuī xíng xīn de shuì wù gǎi gé, xī wàng néng jiàng dī shī yè lǜ.
lines.english: The government announced a new tax reform, hoping to lower the unemployment rate.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽起來是件好事，但專家怎麼評論？
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái shì jiàn hǎo shì, dàn zhuān jiā zěn me píng lùn?
lines.english: Sounds like a good thing, but what are the experts saying?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有些經濟學家擔心這會導致短期內的通膨壓力。
lines.pinyin: yǒu xiē jīng jì xué jiā dān xīn zhè huì dǎo zhì duǎn qī nèi de tōng péng yā lì.
lines.english: Some economists worry this might lead to short-term inflationary pressure.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也很關注股市的反應，今天早上好像跌了一點。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě hěn guān zhù gǔ shì de fǎn yìng, jīn tiān zǎo shang hǎo xiàng dié le yì diǎn.
lines.english: I'm also following the stock market reaction; it seems it dropped a bit this morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 股市總是對新政策比較敏感。對了，國際新聞有提到昨天的國際高峰會嗎？
lines.pinyin: gǔ shì zǒng shì duì xīn zhèng cè bǐ jiào mǐn gǎn. duì le, guó jì xīn wén yǒu tí dào zuó tiān de guó jì gāo fēng huì ma?
lines.english: The stock market is always sensitive to new policies. By the way, did the international news mention yesterday's international summit?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，記者報導說各國領導人達成了一些環保協議。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, jì zhě bào dǎo shuō gè guó lǐng dǎo rén dá chéng le yì xiē huán bǎo xié yì.
lines.english: Yes, the reporter said world leaders reached some environmental agreements.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那太好了，環境保護是現在全球最關注的議題。
lines.pinyin: nà tài hǎo le, huán jìng bǎo hù shì xiàn zài quán qiú zuì guān zhù de yì tí.
lines.english: That's great, environmental protection is the most followed issue globally now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，不過執行起來可能會有不少困難。
lines.pinyin: shì a, bù guò zhí xíng qǐ lái kě néng huì yǒu bù shǎo kùn nan.
lines.english: Yeah, but implementing it might face quite a few difficulties.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 社會新聞方面，你聽說那個科技公司的醜聞了嗎？
lines.pinyin: shè huì xīn wén fāng miàn, nǐ tīng shuō nà gè kē jì gōng sī de chǒu wén le ma?
lines.english: Regarding social news, did you hear about that tech company scandal?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽說了，這兩天社群媒體上都在討論這件事。
lines.pinyin: tīng shuō le, zhè liǎng tiān shè qún méi tǐ shàng dōu zài tǎo lùn zhè jiàn shì.
lines.english: I heard, social media has been discussing it for the past two days.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 現在的新聞傳播真快，幾分鐘全城都知道了。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài de xīn wén chuán bō zhēn kuài, jǐ fēn zhōng quán chéng dōu zhī dào le.
lines.english: News spreads so fast now, in a few minutes the whole city knows.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 所以我們要學會分辨新聞的真假，不要被誤導。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ wǒ men yào xué huì fēn biàn xīn wén de zhēn jiǎ, bú yào bèi wù dǎo.
lines.english: So we need to learn how to distinguish between real and fake news, and not be misled.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，現在假新聞確實很多。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, xiàn zài jiǎ xīn wén què shí hěn duō.
lines.english: True, there are indeed a lot of fake news now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我通常會看好幾家媒體的報導來確認事實。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tōng cháng huì kàn hǎo jǐ jiā méi tǐ de bào dǎo lái què rèn shì shí.
lines.english: I usually look at reports from several media outlets to confirm the facts.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這是一個好習慣。休息時間快結束了，我們回去工作吧。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí gè hǎo xí guàn. xiū xi shí jiān kuài jié shù le, wǒ men huí qù gōng zuò ba.
lines.english: That's a good habit. Break time is almost over, let's get back to work.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，下午會議結束後我們再聊。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, xià wǔ huì yì jié shù hòu wǒ men zài liáo.
lines.english: Okay, let's chat more after the afternoon meeting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題，希望能看到更多正面新聞。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, xī wàng néng kàn dào gèng duō zhèng miàn xīn wén.
lines.english: No problem, hope to see more positive news.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也是，下午見！
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì, xià wǔ jiàn!
lines.english: Me too, see you this afternoon!

text.zh: 在數位時代，人們獲取新聞的方式發生了巨大的變化。
text.pinyin: zài shù wèi shí dài, rén men huò qǔ xīn wén de fāng shì fā shēng le jù dà de biàn huà.
text.english: In the digital age, the way people obtain news has undergone a huge change.

text.zh: 除了電視和報紙，社群媒體成為了重要的新聞來源。
text.pinyin: chú le diàn shì hé bào zhǐ, shè qún méi tǐ chéng wéi le zhòng yào de xīn wén lái yuán.
text.english: Besides TV and newspapers, social media has become an important news source.

text.zh: 然而，面對海量的資訊，保持批判性思考變得非常重要。
text.pinyin: rán ér, miàn duì hǎi liàng de zī xùn, bǎo chí pī pàn xìng sī kǎo biàn de fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: However, facing a massive amount of information, maintaining critical thinking has become very important.

comprehension.question: What has happened to the way people get news?
comprehension.questionZh: 人們獲取新聞的方式發生了什麼變化？
options: 變得很慢 Became very slow

comprehension.question: What is an important new source of news?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼是重要的新聞來源？

comprehension.question: What is important when facing a lot of information?
comprehension.questionZh: 面對海量資訊時什麼很重要？

exercises.sentence: 這則___報導了國際高峰會的情況。
exercises.sentencePinyin: zhè zé ___ bào dǎo le guó jì gāo fēng huì de qíng kuàng.

exercises.sentence: 失業率的下降有利於___發展。
exercises.sentencePinyin: shī yè lǜ de xià jiàng yǒu lì yú ___ fā zhǎn.

exercises.english: The stock market dropped this morning.
exercises.answerPinyin: jīn tiān zǎo shang gǔ shì xià dié le.

exercises.english: Don't be misled by fake news.
exercises.answerPinyin: bú yào bèi jiǎ xīn wén wù dǎo.

title: Business Meetings
description: Learn professional language for chairing and participating in meetings.

dialogue.title: A Product Launch Meeting
dialogue.scene: A manager is chairing a meeting about the upcoming product launch with their team.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 各位同事，大家早。現在會議開始，請看今天的議程。
lines.pinyin: gè wèi tóng shì, dà jiā zǎo. xiàn zài huì yì kāi shǐ, qǐng kàn jīn tiān de yì chéng.
lines.english: Good morning, colleagues. Let's start the meeting, please look at today's agenda.

lines.speaker: Team Lead
lines.zh: 經理，第一項討論的是新產品的上市時間。
lines.pinyin: jīng lǐ, dì yī xiàng tǎo lùn de shì xīn chǎn pǐn de shàng shì shí jiān.
lines.english: Manager, the first item for discussion is the launch date of the new product.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 沒錯。研發部門，你們那邊的進度如何？
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. yán fā bù mén, nǐ men nà biān de jìn dù rú hé?
lines.english: Exactly. R&D department, how is the progress on your end?

lines.speaker: R&D Head
lines.zh: 我們已經完成了最後測試，預計下個月可以量產。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yǐ jīng wán chéng le zuì hòu cè shì, yù jì xià gè yuè kě yǐ liàng chǎn.
lines.english: We've finished final testing and expect mass production to start next month.

lines.speaker: Marketing
lines.zh: 那行銷活動也需要同步開始。我提議舉辦一個線上發布會。
lines.pinyin: nà xíng xiāo huó dòng yě xū yào tóng bù kāi shǐ. wǒ tí yì jǔ bàn yí gè xiàn shàng fā bù huì.
lines.english: Then marketing activities need to start simultaneously. I propose hosting an online launch event.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 這個提議不錯，大家對線上發布會有什麼意見？
lines.pinyin: zhè gè tí yì bú cuò, dà jiā duì xiàn shàng fā bù huì yǒu shén me yì jiàn?
lines.english: That's a good proposal. Does anyone have opinions on an online launch event?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.zh: 我贊成。現在線上活動的效率很高，能接觸到更多客戶。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zàn chéng. xiàn zài xiàn shàng huó dòng de xiào lǜ hěn gāo, néng jiē chù dào gèng duō kè hù.
lines.english: I'm in favor. Online events are very efficient now and can reach more customers.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 有人反對嗎？或者有不同的建議？
lines.pinyin: yǒu rén fǎn duì ma? huò zhě yǒu bù tóng de jiàn yì?
lines.english: Does anyone oppose? Or have different suggestions?

lines.speaker: Finance
lines.zh: 我不反對，但我們需要控制預算。請市場部提交一份詳細預算。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù fǎn duì, dàn wǒ men xū yào kòng zhì yù suàn. qǐng shì chǎng bù tí jiāo yí fèn xiáng xì yù suàn.
lines.english: I don't oppose, but we need to control the budget. Marketing, please submit a detailed budget.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好，那就這麼決定。小張，請記錄一下，市場部下週五前交預算。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, nà jiù zhè me jué dìng. xiǎo zhāng, qǐng jì lù yí xià, shì chǎng bù xià zhōu wǔ qián jiāo yù suàn.
lines.english: Okay, it's decided then. Xiao Zhang, please take note: Marketing submits the budget by next Friday.

lines.speaker: Secretary
lines.zh: 沒問題，我已經記在會議記錄裡了。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ yǐ jīng jì zài huì yì jì lù lǐ le.
lines.english: No problem, I've recorded it in the meeting minutes.

lines.speaker: Team Lead
lines.zh: 接下來是第二項議程，關於售後服務的安排。
lines.pinyin: jiē xià lái shì dì èr xiàng yì chéng, guān yú shòu hòu fú wù de ān pái.
lines.english: Next is the second agenda item, regarding after-sales service arrangements.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 請客服部門的代表發言。
lines.pinyin: qǐng kè fú bù mén de dài biǎo fā yán.
lines.english: Please have the representative from the customer service department speak.

lines.speaker: CS Rep
lines.zh: 我們計畫增加二十名客服人員，並提供二十四小時線上諮詢。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men jì huà zēng jiā èr shí míng kè fú rén yuán, bìng tí gōng èr shí sì xiǎo shí xiàn shàng zī xún.
lines.english: We plan to add 20 customer service staff and provide 24-hour online consultation.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 這個決策非常正確，服務品質是我們的核心競爭力。
lines.pinyin: zhè gè jué cè fēi cháng zhèng què, fú wù pǐn zhì shì wǒ men de hé xīn jìng zhēng lì.
lines.english: This decision is very correct; service quality is our core competitiveness.

lines.speaker: Marketing
lines.zh: 我也想補充一點，我們可以在投影片裡強調這一點。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng bǔ chōng yì diǎn, wǒ men kě yǐ zài tóu yǐng piàn lǐ qiáng diào zhè yì diǎn.
lines.english: I'd also like to add one point: we can emphasize this in the slides.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 很好。大家還有什麼要討論的嗎？
lines.pinyin: hěn hǎo. dà jiā hái yǒu shén me yào tǎo lùn de ma?
lines.english: Very good. Is there anything else anyone wants to discuss?

lines.speaker: R&D Head
lines.zh: 由於原物料漲價，我們可能要調整產品定價。
lines.pinyin: yóu yú yuán wù liào zhǎng jià, wǒ men kě néng yào tiáo zhěng chǎn pǐn dìng jià.
lines.english: Due to rising raw material prices, we might need to adjust the product pricing.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 這件事我們明天開個臨時會議單獨討論。今天的會議到此結束。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì wǒ men míng tiān kāi gè lín shí huì yì dān dú tǎo lùn. jīn tiān de huì yì dào cǐ jié shù.
lines.english: We'll have an emergency meeting tomorrow to discuss this separately. Today's meeting is adjourned.

lines.speaker: Team
lines.zh: 謝謝經理。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie jīng lǐ.
lines.english: Thank you, manager.

text.zh: 一個成功的會議需要明確的議程和高效的主持。
text.pinyin: yí gè chéng gōng de huì yì xū yào míng què de yì chéng hé gāo xiào de zhǔ chí.
text.english: A successful meeting requires a clear agenda and efficient chairing.

text.zh: 每位參與者都應該有機會發言，並尊重不同的意見。
text.pinyin: měi wèi cān yù zhě dōu yīng gāi yǒu jī huì fā yán, bìng zūn zhòng bù tóng de yì jiàn.
text.english: Every participant should have the opportunity to speak and respect different opinions.

text.zh: 會議後的會議記錄能確保決策得到執行，避免誤解。
text.pinyin: huì yì hòu de huì yì jì lù néng què bǎo jué cè dé dào zhí xíng, bì miǎn wù jiě.
text.english: Meeting minutes after the meeting ensure that decisions are implemented and avoid misunderstandings.

comprehension.question: What does a successful meeting need?
comprehension.questionZh: 一個成功的會議需要什麼？
options: 明確議程和高效主持 Clear agenda and efficient chairing
很長的時間 Very long time

comprehension.question: What should participants do during a meeting?
comprehension.questionZh: 參與者在會議中應該做什麼？
options: 發言並尊重不同意見 Speak and respect opinions

comprehension.question: What is the function of meeting minutes?
comprehension.questionZh: 會議記錄的功能是什麼？
options: 用來畫畫 Used for drawing
確保決策執行並避免誤解 Ensure execution and avoid misunderstanding

exercises.sentencePinyin: qǐng dà jiā kàn yí xià jīn tiān de ___.

exercises.sentence: 我們終於對這個問題___了。
exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ men zhōng yú duì zhè gè wèn tí ___ le.

exercises.answerPinyin: yǒu rén fǎn duì zhè gè tí yì ma?
qǐng zuò huì yì jì lù.

exercises.english: The manager is chairing the meeting.

title: Cultural Differences
description: Learn to discuss cultural habits, taboos, and traditions.

dialogue.title: East Meets West
dialogue.scene: A foreign student and a local friend discuss cultural taboos and gift-giving customs.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 小王，我聽說在台灣送禮有一些禁忌，是真的嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiǎo wáng, wǒ tīng shuō zài tái wān sòng lǐ yǒu yì xiē jìn jì, shì zhēn de ma?
lines.english: Xiao Wang, I heard there are some taboos for gift-giving in Taiwan, is that true?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 對啊，比如不能送鐘，因為「送鐘」聽起來像「送終」。
lines.pinyin: duì a, bǐ rú bù néng sòng zhōng, yīn wèi 「 sòng zhōng 」 tīng qǐ lái xiàng 「 sòng zhōng 」.
lines.english: Yes, for example, you can't give a clock, because 'giving a clock' sounds like 'attending a funeral'.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 哇，原來如此。那送雨傘呢？
lines.pinyin: wa, yuán lái rú cǐ. nà sòng yǔ sǎn ne?
lines.english: Oh, I see. What about giving an umbrella?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 最好也避免，因為「傘」跟「散」同音，代表分開的意思。
lines.pinyin: zuì hǎo yě bì miǎn, yīn wèi 「 sǎn 」 gēn 「 sàn 」 tóng yīn, dài biǎo fēn kāi de yì si.
lines.english: Better avoid that too, because 'umbrella' sounds like 'separate', representing breaking up.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 這真有趣。在我們國家，送什麼都可以，只要心意到就好。
lines.pinyin: zhè zhēn yǒu qù. zài wǒ men guó jiā, sòng shén me dōu kě yǐ, zhǐ yào xīn yì dào jiù hǎo.
lines.english: That's really interesting. In our country, giving anything is fine as long as the sentiment is there.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 這就是文化差異。每個地方的風俗和習慣都不一樣。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì wén huà chā yì. měi gè dì fang de fēng sú hé xí guàn dōu bù yí yàng.
lines.english: That's cultural difference. Every place has different customs and habits.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 還有什麼其他的傳統習俗是我應該注意的嗎？
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu shén me qí tā de chuán tǒng xí sú shì wǒ yīng gāi zhù yì de ma?
lines.english: Are there any other traditional customs I should be aware of?

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 吃飯的時候，不要把筷子垂直插在米飯上。
lines.pinyin: chī fàn de shí hou, bú yào bǎ kuài zi chuí zhí chā zài mǐ fàn shàng.
lines.english: When eating, don't stick your chopsticks vertically into the rice.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 為什麼？那樣比較方便放筷子啊。
lines.pinyin: wèi shén me? nà yàng bǐ jiào fāng biàn fàng kuài zi a.
lines.english: Why? It's a convenient way to place them.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 因為那看起來像祭拜死者的香，很不吉利。
lines.pinyin: yīn wèi nà kàn qǐ lái xiàng jì bài sǐ zhě de xiāng, hěn bù jí lì.
lines.english: Because that looks like incense used for worshiping the dead; it's very unlucky.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 謝謝你告訴我，不然我可能會造成誤會。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ gào sù wǒ, bù rán wǒ kě néng huì zào chéng wù huì.
lines.english: Thank you for telling me, otherwise I might cause a misunderstanding.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 沒關係，不知者無罪。重要的是互相尊重。
lines.pinyin: méi guān xi, bù zhī zhě wú zuì. zhòng yào de shì hù xiāng zūn zhòng.
lines.english: It's okay, those who don't know are innocent. The important thing is mutual respect.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我覺得了解不同的文化可以讓世界更包容。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de liǎo jiě bù tóng de wén huà kě yǐ ràng shì jiè gèng bāo róng.
lines.english: I think understanding different cultures can make the world more inclusive.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 我也這麼覺得。台灣是一個多元文化的社會。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhè me jué de. tái wān shì yí gè duō yuán wén huà de shè huì.
lines.english: I think so too. Taiwan is a multicultural society.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我也發現台灣人對外國人都很友善、有禮貌。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě fā xiàn tái wān rén duì wài guó rén dōu hěn yǒu shàn, yǒu lǐ mào.
lines.english: I've also noticed that Taiwanese people are very friendly and polite to foreigners.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 我們很歡迎文化交流。對了，這週六有個傳統節日，要不要一起去體驗？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men hěn huān yíng wén huà jiāo liú. duì le, zhè zhōu liù yǒu gè chuán tǒng jié rì, yào bú yào yì qǐ qù tǐ yàn?
lines.english: We welcome cultural exchange. By the way, there's a traditional festival this Saturday, want to go experience it?

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 好啊，我最喜歡體驗當地的傳統文化了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ zuì xǐ huan tǐ yàn dāng dì de chuán tǒng wén huà le.
lines.english: Sure, I love experiencing local traditional culture.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 那是一場很獨特的活動，有很多象徵意義。
lines.pinyin: nà shì yì chǎng hěn dú tè de huó dòng, yǒu hěn duō xiàng zhēng yì yì.
lines.english: It's a very unique event with a lot of symbolic meaning.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我一定會帶相機去拍一些代表性的照片。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yí dìng huì dài xiàng jī qù pāi yì xiē dài biǎo xìng de zhào piàn.
lines.english: I'll definitely bring my camera to take some representative photos.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 沒問題，到時候我再詳細介紹給你聽。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, dào shí hou wǒ zài xiáng xì jiè shào gěi nǐ tīng.
lines.english: No problem, I'll give you a detailed introduction then.

text.zh: 全球化讓不同文化的人有更多交流的機會。
text.pinyin: quán qiú huà ràng bù tóng wén huà de rén yǒu gèng duō jiāo liú de jī huì.
text.english: Globalization gives people of different cultures more opportunities to communicate.

text.zh: 尊重各地的風俗習慣，是進行有效跨文化交流的基礎。
text.pinyin: zūn zhòng gè dì de fēng sú xí guàn, shì jìn xíng yǒu xiào kuà wén huà jiāo liú de jī chǔ.
text.english: Respecting local customs and habits is the basis for effective cross-cultural communication.

text.zh: 我們可以透過學習語言，更深入地了解一種文化的價值觀。
text.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ tòu guò xué xí yǔ yán, gèng shēn rù de liǎo jiě yì zhǒng wén huà de jià zhí guān.
text.english: We can gain a deeper understanding of a culture's values through language learning.

comprehension.question: What has globalization provided?
comprehension.questionZh: 全球化提供了什麼？
options: 更多交流機會 More communication opportunities

comprehension.question: What is the basis for effective cross-cultural communication?
comprehension.questionZh: 有效跨文化交流的基礎是什麼？
options: 尊重各地的風俗習慣 Respecting local customs
說同樣的語言 Speaking same language

comprehension.question: How can we understand a culture's values more deeply?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何更深入了解一種文化的價值觀？

exercises.sentencePinyin: měi gè guó jiā dōu yǒu dú tè de ___.
wǒ men yīng gāi ___ bù tóng de wén huà.

exercises.answerPinyin: bú yào zào chéng rèn hé wù huì.
zhè shì dāng dì de fēng sú.

exercises.english: The cultural differences between the two countries are great.

title: Personal History
description: Talk about your life experiences, childhood memories, and major events.

dialogue.title: Sharing Old Stories
dialogue.scene: Two friends are looking at old photos and talking about their past.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看這張照片，這是我五歲的時候。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn zhè zhāng zhào piàn, zhè shì wǒ wǔ suì de shí hou.
lines.english: Look at this photo, this was when I was five.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你小時候看起來好可愛，在哪裡出生的？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xiǎo shí hou kàn qǐ lái hǎo kě ài, zài nǎ lǐ chū shēng de?
lines.english: You looked so cute when you were a kid, where were you born?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我是在一個南部的小鎮出生的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì zài yí gè nán bù de xiǎo zhèn chū shēng de.
lines.english: I was born in a small town in the south.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的童年生活一定很快樂吧？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de tóng nián shēng huó yí dìng hěn kuài lè ba?
lines.english: Your childhood must have been very happy?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，我常跟鄰居的小孩去河邊玩。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ cháng gēn lín jū de xiǎo hái qù hé biān wán.
lines.english: Yes, I often went to the river to play with the neighbor kids.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你什麼時候搬到台北來的？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ shén me shí hou bān dào tái běi lái de?
lines.english: Then when did you move to Taipei?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我上大學的時候才搬過來的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shàng dà xué de shí hou cái bān guò lái de.
lines.english: I only moved here when I started university.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大學畢業後的第一份工作是什麼？
lines.pinyin: dà xué bì yè hòu de dì yī fèn gōng zuò shì shén me?
lines.english: What was your first job after graduating from university?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我在一家小貿易公司當秘書。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zài yì jiā xiǎo mào yì gōng sī dāng mì shū.
lines.english: I worked as a secretary in a small trading company.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那段經歷對你現在的工作有幫助嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà duàn jīng lì duì nǐ xiàn zài de gōng zuò yǒu bāng zhù ma?
lines.english: Did that experience help you with your current job?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 很有幫助，我學到了很多溝通技巧。
lines.pinyin: hěn yǒu bāng zhù, wǒ xué dào le hěn duō gōu tōng jì qiǎo.
lines.english: Very helpful, I learned a lot of communication skills.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你生命中有什麼特別難忘的事情嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ shēng mìng zhòng yǒu shén me tè bié nán wàng de shì qing ma?
lines.english: Is there anything particularly unforgettable in your life?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 最難忘的是我第一次一個人出國旅遊。
lines.pinyin: zuì nán wàng de shì wǒ dì yī cì yí gè rén chū guó lǚ yóu.
lines.english: The most unforgettable thing was my first time traveling abroad alone.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你去哪裡了？一定很勇敢。
lines.pinyin: nǐ qù nǎ lǐ le? yí dìng hěn yǒng gǎn.
lines.english: Where did you go? You must have been very brave.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我去了日本，雖然迷路了好幾次。
lines.pinyin: wǒ qù le rì běn, suī rán mí lù le hǎo jǐ cì.
lines.english: I went to Japan, although I got lost several times.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 迷路也是一種有趣的回憶。
lines.pinyin: mí lù yě shì yì zhǒng yǒu qù de huí yì.
lines.english: Getting lost is also a fun memory.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對啊，那次旅行讓我改變了很多。
lines.pinyin: duì a, nà cì lǚ xíng ràng wǒ gǎi biàn le hěn duō.
lines.english: Right, that trip changed me a lot.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 變得更獨立了吧？
lines.pinyin: biàn de gèng dú lì le ba?
lines.english: Became more independent?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的。你呢？你的夢想實現了嗎？
lines.pinyin: shì de. nǐ ne? nǐ de mèng xiǎng shí xiàn le ma?
lines.english: Yes. And you? Has your dream come true?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還在努力中，但我相信會成功的。
lines.pinyin: hái zài nǔ lì zhōng, dàn wǒ xiāng xìn huì chéng gōng de.
lines.english: Still working on it, but I believe I will succeed.

text.zh: 每個人都有自己獨特的生命故事。
text.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu yǒu zì jǐ dú tè de shēng mìng gù shì.
text.english: Everyone has their own unique life story.

text.zh: 從童年到成年，我們經歷了很多改變。
text.pinyin: cóng tóng nián dào chéng nián, wǒ men jīng lì le hěn duō gǎi biàn.
text.english: From childhood to adulthood, we go through many changes.

text.zh: 這些經歷讓我們變得更堅強、更有智慧。
text.pinyin: zhè xiē jīng lì ràng wǒ men biàn de gèng jiān qiáng, gèng yǒu zhì huì.
text.english: These experiences make us stronger and wiser.

comprehension.question: What does everyone have?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個人都有什麼？
options: 獨特的生命故事 Unique life story
很多錢 A lot of money

comprehension.question: When do we experience changes?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們什麼時候會經歷改變？
options: 從童年到成年 From childhood to adulthood

comprehension.question: What do experiences make us?
comprehension.questionZh: 經歷讓我們變得如何？
options: 更堅強與有智慧 Stronger and wiser

exercises.sentencePinyin: tā shì zài měi guó ___ de.
wǒ de ___ shēng huó hěn kuài lè.

exercises.english: I moved to Taipei five years ago.
exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ wǔ nián qián bān dào tái běi.

exercises.english: This was a very unforgettable experience.
exercises.answer: 這是一次非常難忘的經歷。
exercises.answerPinyin: zhè shì yí cì fēi cháng nán wàng de jīng lì.

title: Environment & Nature
description: Discuss climate change, recycling, and how to protect nature.

dialogue.title: Doing Our Part for the Earth
dialogue.scene: Two students talk about their recycling habits and environmental protection.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你今天帶了自己的環保杯嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jīn tiān dài le zì jǐ de huán bǎo bēi ma?
lines.english: Did you bring your own eco-friendly cup today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 帶了，我現在出門都會自己帶杯子。
lines.pinyin: dài le, wǒ xiàn zài chū mén dōu huì zì jǐ dài bēi zi.
lines.english: Yes, I bring my own cup whenever I go out now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這樣可以減少很多塑膠垃圾。
lines.pinyin: zhè yàng kě yǐ jiǎn shǎo hěn duō sù jiāo lè sè.
lines.english: This can reduce a lot of plastic waste.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對啊，減塑對環境保護很重要。
lines.pinyin: duì a, jiǎn sù duì huán jìng bǎo hù hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Yes, reducing plastic is very important for environmental protection.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你家裡有做垃圾回收嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jiā lǐ yǒu zuò lè sè huí shōu ma?
lines.english: Do you do garbage recycling at home?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我會把紙類和塑膠瓶分開。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ huì bǎ zhǐ lèi hé sù jiāo píng fēn kāi.
lines.english: Yes, I separate paper and plastic bottles.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也會。我覺得現在的氣候越來越奇怪了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě huì. wǒ jué de xiàn zài de qì hòu yuè lái yuè qí guài le.
lines.english: Me too. I think the climate is getting stranger and stranger now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是全球暖化造成的影響。
lines.pinyin: nà shì quán qiú nuǎn huà zào chéng de yǐng xiǎng.
lines.english: That's the effect of global warming.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 夏天越來越熱，冬天卻不太冷。
lines.pinyin: xià tiān yuè lái yuè rè, dōng tiān què bú tài lěng.
lines.english: Summer is getting hotter and hotter, but winter is not very cold.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果不保護大自然，以後會更嚴重。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ bù bǎo hù dà zì rán, yǐ hòu huì gèng yán zhòng.
lines.english: If we don't protect nature, it will be even more serious in the future.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們除了回收，還能做什麼？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men chú le huí shōu, hái néng zuò shén me?
lines.english: What else can we do besides recycling?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們可以節約能源，比如隨手關燈。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ jié yuē néng yuán, bǐ rú suí shǒu guān dēng.
lines.english: We can save energy, like turning off lights when leaving.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還有少開車，多搭大眾運輸工具。
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu shǎo kāi chē, duō dā dà zhòng yùn shū gōng jù.
lines.english: And drive less, take more public transportation.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這樣可以減少空氣污染。
lines.pinyin: zhè yàng kě yǐ jiǎn shǎo kōng qì wū rǎn.
lines.english: This can reduce air pollution.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我有時候會去參加淨灘活動。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu shí hou huì qù cān jiā jìng tān huó dòng.
lines.english: Sometimes I go to beach cleanup activities.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，那很有意義耶！海邊垃圾多嗎？
lines.pinyin: wa, nà hěn yǒu yì yì ye! hǎi biān lè sè duō ma?
lines.english: Wow, that's very meaningful! Is there a lot of trash on the beach?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 很多，大部分都是塑膠瓶。
lines.pinyin: hěn duō, dà bù fèn dōu shì sù jiāo píng.
lines.english: A lot, most of it is plastic bottles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 希望大家都能更有環保意識。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng dà jiā dōu néng gèng yǒu huán bǎo yì shí.
lines.english: Hope everyone can have more environmental awareness.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，保護地球是每個人的責任。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, bǎo hù dì qiú shì měi gè rén de zé rèn.
lines.english: Exactly, protecting the Earth is everyone's responsibility.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 讓我們一起努力改善環境吧。
lines.pinyin: ràng wǒ men yì qǐ nǔ lì gǎi shàn huán jìng ba.
lines.english: Let's work together to improve the environment.

text.zh: 地球是我們唯一的家，保護環境非常重要。
text.pinyin: dì qiú shì wǒ men wéi yī de jiā, bǎo hù huán jìng fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: Earth is our only home, and protecting the environment is very important.

text.zh: 垃圾回收和節能減塑是每個人都能做的小事。
text.pinyin: lè sè huí shōu hé jié néng jiǎn sù shì měi gè rén dōu néng zuò de xiǎo shì.
text.english: Garbage recycling and energy saving/plastic reduction are small things everyone can do.

text.zh: 只要大家一起努力，就能改善全球暖化的問題。
text.pinyin: zhǐ yào dà jiā yì qǐ nǔ lì, jiù néng gǎi shàn quán qiú nuǎn huà de wèn tí.
text.english: As long as everyone works together, we can improve the problem of global warming.

comprehension.question: What is our only home?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們唯一的家是什麼？

comprehension.question: What are things everyone can do?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個人都能做的事是什麼？
options: 回收與節能 Recycling and saving energy

comprehension.question: How can we improve global warming?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們怎麼改善全球暖化？
options: 大家一起努力 Everyone work together
開更多冷氣 Turn on more AC
多買塑膠袋 Buy more plastic bags

exercises.sentencePinyin: qǐng bǎ lè sè diū jìn ___.
wǒ men yào ___ dà zì rán.

exercises.answerPinyin: lè sè huí shōu hěn zhòng yào.
quán qiú nuǎn huà yuè lái yuè yán zhòng.

exercises.english: Please turn off the lights when leaving.

title: Fitness & Lifestyle
description: Talk about exercise routines, healthy eating, and daily habits.

dialogue.title: Developing a Healthy Habit
dialogue.scene: A friend asks for advice on how to start exercising and eating better.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你最近看起來精神很好，有什麼秘訣嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì jìn kàn qǐ lái jīng shén hěn hǎo, yǒu shén me mì jué ma?
lines.english: You look very energetic lately, what's the secret?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我開始每天規律地去健身房運動。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kāi shí měi tiān guī lǜ de qù jiàn shēn fáng yùn dòng.
lines.english: I started going to the gym to exercise regularly every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真的嗎？你通常做什麼運動？
lines.pinyin: zhēn de ma? nǐ tōng cháng zuò shén me yùn dòng?
lines.english: Really? What kind of exercise do you usually do?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我會先跑步三十分鐘，然後做重訓。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì xiān pǎo bù sān shí fēn zhōng, rán hòu zuò zhòng xùn.
lines.english: I'll run for 30 minutes first, then do weight training.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 重訓會不會很難？我一直想試試看。
lines.pinyin: zhòng xùn huì bú huì hěn nán? wǒ yì zhí xiǎng shì shì kàn.
lines.english: Is weight training hard? I've been wanting to try it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 剛開始有點累，但找個教練指導會比較好。
lines.pinyin: gāng kāi shí yǒu diǎn lèi, dàn zhǎo gè jiào liàn zhǐ dǎo huì bǐ jiào hǎo.
lines.english: It's a bit tiring at first, but it's better to find a coach to guide you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了運動，你的飲食有改變嗎？
lines.pinyin: chú le yùn dòng, nǐ de yǐn shí yǒu gǎi biàn ma?
lines.english: Besides exercise, has your diet changed?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我現在多吃蔬菜，少吃油膩的食物。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ xiàn zài duō chī shū cài, shǎo chī yóu nì de shí wu.
lines.english: Yes, I eat more vegetables now and less greasy food.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 難怪你瘦了，體重減輕了不少吧？
lines.pinyin: nán guài nǐ shòu le, tǐ zhòng jiǎn qīng le bù shǎo ba?
lines.english: No wonder you're thinner, you've lost quite a bit of weight, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 減了五公斤，感覺身體輕盈多了。
lines.pinyin: jiǎn le wǔ gōng jīn, gǎn jué shēn tǐ qīng yíng duō le.
lines.english: I lost five kilograms, and my body feels much lighter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也想改變我的生活方式。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng gǎi biàn wǒ de shēng huó fāng shì.
lines.english: I also want to change my lifestyle.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 第一步就是不要再熬夜了。
lines.pinyin: dì yī bù jiù shì bú yào zài áo yè le.
lines.english: The first step is to stop staying up late.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 熬夜真的很傷身體，但我習慣晚睡。
lines.pinyin: áo yè zhēn de hěn shāng shēn tǐ, dàn wǒ xí guàn wǎn shuì.
lines.english: Staying up late really hurts the body, but I'm used to sleeping late.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 試著早點上床，睡眠品質會改善。
lines.pinyin: shì zhe zǎo diǎn shàng chuáng, shuì mián pǐn zhì huì gǎi shàn.
lines.english: Try going to bed earlier, and your sleep quality will improve.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你每天喝多少水？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi tiān hē duō shǎo shuǐ?
lines.english: How much water do you drink every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 至少兩千毫升。多喝水對皮膚也好。
lines.pinyin: zhì shǎo liǎng qiān háo shēng. duō hē shuǐ duì pí fū yě hǎo.
lines.english: At least 2000 ml. Drinking more water is also good for the skin.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我們明天一起去健身房好嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men míng tiān yì qǐ qù jiàn shēn fáng hǎo ma?
lines.english: Then shall we go to the gym together tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，我帶你去認識我的教練。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ dài nǐ qù rèn shi wǒ de jiào liàn.
lines.english: Sure, I'll take you to meet my coach.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了，希望我也能堅持下去。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, xī wàng wǒ yě néng jiān chí xià qù.
lines.english: Great, I hope I can stick with it too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要有決心，一定沒問題的。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào yǒu jué xīn, yí dìng méi wèn tí de.
lines.english: As long as you have determination, it will definitely be fine.

text.zh: 健康的身體需要規律的運動和均衡的飲食。
text.pinyin: jiàn kāng de shēn tǐ xū yào guī lǜ de yùn dòng hé jūn héng de yǐn shí.
text.english: A healthy body requires regular exercise and a balanced diet.

text.zh: 除了健身，保持良好的睡眠習慣也同樣重要。
text.pinyin: chú le jiàn shēn, bǎo chí liáng hǎo de shuì mián xí guàn yě tóng yàng zhòng yào.
text.english: Besides working out, maintaining good sleep habits is equally important.

text.zh: 現代人壓力大，學會如何放鬆心情也是健康的一部分。
text.pinyin: xiàn dài rén yā lì dà, xué huì rú hé fàng sōng xīn qíng yě shì jiàn kāng de yí bù fèn.
text.english: Modern people have a lot of pressure; learning how to relax is also a part of health.

comprehension.question: What does a healthy body need?
comprehension.questionZh: 健康的身體需要什麼？
options: 規律運動和均衡飲食 Regular exercise and balanced diet

comprehension.question: What else is important besides exercise?
comprehension.questionZh: 除了運動還有什麼很重要？
options: 買漂亮衣服 Buy beautiful clothes
良好的睡眠習慣 Good sleep habits

comprehension.question: What should modern people learn to do?
comprehension.questionZh: 現代人應該學會做什麼？
options: 吃油膩食物 Eat greasy food

exercises.sentencePinyin: tā měi tiān zǎo shang qù gōng yuán ___.
duō chī ___ duì shēn tǐ hǎo.

title: Renting an Apartment
description: Learn vocabulary for leasing, apartment hunting, and describing neighborhoods.

dialogue.title: Looking for a New Home
dialogue.scene: A potential tenant is viewing an apartment and asking the landlord questions.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 您好，我想看您在網上刊登的那間公寓。
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kàn nín zài wǎng shàng kān dēng de nà jiān gōng yù.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to see the apartment you listed online.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 沒問題，這間公寓就在三樓，請跟我來。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zhè jiān gōng yù jiù zài sān lóu, qǐng gēn wǒ lái.
lines.english: No problem, this apartment is on the third floor, please follow me.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 這裡的交通方便嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ de jiāo tōng fāng biàn ma?
lines.english: Is the transportation convenient here?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 非常方便，走路五分鐘就有捷運站。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng fāng biàn, zǒu lù wǔ fēn zhōng jiù yǒu jié yùn zhàn.
lines.english: Very convenient, there's an MRT station just a five-minute walk away.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 這是一間套房嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yì jiān tào fáng ma?
lines.english: Is this a studio apartment?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 對，有一房一廳和一個獨立的浴室。
lines.pinyin: duì, yǒu yì fáng yì tīng hé yí gè dú lì de yù shì.
lines.english: Yes, it has one bedroom, one living room, and an independent bathroom.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 每個月的租金是多少？
lines.pinyin: měi gè yuè de zū jīn shì duō shǎo?
lines.english: How much is the monthly rent?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 每個月一萬五千塊，包含水費和網路。
lines.pinyin: měi gè yuè yí wàn wǔ qiān kuài, bāo hán shuǐ fèi hé wǎng lù.
lines.english: 15,000 per month, including water and internet.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 那電費怎麼算？
lines.pinyin: nà diàn fèi zěn me suàn?
lines.english: How is the electricity bill calculated?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 電費另外算，每一度電是五塊錢。
lines.pinyin: diàn fèi lì wài suàn, měi yí dù diàn shì wǔ kuài qián.
lines.english: Electricity is extra, five dollars per unit.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 押金要付多少？
lines.pinyin: yā jīn yào fù duō shǎo?
lines.english: How much is the security deposit?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 押金是兩個月的租金，一共三萬塊。
lines.pinyin: yā jīn shì liǎng gè yuè de zū jīn, yí gòng sān wàn kuài.
lines.english: The deposit is two months' rent, 30,000 in total.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 這間房子的採光很好，也很安靜。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiān fáng zi de cǎi guāng hěn hǎo, yě hěn ān jìng.
lines.english: The lighting in this house is good, and it's also quiet.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 對啊，這區的環境很不錯，鄰居也都很安靜。
lines.pinyin: duì a, zhè qū de huán jìng hěn bú cuò, lín jū yě dōu hěn ān jìng.
lines.english: Yes, the environment in this area is quite good, and the neighbors are all quiet.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 房間裡有哪些家具？
lines.pinyin: fáng jiān lǐ yǒu nǎ xiē jiā jù?
lines.english: What furniture is in the room?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 有床、衣櫃、桌子、冷氣和冰箱。
lines.pinyin: yǒu chuáng, yī guì, zhuō zi, lěng qì hé bīng xiāng.
lines.english: There's a bed, wardrobe, desk, air conditioner, and refrigerator.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 請問可以養寵物嗎？
lines.pinyin: qǐng wèn kě yǐ yǎng chǒng wù ma?
lines.english: May I ask if pets are allowed?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 不好意思，我們這裡規定不能養寵物。
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, wǒ men zhè lǐ guī dìng bù néng yǎng chǒng wù.
lines.english: Sorry, our rules here state no pets allowed.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 好吧，那我考慮一下。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, nà wǒ kǎo lǜ yí xià.
lines.english: Alright, I'll think about it.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 好的，如果你決定了請盡快打電話給我。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, rú guǒ nǐ jué dìng le qǐng jǐn kuài dǎ diàn huà gěi wǒ.
lines.english: Okay, if you decide, please call me as soon as possible.

text.zh: 租房子時，地理位置和交通方便性是首要考慮。
text.pinyin: zū fáng zi shí, dì lǐ wèi zhì hé jiāo tōng fāng biàn xìng shì shǒu yào kǎo lǜ.
text.english: When renting an apartment, location and transportation convenience are primary considerations.

text.zh: 在簽合約之前，一定要仔細檢查房屋的狀況和家具。
text.pinyin: zài qiān hé yuē zhī qián, yí dìng yào zǐ xì jiǎn chá fáng wū de zhuàng kuàng hé jiā jù.
text.english: Before signing the contract, be sure to carefully check the condition of the house and furniture.

text.zh: 了解押金和租金的包含內容，能避免未來的糾紛。
text.pinyin: liǎo jiě yā jīn hé zū jīn de bāo hán nèi róng, néng bì miǎn wèi lái de jiū fēn.
text.english: Understanding what the deposit and rent include can avoid future disputes.

comprehension.question: What are the primary considerations when renting?
comprehension.questionZh: 租房子的首要考慮是什麼？
options: 地理位置和交通 Location and transportation
有沒有電視 If there is a TV

comprehension.question: What should you do before signing a contract?
comprehension.questionZh: 簽合約前應該做什麼？
options: 仔細檢查房屋狀況 Carefully check house condition
請朋友吃飯 Invite friends to dinner

comprehension.question: Why should you understand the rent inclusions?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼要了解租金包含的內容？
options: 為了省錢 To save money
為了避免糾紛 To avoid disputes

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ xū yào fù liǎng gè yuè de ___.
wǒ de ___ rén hěn hǎo.

exercises.english: How much is the monthly rent?
exercises.answerPinyin: měi gè yuè zū jīn duō shǎo?
zhè gè shè qū hěn ān jìng.

title: Giving & Receiving Advice
description: Learn how to discuss problems, offer solutions, and use modal verbs for suggestions.

dialogue.title: What Should I Do?
dialogue.scene: A person is feeling stressed about work and asks a friend for advice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你最近看起來很有煩惱，發生了什麼事嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì jìn kàn qǐ lái hěn yǒu fán nǎo, fā shēng le shén me shì ma?
lines.english: You look very worried lately, has something happened?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 唉，我的工作量太大了，每天都要加班。
lines.pinyin: āi, wǒ de gōng zuò liàng tài dà le, měi tiān dōu yào jiā bān.
lines.english: Sigh, my workload is too heavy, I have to work overtime every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你應該試著跟你的老闆談談。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yīng gāi shì zhe gēn nǐ de lǎo bǎn tán tan.
lines.english: You should try talking to your boss.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我怕他會覺得我沒有能力。
lines.pinyin: wǒ pà tā huì jué de wǒ méi yǒu néng lì.
lines.english: I'm afraid he'll think I'm not capable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 別這麼想，最好是讓他知道你的困難。
lines.pinyin: bié zhè me xiǎng, zuì hǎo shì ràng tā zhī dào nǐ de kùn nan.
lines.english: Don't think like that, it's better to let him know your difficulties.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果你是我，你會怎麼說？
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ shì wǒ, nǐ huì zěn me shuō?
lines.english: If you were me, how would you say it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會誠實地告訴他我需要更多時間或幫忙。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì chéng shí de gào sù tā wǒ xū yào gèng duō shí jiān huò bāng máng.
lines.english: I would honestly tell him that I need more time or help.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這聽起來是個好主意。
lines.pinyin: zhè tīng qǐ lái shì gè hǎo zhǔ yi.
lines.english: That sounds like a good idea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 另外，你下班後應該好好放鬆心情。
lines.pinyin: lì wài, nǐ xià bān hòu yīng gāi hǎo hǎo fàng sōng xīn qíng.
lines.english: Also, you should relax your mind after work.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我現在累得什麼都不想做。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài lèi de shén me dōu bù xiǎng zuò.
lines.english: I'm so tired now I don't want to do anything.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你可以去運動或是聽聽音樂。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ qù yùn dòng huò shì tīng ting yīn yuè.
lines.english: You can exercise or listen to music.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的建議，我會試試看的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de jiàn yì, wǒ huì shì shì kàn de.
lines.english: Thanks for your advice, I'll give it a try.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒關係，我們是朋友，我會支持你的。
lines.pinyin: méi guān xi, wǒ men shì péng you, wǒ huì zhī chí nǐ de.
lines.english: It's okay, we're friends, I'll support you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有你這句話，我的心情好多了。
lines.pinyin: yǒu nǐ zhè jù huà, wǒ de xīn qíng hǎo duō le.
lines.english: With those words, I feel much better.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 事情總會有解決的辦法的。
lines.pinyin: shì qing zǒng huì yǒu jiě jué de bàn fǎ de.
lines.english: There's always a way to solve things.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，我不應該一直往壞處想。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ bù yīng gāi yì zhí wǎng huài chù xiǎng.
lines.english: Right, I shouldn't keep thinking about the bad side.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 相信自己，你一直都很優秀。
lines.pinyin: xiāng xìn zì jǐ, nǐ yì zhí dōu hěn yōu xiù.
lines.english: Believe in yourself, you've always been excellent.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的安慰。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de ān wèi.
lines.english: Thank you for your comfort.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 等你有空，我們一起去吃頓大餐吧。
lines.pinyin: děng nǐ yǒu kòng, wǒ men yì qǐ qù chī dùn dà cān ba.
lines.english: When you're free, let's go have a big meal together.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，一言為定！
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, yì yán wéi dìng!
lines.english: Sure, it's a deal!

text.zh: 生活中遇到困難時，找朋友商量是一個好辦法。
text.pinyin: shēng huó zhòng yù dào kùn nan shí, zhǎo péng you shāng liang shì gè hǎo bàn fǎ.
text.english: When encountering difficulties in life, consulting with friends is a good way.

text.zh: 給予建議時要誠實，也要考慮對方的感受。
text.pinyin: gěi yǔ jiàn yì shí yào chéng shí, yě yào kǎo lǜ duì fāng de gǎn shòu.
text.english: Be honest when giving advice, and also consider the other person's feelings.

text.zh: 有時候，一句簡單的安慰就能讓人重新獲得勇氣。
text.pinyin: yǒu shí hou, yí jù jiǎn dān de ān wèi jiù néng ràng rén chóng xīn huò dé yǒng qì.
text.english: Sometimes, a simple word of comfort can make a person regain their courage.

comprehension.question: What is a good way to handle difficulties?
comprehension.questionZh: 遇到困難時的好辦法是什麼？
options: 找朋友商量 Consult with friends
放棄工作 Give up job

comprehension.question: What should you consider when giving advice?
comprehension.questionZh: 給建議時應該考慮什麼？
options: 對方的感受 The other's feelings

comprehension.question: What can a simple comfort do?
comprehension.questionZh: 簡單的安慰有什麼作用？
options: 讓人變累 Make people tired
讓人重新獲得勇氣 Regain courage
讓人想睡覺 Make people want to sleep

exercises.sentencePinyin: nǐ ___ zǎo diǎn shuì jiào.
wǒ yǒu gè hǎo ___.

exercises.english: If I were you, I would go.
exercises.answerPinyin: rú guǒ wǒ shì nǐ, wǒ jiù huì qù.

title: Customer Service & Complaints
description: Learn professional language for handling problems with products and requesting refunds.

dialogue.title: My Laptop is Broken
dialogue.scene: A customer calls a tech store because the laptop they bought yesterday has a defect.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 您好，我昨天在你們店裡買了一台筆電，但現在打不開。
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, wǒ zuó tiān zài nǐ men diàn lǐ mǎi le yì tāi bǐ diàn, dàn xiàn zài dǎ bù kāi.
lines.english: Hello, I bought a laptop at your store yesterday, but now it won't turn on.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 真的很抱歉讓您遇到這個問題。請問您有帶發票嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhēn de bào qiàn ràng nín yù dào zhè gè wèn tí. qǐng wèn nín yǒu dài fā piào ma?
lines.english: I'm really sorry you're experiencing this problem. Do you have the receipt?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我有帶發票，還在七天之內。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu dài fā piào, hái zài qī tiān zhī nèi.
lines.english: I have the receipt, and it's within seven days.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題。如果是硬體瑕疵，我們可以幫您換一台新的。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. rú guǒ shì yìng tǐ xiá cī, wǒ men kě yǐ bāng nín huàn yì tāi xīn de.
lines.english: No problem. If it's a hardware defect, we can exchange it for a new one for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我不想換新的，我可以直接要求退款嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù xiǎng huàn xīn de, wǒ kě yǐ zhí jiē yāo qiú tuì kuǎn ma?
lines.english: I don't want a new one, can I directly request a refund?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 這需要請工程師檢查一下。如果是我們的問題，當然可以退款。
lines.pinyin: zhè xū yào qǐng gōng chéng shī jiǎn chá yí xià. rú guǒ shì wǒ men de wèn tí, dāng rán kě yǐ tuì kuǎn.
lines.english: This requires an engineer to check it. If it's our problem, of course we can refund.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 檢查需要多久？我今天就需要用電腦。
lines.pinyin: jiǎn chá xū yào duō jiǔ? wǒ jīn tiān jiù xū yào yòng diàn nǎo.
lines.english: How long will the check take? I need to use the computer today.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 大約需要一個小時。真的很抱歉造成您的不便。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē xū yào yí gè xiǎo shí. zhēn de bào qiàn zào chéng nín de bù biàn.
lines.english: It will take about an hour. Really sorry for the inconvenience.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好吧，那我等一下。另外，這台電腦有保固嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, nà wǒ děng yí xià. lì wài, zhè tái diàn nǎo yǒu bǎo gù ma?
lines.english: Alright, I'll wait. Also, does this computer have a warranty?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有的，原廠保固兩年。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, yuán chǎng bǎo gù liǎng nián.
lines.english: Yes, two-year manufacturer warranty.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那就好。我對這次的購物體驗很不滿意。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. wǒ duì zhè cì de gòu wù tǐ yàn hěn bù mǎn yì.
lines.english: That's good. I'm very dissatisfied with this shopping experience.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我們非常重視您的意見，會努力改進服務品質。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men fēi cháng zhòng shì nín de yì jiàn, huì nǔ lì gǎi jìn fú wù pǐn zhì.
lines.english: We value your feedback and will work hard to improve our service quality.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 希望下次不會再發生這種事。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng xià cì bú huì zài fā shēng zhè zhǒng shì.
lines.english: I hope this won't happen again next time.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 為了表示歉意，我們送您一個電腦包。
lines.pinyin: wèi le biǎo shì qiàn yì, wǒ men sòng nín yí gè diàn nǎo bāo.
lines.english: To express our apologies, we're giving you a laptop bag.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 喔，謝謝。這還算不錯。
lines.pinyin: ō, xiè xie. zhè hái suàn bú cuò.
lines.english: Oh, thanks. That's not bad.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您也可以留下聯絡方式，處理好後我馬上通知您。
lines.pinyin: nín yě kě yǐ liú xià lián luò fāng shì, chǔ lǐ hǎo hòu wǒ mǎ shàng tōng zhī nín.
lines.english: You can also leave your contact information, and I'll notify you as soon as it's handled.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，這是我的電話。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhè shì wǒ de diàn huà.
lines.english: Okay, here is my phone number.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝。我一定會盡快為您處理。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ yí dìng huì jǐn kuài wèi nín chǔ lǐ.
lines.english: Thank you. I will definitely handle this for you as quickly as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 希望能趕快解決問題。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng néng gǎn kuài jiě jué wèn tí.
lines.english: Hope the problem can be solved quickly.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請放心，我們一定會負責到底的。
lines.pinyin: qǐng fàng xīn, wǒ men yí dìng huì fù zé dào dǐ de.
lines.english: Please rest assured, we will take full responsibility.

text.zh: 良好的客戶服務是企業成功的關鍵之一。
text.pinyin: liáng hǎo de kè fú shì qǐ yè chéng gōng de guān jiàn zhī yī.
text.english: Good customer service is one of the keys to corporate success.

text.zh: 面對顧客的投訴，冷靜和禮貌地處理非常重要。
text.pinyin: miàn duì gù kè de tóu sù, lěng jìng hé lǐ mào de chǔ lǐ fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: When facing customer complaints, handling them calmly and politely is very important.

text.zh: 提供合理的解決方案和賠償，能重新獲得顧客的信任。
text.pinyin: tí gōng hé lǐ de jiě jué fāng àn hé péi cháng, néng chóng xīn huò qǔ gù kè de xìn rèn.
text.english: Providing reasonable solutions and compensation can regain customer trust.

comprehension.question: What is a key to corporate success?
comprehension.questionZh: 企業成功的關鍵之一是什麼？
options: 有很多錢 Have a lot of money
良好的客戶服務 Good customer service
只賣貴的東西 Only sell expensive things

comprehension.question: How should complaints be handled?
comprehension.questionZh: 應該如何處理投訴？
options: 冷靜和禮貌地處理 Handle calmly and politely
大聲吵架 Shout and fight

comprehension.question: How can customer trust be regained?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何重新獲得顧客信任？
options: 提供合理解決方案 Provide reasonable solutions

exercises.sentence: 我想要___這個壞掉的手機。
exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ xiǎng yào ___ zhè gè huài diào de shǒu jī.
zhēn de ___ zào chéng nín de bù biàn.

exercises.english: The quality of this product is bad.
exercises.answerPinyin: zhè gè chǎn pǐn de pǐn zhì hěn chà.

exercises.english: I will handle it right away.

title: Future Plans & Dreams
description: Discuss ambitions, long-term goals, and what you hope to achieve in the future.

dialogue.title: Where Do You See Yourself in Five Years?
dialogue.scene: Two students talk about their goals after graduation and their long-term dreams.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你畢業後有什麼特別的計畫嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ bì yè hòu yǒu shén me tè bié de jì huà ma?
lines.english: Do you have any special plans after graduation?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我打算先去德國讀研究所。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ suàn xiān qù dé guó dú yán jiū suǒ.
lines.english: I plan to go to Germany for graduate school first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哇，那你的德文一定學得很好了。
lines.pinyin: wa, nà nǐ de dé wén yí dìng xué de hěn hǎo le.
lines.english: Wow, your German must be very good then.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還在努力練習中。那是我的大目標。
lines.pinyin: hái zài nǔ lì liàn xí zhōng. nà shì wǒ de dà mù biāo.
lines.english: Still practicing hard. That's my big goal.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你以後想做什麼樣的工作？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǐ hòu xiǎng zuò shén me yàng de gōng zuò?
lines.english: What kind of work do you want to do in the future?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我希望能成為一名工程師。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng néng chéng wéi yì míng gōng chéng shī. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I hope to become an engineer. How about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的夢想是創業，開一家自己的咖啡廳。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de mèng xiǎng shì chuàng yè, kāi yì jiā zì jǐ de kā fēi tīng.
lines.english: My dream is to start a business and open my own cafe.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽起來很棒！你一定會成功的。
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn bàng! nǐ yí dìng huì chéng gōng de.
lines.english: Sounds great! You will definitely succeed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。我希望能環遊世界，去看看不同的文化。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ xī wàng néng huán yóu shì jiè, qù kàn kàn bù tóng de wén huà.
lines.english: Thanks. I hope to travel around the world and see different cultures.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是很多人的夢想呢。你想先去哪裡？
lines.pinyin: nà shì hěn duō rén de mèng xiǎng ne. nǐ xiǎng xiān qù nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: That's many people's dream. Where do you want to go first?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想先去南美洲，那裡感覺很有活力。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xiān qù nán měi zhōu, nà lǐ gǎn jué hěn yǒu huó lì.
lines.english: I want to go to South America first; it feels very energetic there.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也希望能有一個穩定的生活。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xī wàng néng yǒu yí gè wěn dìng de shēng huó.
lines.english: I also hope to have a stable life.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 穩定和夢想同樣重要。
lines.pinyin: wěn dìng hé mèng xiǎng tóng yàng zhòng yào.
lines.english: Stability and dreams are equally important.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，我會努力在工作中取得成就。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ huì nǔ lì zài gōng zuò zhòng qǔ dé chéng jiù.
lines.english: Right, I will work hard to achieve accomplishments in my work.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 生活中總會有挑戰，但也是成長的機會。
lines.pinyin: shēng huó zhòng zǒng huì yǒu tiǎo zhàn, dàn yě shì chéng zhǎng de jī huì.
lines.english: There will always be challenges in life, but they're also opportunities for growth.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，不要害怕失敗。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, bú yào hài pà shī bài.
lines.english: Exactly, don't be afraid of failure.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們一起為了未來加油吧！
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yì qǐ wèi le wèi lái jiā yóu ba!
lines.english: Let's work hard together for the future!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，希望十年後的我們都能實現目標。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, xī wàng shí nián hòu de wǒ men dōu néng shí nián mù biāo.
lines.english: Okay, I hope that in ten years we will both have achieved our goals.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那到時候我們再一起慶祝。
lines.pinyin: nà dào shí hou wǒ men zài yì qǐ qìng zhù.
lines.english: Then let's celebrate together at that time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，一定會的！
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, yí dìng huì de!
lines.english: No problem, we definitely will!

text.zh: 每個人對未來都有不同的期待和夢想。
text.pinyin: měi gè rén duì wèi lái dōu yǒu bù tóng de qī dài hé mèng xiǎng.
text.english: Everyone has different expectations and dreams for the future.

text.zh: 設定清晰的目標並制定計畫，是實現夢想的第一步。
text.pinyin: shè dìng qīng xī de mù biāo bìng zhì dìng jì huà, shì shí xiàn mèng xiǎng de dì yī bù.
text.english: Setting clear goals and making a plan is the first step to realizing your dreams.

text.zh: 勇敢面對挑戰，不斷學習和進步，未來一定會更美好。
text.pinyin: yǒng gǎn miàn duì tiǎo zhàn, bú duàn xué xí hé jìn bù, wèi lái yí dìng huì gèng měi hǎo.
text.english: Bravely facing challenges and constantly learning and improving will surely make the future better.

comprehension.question: What is the first step to realizing dreams?
comprehension.questionZh: 實現夢想的第一步是什麼？
options: 每天睡覺 Sleep every day
設定目標並制定計畫 Set goals and make plans
放棄努力 Give up effort

comprehension.question: What should we do when facing challenges?
comprehension.questionZh: 面對挑戰時應該怎麼辦？
options: 勇敢面對 Bravely face it
趕快逃跑 Run away quickly

comprehension.question: How can we make the future better?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何讓未來更美好？
options: 不斷學習和進步 Constantly learn and improve

exercises.sentencePinyin: wǒ de ___ shì dāng yì míng yī shēng.
zhù nǐ yǐ hòu néng ___.

exercises.english: What are your plans for the future?
exercises.answerPinyin: nǐ duì wèi lái yǒu shén me jì huà?

exercises.english: I want to travel around the world.
exercises.answerPinyin: wǒ xiǎng huán yóu shì jiè.
